title: MACROCAST: A Vintage-Consistent Time Series Foundation Model for Real-Time Macroeconomic Forecasting
summary: We introduce MACROCAST, a lightweight Time Series Foundation Model (TSFM) for real-time macroeconomic forecasting. Existing TSFMs suffer from data leakage in two forms: temporal contamination, as the model may have seen the realized values of the series it forecasts, and revision bias, as training on fully revised data diverges from the preliminary, vintage-specific releases available to real-time forecasters. MACROCAST is, to our knowledge, the first TSFM that rules out both forms of leakage entirely: at no stage of training is the model exposed to information that would not have been available to a forecaster in real time. We train MACROCAST first on purely synthetic time series in approximately one GPU-day and then fine-tune it on synthetic time series drawn from Bayesian VARs, dynamic factor models, and ARIMA specifications estimated on vintage-specific ALFRED data. Because pretraining uses only simulated data and fine-tuning uses only real-time vintages, no observed future or revised value ever enters the model; each fine-tuning run takes nine minutes. Evaluated on the FRED-MD database in a genuine real-time out-of-sample exercise, MACROCAST improves on the AR(1) benchmark for roughly 80% of series-horizon pairs, matches or surpasses Chronos-2 -- the strongest currently available TSFM -- and outperforms the Bayesian VAR and dynamic factor model benchmarks, all in a data-leakage-free manner.

AI.tldr: MACROCAST是一个轻量级时间序列基础模型，专为实时宏观经济预测设计。它通过仅使用合成数据和实时vintage数据训练，彻底避免了时间污染和修正偏差两种数据泄露问题。在FRED-MD数据库的真实样本外测试中，约80%的序列-预测期组合优于AR(1)基准，匹配或超越Chronos-2等最强模型，且每轮微调仅需9分钟。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型（TSFM）存在两种数据泄露：时间污染（模型可能已经看到预测序列的已实现值）和修订偏差（模型基于完全修订后的数据训练，与实时预测者可获得的vintage特定初步数据不一致）。作者旨在开发首个完全排除这两种泄露的TSFM。
AI.method: 1. 预训练：先在大约1个GPU天内用纯合成时间序列训练MACROCAST。2. 微调：基于ALFRED vintage数据估计的贝叶斯VAR、动态因子模型和ARIMA规范生成的合成时间序列进行微调，每次微调仅需9分钟。关键设计：预训练只使用模拟数据，微调只使用实时vintage数据，模型在任何阶段都未接触实时预测者无法获得的信息。
AI.result: 在FRED-MD数据库的真实样本外测试中：约80%的序列-预测期组合优于AR(1)基准；匹配或超越当前最强TSFM——Chronos-2；优于贝叶斯VAR和动态因子模型基准；且完全无数据泄露。
AI.conclusion: MACROCAST是首个彻底排除时间污染和修订偏差两种数据泄露的时间序列基础模型，兼顾了高效训练（预训练约1GPU天，微调9分钟）和卓越的预测性能，为实时宏观经济预测提供了可靠的解决方案。

title: Literature Review and Evidence Aggregation: a Toolkit for Applied Micro
summary: Consider an analyst interested in predicting the size of an effect. She has identified a set of prior published studies of similar effects. We provide a toolkit for (i) summarizing the prior literature, (ii) making predictions of effects in new contexts, and (iii) correcting for the bias from selectivity in the prior literature. We illustrate these methods with empirical examples from labor, public, behavioral, environmental, and development economics. Some of the tools are relevant even when only three prior studies are available. We show how it is possible to use covariates to transparently make predictions for a new context by reweighting prior estimates. The mean effect 0 after correcting for selectivity - is between 12% and 21% of the simple mean in our empirical examples. We conclude with a cookbook for practitioners producing meta-analyses.

AI.tldr: 本文提供了一个元分析工具包，用于总结已有文献、预测新情境下的效应大小，并纠正选择性偏倚。通过多个经济学领域的实证案例展示，校正选择性偏倚后的平均效应仅为简单均值的12%-21%。
AI.motivation: 帮助研究者利用已有文献更准确地预测新情境下的效应大小，并纠正因发表偏倚或选择性报告导致的问题。
AI.method: 开发了一套元分析工具，包括文献总结、基于协变量加权的新情境预测、以及选择性偏倚校正方法；可在仅有3篇已有研究的情况下使用。
AI.result: 校正选择性偏倚后，平均效应约为简单均值的12%-21%。
AI.conclusion: 为实践者提供了元分析的操作指南（cookbook），强调校正选择性偏倚的重要性。

title: Liquidity-Based Audit of Algorithmic Trading Strategies
summary: We show that net demand for liquidity by algo strategies is identifiable from its trade and price history alone, with no knowledge of its signal or optimization problem. An exact multi-period regret decomposition implies that the sign of this statistic classifies a linear strategy as a net liquidity consumer or provider, recovering the Kyle (1985) informed-trader/market-maker dichotomy from observables alone. Under an AR(1) cost process, the same statistic equals the product of strategy size and the squared Roll (1984) implied spread, making the correction a direct proxy for prevailing illiquidity. Extending to endogenous price impact and aggregating across N correlated strategies yields a liquidity-balance condition whose violation produces welfare loss scaling as N squared, a closed-form fire-sale externality. We calibrate to CRSP equity data (2016-2025), tracking implied spreads through the COVID-19 and 2022 rate-shock episodes, with an estimator computable in O(Tnd) time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅从交易和价格历史数据中识别算法策略流动性净需求的方法，无需知晓其信号或优化问题。通过多期遗憾分解，可将线性策略分类为流动性消费者或提供者，并证明该统计量与策略规模及Roll隐含价差的乘积相等。在N个相关策略情形下，导出流动性平衡条件及其违反导致的福利损失（与N²成正比）。在CRSP股票数据（2016-2025）上进行了校准，涵盖COVID-19和2022年利率冲击阶段。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中，流动性需求和供给的识别通常依赖于对交易者信号、优化目标或市场微观结构参数的先验知识。作者试图提出一种完全基于可观测数据（交易和价格历史）的方法，在不依赖任何先验信息的情况下区分算法策略是流动性消费者还是提供者，并量化其对市场流动性的影响。
AI.method: 1. 推导精确的多期遗憾分解，从交易和价格历史中识别流动性净需求统计量；2. 证明该统计量符号可对线性策略进行流动性消费者/提供者分类，恢复Kyle（1985）知情交易者/做市商二分法；3. 在AR(1)成本过程下，证明该统计量等于策略规模与Roll隐含价差平方的乘积；4. 扩展到内生价格影响并聚合N个相关策略，导出流动性平衡条件及福利损失表达式；5. 在CRSP数据上校准，提出O(Tnd)时间复杂度的估计量。
AI.result: 1. 成功从可观测数据中识别出流动性净需求统计量，无需先验知识；2. 该统计量符号可有效分类线性策略的流动性角色；3. 在AR(1)成本过程下，统计量简化为策略规模与Roll隐含价差平方的乘积；4. 推导出N个相关策略下的流动性平衡条件，违反条件导致与N²成正比的福利损失（火售外部性）；5. 在CRSP数据上成功估计了2016-2025年间的隐含价差，有效追踪了COVID-19和2022年利率冲击期间的流动性变化，且估计器具有线性时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了一个完全基于可观测数据的算法策略流动性角色识别框架，连接了Kyle（1985）和Roll（1984）的经典理论，并揭示了多策略竞争下的火售外部性（福利损失与策略数量平方成正比）。该框架在实证中可高效计算，对监管机构监控市场流动性风险具有潜在应用价值。

title: Second-Generation Heterogeneous Panel Data Model with Individual and Common Shocks
summary: We study estimation of the mean slope in heterogeneous panels that combine cross-sectional dependence from unobserved common factors with unit-specific structural breaks occurring at different dates. We organize the available second-generation Mean Group estimators into a regime map indexed by the cross-section size, the strength of the cross-sectional dependence, and the nature of the structural change, and we examine two estimators for the small-to-moderate-dependence panels common in applied macroeconomics and energy economics. The Fourier SUR Mean Group (F-SURMG) estimator augments a seemingly unrelated regression system with unit-specific Fourier terms. The proposed Fourier Common Correlated Effects Mean Group (F-CCEMG) estimator augments the CCE regression with deterministic Fourier terms, filtering the common factor while absorbing the heterogeneously timed breaks. In a Monte Carlo study with R = 500 replications across weak, moderate, and strong dependence, F-CCEMG attains the lowest root mean squared error in almost every configuration and near-nominal coverage once the cross-section is not minimal, while F-SURMG gives the best-calibrated inference in the small-N, weak-dependence corner; estimators that do not filter the factor lose coverage as dependence rises. An application to the renewable energy-growth nexus in the G7 over 1965-2019 finds no significant aggregate effect of renewable energy consumption on growth.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有截面依赖和异质性结构断点的面板数据中均值斜率的估计问题，提出了F-CCEMG和F-SURMG两种估计量，并在蒙特卡洛模拟和G7可再生能源-经济增长关系的实证应用中验证了其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有第二代入群均值估计量在面对截面依赖与异质性结构断点同时存在时表现不一致，缺乏系统的比较框架。作者旨在填补这一空白，特别关注应用宏观经济和能源经济学中常见的中低依赖面板。
AI.method: 将第二代入群均值估计量按截面规模、截面依赖强度和结构变化性质三个维度组织成"体制地图"；提出F-SURMG（用傅里叶项扩充SUR系统）和F-CCEMG（用确定性傅里叶项扩充CCE回归，过滤共同因子同时吸收异质性断点）。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛模拟（R=500，涵盖弱、中、强依赖）显示：F-CCEMG在几乎所有配置下取得最低均方根误差，在截面规模非最小时接近名义覆盖率；F-SURMG在小N、弱依赖场景下推断最准确；未过滤因子的估计量随依赖增强覆盖率下降。G7实证（1965-2019）发现可再生能源消费对增长无显著总体效应。
AI.conclusion: F-CCEMG是处理中高截面依赖和异质性断点的稳健选择，F-SURMG在弱依赖小样本中更优；忽略共同因子过滤会导致推断失效；可再生能源对G7经济增长无显著影响。

title: The Bounce Has No Direction: Sign, Magnitude, and the Microstructure of Equity Return Predictability
summary: SPY's lag-1 return autocorrelation ($\hatρ(1)=-0.081$, $z=-7.4$) is among the most significant regularities in empirical equity finance, yet the standard variance-ratio (VR) test cannot determine whether it reflects directional reversal or magnitude shrinkage - phenomena with entirely different trading implications. We develop the Fourier-Residue Identity (FRI), which decomposes return autocorrelation into a sign ($k=2$) and a magnitude ($k=4$) channel, each independently testable and neither redundant. Applied to six US instruments over 1993--2026 and a 21-instrument cross-asset panel, the FRI delivers a sharp microstructure diagnosis. The lag-1 autocorrelation in SPY is driven entirely by magnitude: the FRI sign test is insignificant ($p=0.11$) while the full test achieves $p<10^{-12}$. A large move yesterday predicts a smaller move today regardless of direction - the fingerprint of bid-ask bounce and non-synchronous constituent staleness, not directional reversal. At lag 3, a significant directional reversal ($p=0.02$) invisible to the scalar ACF reveals a separate partial-price-adjustment channel. We prove the Fejer identity VR(q)=1+2C_q (confirmed to <0.001 on all series), giving the Lo-MacKinlay test a spectral interpretation, and introduce a subsample diagnostic R_N=G_{N/2}/G_N that classifies equity autocorrelation as structural (R_N->1) rather than sampling noise (R_N->sqrt(2)). The cross-asset panel shows mean reversion confined to exchange-traded equities and sovereign bonds; credit ETFs, commodities, FX, and crypto are indistinguishable from random walks. All estimators pass 27 unit tests; Monte Carlo confirms correct 5% size under GARCH.

AI.tldr: 本文提出傅里叶-残差恒等式(FRI)，将收益率自相关分解为符号和幅度两个独立通道，发现SPY的滞后1期自相关完全由幅度驱动（p<10^{-12}），反映的是买卖报价反弹和非同步成分陈旧性，而非方向性反转。在滞后3期则检测到显著的方向性反转（p=0.02）。跨资产面板显示均值回归仅限于股票ETF和主权债券。
AI.motivation: 传统的方差比检验无法区分收益率自相关究竟源于方向性反转还是幅度收缩，而这两种机制具有完全不同的交易含义。作者试图开发一种新方法，将自相关分解为可独立检验的符号通道和幅度通道，以揭示市场微观结构的真实本质。
AI.method: 提出傅里叶-残差恒等式(FRI)，将收益率自相关分解为k=2（符号通道）和k=4（幅度通道）两个独立可检验的成分。利用Fejer恒等式为Lo-MacKinlay方差比检验赋予谱解释。引入子样本诊断统计量R_N来区分结构性与噪声性自相关。通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证GARCH下的正确尺寸，并进行27项单元测试。
AI.result: SPY滞后1期自相关完全由幅度驱动（FRI符号检验p=0.11不显著，完整检验p<10^{-12}）。滞后3期检测到显著的方向性反转（p=0.02），标量ACF无法发现。Fejer恒等式VR(q)=1+2C_q在所有序列上得到确认（误差<0.001）。跨资产面板显示均值回归仅限于股票ETF和主权债券，信用ETF、商品、外汇和加密货币与随机游走无差异。
AI.conclusion: FRI方法成功解耦了自相关中的方向和幅度成分，提供了更精细的微观结构诊断工具。SPY的滞后1期负自相关是市场微观结构噪声（买卖报价反弹）的产物，而非方向性预测信号。金融市场存在异质性：部分资产（股票ETF、主权债券）呈现结构性的均值回归，而其他资产类别则更接近随机游走。

title: Balancing Shareholder Value and Financial Stability under a Reduced-Form Liquidation Model
summary: Modern resolution and prudential regimes increasingly wind up a distressed firm not at a single hard threshold but through a graduated, state-dependent process. We study how the design of such a regime shapes the trade-off between shareholder value and financial stability for a firm whose surplus follows a general diffusion. Forced liquidation is modelled in reduced form, arriving at a surplus-dependent hazard rate that rises as the firm's position deteriorates. The framework has three regions: an unregulated region where dividends may be paid, a regulated region where solvency requirements prohibit distributions, and a distress region in which the firm faces the liquidation hazard. To quantify shareholder value we solve the resulting singular stochastic control problem: which is to maximise the expected present value of distributions until liquidation. We establish a verification theorem, prove that a barrier strategy is optimal, and obtain tractable expressions for the value function and the expected survival time, so that alternative designs can be compared at low cost. We show that a distress region placed solely below or solely above the classical ruin threshold does not consistently improve both shareholder value and firm survival, whereas combining the two yields a Pareto improvement. Regulatory design is decisive.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了现代决议和审慎监管制度如何通过渐进式、依赖状态的流程处理陷入困境的 firms，并分析了该制度设计在股东价值与金融稳定之间的权衡。通过求解奇异随机控制问题，证明了屏障策略最优，并发现单独将困境区域置于经典破产阈值上方或下方无法同时改善股东价值与公司生存，而二者结合可实现帕累托改进。
AI.motivation: 现代监管制度越来越多地采用渐进式、状态依赖的方式来处理陷入困境的 firms，而非单一时点强制清算。作者希望理解这种制度设计如何平衡股东价值与金融稳定。
AI.method: 采用简化形式的强制清算模型（清算风险率随公司状况恶化而上升），将框架分为三个区域（未监管区、监管区、困境区），求解奇异随机控制问题以最大化分配现值，建立验证定理，证明屏障策略最优，并推导价值函数和预期存续时间的可处理表达式。
AI.result: 单独将困境区域置于经典破产阈值下方或上方均无法一致地改善股东价值和公司生存；将两者结合则能实现帕累托改进。监管设计具有决定性作用。
AI.conclusion: 监管制度的设计对平衡股东价值与金融稳定至关重要，结合上下阈值的困境区设计能够同时改善两者，形成帕累托改进。

title: Heads, Not Backbones: Output Heads Dominate Architectures on Fat-Tailed Returns
summary: In a deep forecasting pipeline for fat-tailed financial returns at short horizons, which matters more - the backbone architecture or the output head? We compare four modern backbones (TimesNet, DLinear, N-BEATS, iTransformer) under three output heads: a point head, a single-Gaussian density head, and a Gaussian mixture density head with K=4 components. On S and P 500 monthly log-returns (1871-2023) under anchored walk-forward validation, the three heads form a strict gradient: switching from point to Gaussian improves CRPS by about 1.3 percent; switching from Gaussian to mixture adds a further about 2.4 percent. Switching between backbones, in contrast, changes CRPS by less than 1.5 percent on the point-head row and on the backbone-mean axis; density-head backbone spread is larger (up to 5.1 percent on the h=1 Gaussian row, driven by N-BEATS) but the head gradient (3.7 percentage points) still dominates. The Model Confidence Set on squared errors does not exclude any of the 12 variants at the 5 percent level: the head separates them only on distributional metrics (CRPS, pinball, coverage), not on squared error. The mixture head incremental value over a single Gaussian is largest in the highest-volatility regimes (13.9 percent in 1970s stagflation at h=12), confirming the mixture captures tail risk beyond what a unimodal Gaussian can express. The picture is horizon-dependent: the head dominates at short horizons, but at long horizons (h >= 6) the backbone re-takes the lead - an h-split we document against classical baselines (section 5.1). We conclude that on fat-tailed returns at short horizons, the head dominates the backbone, and the mixture distribution adds genuine value over a single Gaussian during crisis periods when risk-management decisions actually matter.

AI.tldr: 针对短周期肥尾金融收益率预测，输出头（特别是混合高斯分布头）对性能的影响远大于骨干架构，且混合头在高波动危机时期提供显著增量价值。
AI.motivation: 探究在短周期肥尾金融收益率预测中，骨干网络架构与输出头哪个更关键，以及混合密度分布是否比单一高斯分布带来实际增益。
AI.method: 对比四种现代骨干网络（TimesNet, DLinear, N-BEATS, iTransformer）搭配三种输出头（点预测头、单高斯密度头、K=4混合高斯密度头），在1871-2023年S&P 500月对数收益率上做锚定滚动验证。
AI.result: 输出头形成严格梯度：点→高斯提升CRPS约1.3%，高斯→混合再提升约2.4%；骨干切换变化小于1.5%（点头行）且N-BEATS在密度头上表现特殊。混合头在1970s滞胀期（h=12）增益达13.9%，但所有12种变体在MCS平方误差检验中均未被排除。头在短周期主导，长周期（h≥6）骨干重新领先。
AI.conclusion: 在短周期肥尾收益率预测中，输出头的选择比骨干架构更重要，混合高斯分布在危机时期的尾部风险捕捉上优于单一高斯，具有实际风险管理价值。

title: CLQT: A Closed-Loop, Cost-Aware, Strategy-Consistent Benchmark for Diagnostic Evaluation of LLM Portfolio-Management Agents
summary: LLM agents are increasingly cast as autonomous portfolio managers, and benchmarks have moved from financial question-answering to sequential trading. Yet most still rank agents by returns over a fixed window -- a weak proxy, since a period's return is dominated by the market path and apparent alpha can dissolve once look-ahead leakage is controlled. Such a ranking certifies neither sound reasoning, nor a consistent strategy, nor a durable edge. We introduce CLQT, which reframes closed-loop trading evaluation as diagnosis rather than ranking: an instrument that localizes where and why an agent's process succeeds or fails. CLQT is a fully closed-loop, cost-aware, strategy-consistent, temporally-gated environment whose agents run a five-stage cycle: gather, synthesize, allocate, execute, reflect. Each round emits a complete DecisionRound sealed into a recompute-verifiable hash chain, so every metric is reconstructable from the trail. Six pillars form the substrate: a hard TimeGate, institutional transaction- and financing-cost modeling, strategy-consistency scoring, three-tier memory, a Model-Context-Protocol tool layer, and mandate-aware synthesis. The same agent runs as a constrained committee of specialized roles or a single full-autonomy orchestrator, making process scaffolding an experimental variable. From the audit trail we compute a five-axis capability scorecard (APM-CS: Coherence, Acuity, Composure, Discipline, Reliability), with Coherence judged partly by a held-out, out-of-cohort LLM to curb self-preference bias. We validate it on a contamination-controlled multi-model backtest with an ablation grid and a live broker track on unseen, post-cutoff data, against a repeated-run noise floor. CLQT separates outcome from capability, yielding not a model ranking but a durable, extensible map of agent competencies and limitations.

AI.tldr: CLQT是一个闭环交易评估框架，通过五阶段决策周期、审计链和五轴能力评分卡，将智能体评估从收益排名转向过程诊断，以区分市场噪声与真实能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅以固定窗口收益排名智能体，但收益受市场路径支配且存在前瞻泄露问题，无法衡量推理质量、策略一致性和持续优势。
AI.method: 构建闭环、成本感知、策略一致、时间门控的环境；智能体执行"收集-综合-分配-执行-反思"五阶段循环；每次决策生成可验证哈希链审计轨迹；计算五轴能力评分卡（APM-CS：连贯性、敏锐度、沉着度、纪律性、可靠性），其中连贯性由留出LLM评判以避免自偏好偏差。
AI.result: 在污染控制的回测（含消融网格）和实盘交易（未见过的新数据）上验证，并与重复运行的噪声基线对比。
AI.conclusion: CLQT将结果与能力分离，输出的是智能体能力与局限的持久可扩展地图，而非单一模型排名。

title: Adaptive AI Delegation under Uncertainty: A Bayesian Governance Policy for Sequential Decision Authority
summary:
Organizations increasingly use large language models and agentic AI systems to generate probabilistic assessments and candidate actions in high-consequence settings. This creates a managerial problem distinct from prediction: how should organizations allocate decision authority to AI-generated recommendations as evidence quality, uncertainty, and organizational objectives evolve over time? Existing AI governance frameworks emphasize transparency, documentation, oversight, and regulatory compliance, but provide limited quantitative guidance for dynamically allocating decision authority under uncertainty. To address this challenge, we formulate adaptive AI delegation as a Governance-Aware Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) in which Bayesian inference estimates the informational state and sequential optimization determines delegated AI authority.
  The paper also develops a quantitative validation and benchmarking framework for governance policies. Synthetic stress tests, reported LLM-confidence robustness, forecast-accuracy validation, governance-appetite sensitivity, and fragile-AI early-warning experiments evaluate whether the proposed policy exhibits graceful degradation, robustness to confidence-only perturbations, adaptive delegation under improving evidence quality, and interpretable calibration of institutional conservatism. The Governance-Aware POMDP is further benchmarked against five representative governance strategies operating under identical Bayesian beliefs, information, and governance objectives. The results show that while specialized heuristics perform well in stationary settings, sequential Bayesian governance provides the strongest general-purpose governance policy across heterogeneous AI-quality regimes by adaptively allocating organizational decision authority under uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于治理感知POMDP的框架，用于在不确定性下动态分配AI生成建议的决策权限。通过贝叶斯推断估计信息状态，并优化AI授权策略。实验表明，与五种基准策略相比，序贯贝叶斯治理策略在异构AI质量场景下表现出最优的通用治理性能。
AI.motivation: 组织在高风险场景中使用LLM和AI系统生成概率评估和候选行动，但现有AI治理框架（如透明度、文档、监督、合规）缺乏在不确定性下动态分配决策权限的定量指导。
AI.method: 将自适应AI授权建模为治理感知的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），利用贝叶斯推断估计信息状态，通过序贯优化确定AI授权级别。同时构建了包含合成压力测试、LLM置信度鲁棒性、预测准确性验证、治理偏好敏感性、脆弱AI预警的定量验证与基准测试框架。
AI.result: 序贯贝叶斯治理策略在异构AI质量场景下优于五种代表性基准策略，表现出优雅降级、置信度扰动鲁棒性、证据质量改善下的自适应授权以及可解释的制度保守性校准能力。
AI.conclusion: 专业启发式方法在静态场景下表现良好，但序贯贝叶斯治理通过在不确定性下自适应分配决策权，成为跨异构AI质量体制的最强通用治理策略。

title: Rapid and robust parameter estimation for electrochemical battery models via BOLT: A batch-optimized local-to-global technique
comment: 42 pages, 7 figures, accepted manuscript. The definitive version is published in Applied Energy; please cite the published version.https://doi.org/10.1016/j.apenergy.2026.128307
summary: Accurate and efficient parameter estimation is essential for applying electrochemical battery models in simulation, state estimation, control, and repeated model updating. However, conventional optimization methods, such as particle swarm optimization (PSO) and genetic algorithms (GA), often require many model evaluations and show considerable run-to-run variability, limiting their use in time-sensitive calibration scenarios. This study proposes a Batch-Optimized Local-to-Global Technique (BOLT) for rapid and robust parameter estimation of electrochemical battery models. BOLT combines diversified candidate initialization, batch-parallel trust-region reflective (TRF) local refinement, JIT-accelerated model evaluation, and multi-condition consistency screening within a unified calibration workflow. Comparative experiments based on a grouped single-particle model and measured data from a commercial 18650 NMC lithium-ion cell show that BOLT achieves a favorable trade-off among voltage-response accuracy, computational efficiency, and repeated-run stability. BOLT(32) achieves an average mean absolute error of \(12.4 \pm 0.1\) mV over five operating conditions, requiring only \(20636 \pm 3081\) model calls and \(8.97 \pm 1.20\) s per run. Synthetic-data validation with a known parameter vector in the grouped SPM formulation further shows that BOLT recovers the reference parameter vector under model-consistent conditions and remains robust under 1--3 mV voltage-noise perturbations, with the mean parameter absolute relative error below \(0.6\%\). These results indicate that BOLT provides a practical calibration framework for BMS parameter updating, control-oriented battery digital twins, and second-life battery screening.

AI.tldr: 提出BOLT方法，结合批量并行局部优化、即时编译加速和多条件一致性筛选，实现电化学电池模型参数快速鲁棒估计，在精度、效率和稳定性间取得良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法（如PSO、GA）需大量模型评估且运行结果波动大，难以用于时间敏感的标定场景，因此需要一种快速且鲁棒的参数估计方法。
AI.method: BOLT方法包含多样候选初始化、批量并行信赖域反射（TRF）局部优化、JIT加速模型评估和多条件一致性筛选四个核心组件，形成统一标定工作流。
AI.result: BOLT(32)在5个工况下平均MAE为12.4±0.1 mV，模型调用20636±3081次，运行时间8.97±1.20秒；合成数据验证中，参数绝对相对误差低于0.6%。
AI.conclusion: BOLT为BMS参数更新、控制导向电池数字孪生和二次电池筛选提供了实用的标定框架。

title: Spectral Perturbation of the Empirical Fisher Information Matrix under Weight Quantization
comment: 13 pages; supporting code and experimental artifacts will be released in a companion repository
summary: We study the spectral perturbation of the empirical Fisher Information Matrix (FIM) of a parametric statistical model under two structured perturbations: departure of the input from a reference (in-distribution) ensemble, and finite-precision (quantized) perturbation of the model's parameters. For the first, under an explicit local curvature-monotonicity hypothesis on the dominant eigenvalue lambda_max of the FIM, we show departure from a reference manifold provably elevates lambda_max relative to a calibration baseline (Proposition 3.2), and discuss why this hypothesis is required, since curvature need not increase monotonically under every perturbation. Our principal result is a directional eigenvalue perturbation bound, via Weyl's inequality, showing lambda_max under a quantization noise perturbation is lower bounded by its unperturbed value up to a third-order remainder, and, under a mild genericity condition, strictly exceeds it at leading order (Theorem 4.3). We give two tractable approximations to lambda_max -- one heuristic, one with a rigorous two-sided bound -- and a completeness result for a threshold-based partition of an augmented state space. These results motivate using sigma_t = lambda_max(F_t)/lambda_base as a runtime monitoring statistic for deployed language models: the quantization result offers a mechanism for an empirical observation of our own, where a calibration threshold for this statistic was approximately 244 times larger than a preliminary full-precision estimate on a 4-bit quantized model, a single measurement rather than a value derived in closed form. We report supporting measurements (twelve models, n=1,080 trajectories) broadly consistent with our predictions, discuss the scope and limitations of every result, and state as an open problem the closed-form prediction of the quantization inflation magnitude our bound does not supply.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了经验Fisher信息矩阵在两种结构扰动下的谱扰动：输入分布偏移和参数量化。主要结果表明，在特定条件下，这两种扰动都会提升最大特征值，并利用这一现象提出了一个用于部署语言模型的运行时监控统计量。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在理解经验Fisher信息矩阵在两种实际扰动（输入分布偏移和参数低精度量化）下的谱行为，并利用这种谱扰动来设计语言模型的运行时监控指标。
AI.method: 通过Weyl不等式推导方向性特征值扰动界，提出局部曲率单调性假设，给出两个可计算的特征值近似方法，并在12个模型、1,080条轨迹上验证。
AI.result: 证明了量化噪声扰动下最大特征值严格增大（至三阶余项），实证发现4-bit量化模型的监控统计量约为全精度估计值的244倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出将σ_t = λ_max(F_t)/λ_base作为运行时监控统计量，量化结果可解释实证观察，但闭环预测量化膨胀幅度仍为开放问题。

title: Can AI Draw Science? A Benchmark for Evaluating Scientific Figure Generation by Text-to-Image and Multimodal Models
summary: Text-to-image and multimodal generative models are increasingly used to produce scientific figures such as mechanism diagrams, experimental-design schematics, conceptual frameworks, and graphical abstracts. Yet existing image-generation benchmarks (e.g., GenEval, T2I-CompBench, DPG-Bench) evaluate natural images and measure compositionality, object counting, or photorealism. None of them measure what makes a generated scientific figure usable: correct and legible text labels, faithful depiction of entities and their relations, coherent diagrammatic structure, and adherence to disciplinary drawing conventions. We introduce SciDraw-Bench, a benchmark of 32 structured scientific-figure generation tasks spanning eight figure types and ten disciplines, where each task pairs a natural-language prompt with a machine-checkable specification of required labels, relations, components, conventions, and negative constraints. We propose a four-dimensional evaluation protocol: Text Fidelity (OCR-based label recall and character error rate), Semantic Correctness (vision-language-model judging against the specification), Structural Quality, and Convention Adherence, together with a meta-evaluation protocol and a preliminary inter-judge reliability analysis (human-rating validation is ongoing). We evaluate a domain-specific system, SciDraw AI, against representative general-purpose text-to-image models, and outline a code-to-figure baseline as a planned extension. In a pilot over all eight figure types, the domain-specific system substantially outperforms the general-purpose baselines on every dimension and figure type, with the largest gaps on semantic correctness and convention adherence; text fidelity remains the hardest dimension for all systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciDraw-Bench基准，用于评估科学图形生成质量，包含32个任务、8种图形类型和10个学科，并设计了四维评估协议（文本保真度、语义正确性、结构质量、惯例遵循）。实验表明领域专用系统SciDraw AI在各方面均显著优于通用文生图模型。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成基准（如GenEval、T2I-CompBench等）仅评估自然图像，缺乏衡量科学图形可用性的指标（如正确文本标签、实体关系保真度、图表结构连贯性和学科惯例遵循），因此亟需针对科学图形生成的专业评估框架。
AI.method: 构建32个结构化科学图形生成任务（覆盖8种图类型和10个学科），每个任务包含自然语言提示和机器可检查的规范；提出四维评估协议：文本保真度（OCR标签召回和字符错误率）、语义正确性（VLM判断）、结构质量和惯例遵循；进行元评估和人类评分可靠性分析。
AI.result: 领域专用系统SciDraw AI在所有8种图形类型和四个评估维度上显著优于通用文生图基线，语义正确性和惯例遵循差距最大；文本保真度是所有系统面临的最困难维度。
AI.conclusion: 科学图形生成需要专用评估基准和领域适配方法，现有通用模型在文本保真度、语义正确性和惯例遵循方面存在明显不足，未来可扩展代码到图形的基线方法。

title: The Digital Afterlife of Empires: Four Language Models Converge on the Same Imperial Cartography of Writing
comment: Part II of the Kotonoha Series. Companion paper: arXiv:2604.10957 (q-bio.PE). 35 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables. 12,000 API calls across 4 LLM families (Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI, DeepSeek); cross-architecture convergence of typological knowledge biases (Spearman rho = 0.85-0.98, all p < 0.002)
summary: Large language models process the world's writing systems with radical inequality. We constructed the Digital Script Representation Index (DSRI), a seven-axis measure of digital support, and applied it to the 300 writing systems of the Global Script Database (Fukui, 2026). Only 29 scripts (9.7%) are fully supported by contemporary digital infrastructure; among 158 living scripts, 60 (38.0%) lack complete support. Tokenizer efficiency varies by a factor of 31.7 across 45 scripts measured with parallel text. A serial mediation model -- imperial intervention to speaker population to web corpus to tokenizer efficiency -- is consistent with full mediation, with the direct effect of empire indistinguishable from zero (beta = -0.22, p = 0.39) and structural equation model fit indices indistinguishable from saturation at n = 45; the bias-corrected bootstrap CI grazes zero, and we treat the mediation as suggestive rather than confirmatory. Across four independent LLM families (Claude, GPT-4o, Grok, DeepSeek; 12,000 API calls), base-rate-deviation error patterns converge at Spearman rho = 0.85-0.98 (all p < 0.002). 172 script-feature items are answered identically wrong by all four models; over-attribution outnumbers under-recognition 3.9:1, and "used for religion" alone concentrates 43.6% of convergent errors (enrichment 4.1x). With religion excluded as a sensitivity check, the cross-architecture convergence is preserved (mean rho = 0.87 on nine features) and the over-attribution asymmetry persists at 1.77:1 (n = 97, binomial p = 0.008), indicating multi-channeled rather than single-channeled bias. The findings are consistent with an interpretation in which the structural inequalities historical empires inflicted on script communities persist in contemporary language models through the shared training corpus rather than through any individual model's design choices.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了数字脚本表示指数（DSRI），发现全球300种书写系统中仅9.7%获得完全数字支持；通过序列中介模型和跨四个大型语言模型家族的12000次API调用，揭示了历史帝国干预通过共享训练语料库持续影响当代语言模型对文字系统的结构性偏见，其中"用于宗教"这一特征集中了43.6%的收敛性错误。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型对不同书写系统的支持存在极端不平等，但缺乏系统性测量工具和量化分析；作者希望揭示这种不平等的程度、成因以及跨模型的一致性模式。
AI.method: 构建DSRI七轴测量指标，评估300种书写系统；采用串行中介模型（帝国干预→使用人口→网络语料库→分词效率）；对四个LLM家族（Claude、GPT-4o、Grok、DeepSeek）进行12000次API调用，分析172个脚本特征项目的错误模式，并进行敏感性检验（排除宗教特征）。
AI.result: 仅29种文字（9.7%）获得完全数字支持；分词效率差异达31.7倍；中介模型显示帝国干预的直接影响不显著（beta=-0.22, p=0.39），完全中介成立；跨模型错误模式高度收敛（Spearman rho=0.85-0.98）；"用于宗教"特征集中43.6%的收敛性错误，排除后偏见过度归因（1.77:1）和跨架构收敛（rho=0.87）仍持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 历史帝国对文字社区施加的结构性不平等通过共享训练语料库持续影响当代语言模型，而非通过任何单个模型的设计选择；这种偏见是多渠道而非单一渠道的。

title: Comparing Scalar Objective Functions for Multi-Criteria Engineering Optimization
summary: Scalar objective functions are required when a multi-criteria optimization problem must yield a single preferred design rather than only a Pareto set. The choice of scalarization influences which compromise is selected, how preference parameters are interpreted, and whether non-supported Pareto regions can be reached. This paper compares four formulations for normalized bi-criteria minimization: weighted sums, achievement scalarizing functions, desirability functions, and a fuzzy-logic-based formulation. Two analytically defined Pareto fronts, one convex and one concave, isolate the effect of the objective formulation from numerical optimizer behavior. The comparison focuses on reachable Pareto regions, parameter-induced selection density, compensation between criteria, sensitivity, and interpretability. Results show that weighted sums are simple but structurally limited on concave fronts, while achievement, desirability, and fuzzy formulations reach interior non-supported regions through different mechanisms. Desirability functions introduce nonlinear single-criterion preference mappings, whereas fuzzy rules express nonseparable and reference-dependent engineering preferences.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了四种用于双目标最小化问题的标量化方法（加权和、成就标量化函数、期望函数、模糊逻辑公式），分析了它们在凸和凹Pareto前沿上的可达区域、参数诱导选择密度、补偿性、敏感性和可解释性。结果表明加权和在凹前沿上存在结构性限制，而其他三种方法能通过不同机制到达内部非支持区域。
AI.motivation: 当多准则优化问题需要输出单一偏好设计而非完整Pareto集时，标量化函数的选择至关重要。不同的标量化方式会影响折衷方案的选择、偏好参数的解释，以及能否达到非支持的Pareto区域。本文旨在系统比较四种标量化公式在这些方面的表现。
AI.method: 选取两个解析定义的Pareto前沿（一个凸、一个凹），固定数值优化器行为，仅改变目标函数公式。比较四种归一化双目标最小化公式：加权和、成就标量化函数、期望函数、基于模糊逻辑的公式。从可达Pareto区域、参数诱导选择密度、准则间补偿性、敏感性和可解释性五个维度进行对比分析。
AI.result: 加权和公式简单，但在凹前沿上存在结构性限制；成就标量化、期望函数和模糊逻辑公式通过不同机制都能到达内部非支持区域。期望函数引入了非线性的单准则偏好映射，而模糊规则则能表达非可分离和参考依赖的工程偏好。
AI.conclusion: 不同标量化方法各有优劣：加权和简单易用但适用范围受限；成就标量化、期望函数和模糊逻辑公式能处理更复杂的Pareto前沿形状，但各自通过不同机制实现，且对偏好参数的解释和敏感性也不同。实际应用时应根据问题特性选择合适的标量化策略。

title: Generating in the Limit with Infinitely Many Hallucinations
summary: The classic paradigm of language identification in the limit models learning as a game between an adversary, who reveals strings from an unknown target language, and a learner tasked with identifying that language. The recently introduced framework of language generation in the limit shifted the objective to better reflect modern language modeling, requiring the learner to produce valid, unseen strings from the target language. Related work highlighted a fundamental tension: a broad coverage of the target often comes at the cost of validity. We introduce a new notion of precision and recast this problem as the classic recall-precision trade-off. We analyze generation in the limit under varying constraints on enumeration, novelty, and validity, aimed at reflecting settings closer to those encountered by large language models. A key contribution is our analysis of learners that are not eventually valid: we allow infinitely many mistakes, provided their frequency tends to zero so that precision remains one. We show that this relaxation can strictly increase recall when the adversary permanently withholds a large portion of the target language. We also study a continuous relaxation of the novelty constraint that requires only a fixed fraction of outputs to be novel. Taken together, our results move toward a more realistic model of language generation where occasional errors and repetitions are unavoidable, but their rates are controlled.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语言生成极限的新框架，引入精度概念，将问题建模为经典的召回-精度权衡。允许学习者无限次犯错但错误频率趋近于零（精度保持为1），并研究了新颖性的连续松弛约束，在更 realistic 的条件下分析语言生成。
AI.motivation: 经典的语言识别极限范式不适用于现代语言模型。新框架的语言生成极限更贴合实际，但存在覆盖广度与有效性的根本冲突。作者希望引入精度概念，将这一问题形式化为召回-精度权衡，并探索更贴近大语言模型实际场景的约束条件。
AI.method: 提出精度（precision）概念，将语言生成问题重新定义为召回-精度权衡。分析在不同枚举、新颖性和有效性约束下的生成极限。关键在于允许学习者无限次犯错，只要错误频率趋于零（精度保持为1）。同时研究了新颖性约束的连续松弛（仅要求固定比例的输出是新颖的）。
AI.result: 证明当对手永久隐藏目标语言的大部分内容时，放松精度约束（允许无限次犯错但频率趋于零）可以严格提高召回率。新颖性的连续松弛也带来了新的理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文向更 realistic 的语言生成模型迈进，其中偶尔的错误和重复是不可避免的，但它们的速率是可控制的。这为理解大语言模型在实际场景中的行为提供了理论框架。

title: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection
summary:
LLM agents are increasingly improved without weight updates by evolving a natural-language artifact, such as reflections, workflows, playbooks, cheatsheets, or optimized prompts, that conditions a frozen policy. Such methods are typically reported as wins on the single benchmark where they help. We study them apples-to-apples and surface a sharper picture. We introduce RSEA, a Recursive Self-Evolving Agent that carries a compact three-layer natural-language state: an imperative strategy, reusable skills, and a procedural playbook. Across generations, RSEA rewrites all three layers from its own trajectories and commits a candidate only if it does not regress on a disjoint held-out split, using a strict keep-better gate.
  Across four diverse benchmarks, ALFWorld, GAIA, (τ)-bench, and WebShop, and six faithful baselines, ReAct, Reflexion, GEPA, AWM, ACE, and Dynamic Cheatsheet, all evaluated on one shared local backbone, we find three main results. First, no artifact universally wins. RSEA is the strongest single-pass method on ALFWorld, reaching 69.3% compared with 64.6% for ReAct (McNemar (p=0.015)), and reaches 79.4% with retry, the best overall result. However, concrete-workflow induction, represented by AWM, is best on the strong-backbone tool-use tasks. Second, unguarded context evolution is high-variance and unsafe. Dynamic Cheatsheet, which curates context online without a held-out gate, is near-best on ALFWorld at 70.7%, yet collapses on WebShop, with a score of 0.14 compared with 0.43 for ReAct. Third, RSEA's strict held-out selection is what makes recursive self-evolution monotone-safe: it never significantly underperforms the base agent on any benchmark and falls back to vanilla ReAct when evolved context would hurt.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RSEA，一种递归自进化智能体框架，通过三层自然语言状态（策略、技能、剧本）并采用严格保留机制来进化，实验表明该方法在部分基准上最优，但没有任何一种进化方法在所有任务中通用，未经保护的上下文进化存在高风险和不安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体通过自然语言工件（如反思、工作流、提示优化）进行进化，但这些方法通常只在自己擅长的基准上报告成功，缺乏统一公平的比较。本文旨在系统性地、公平地比较不同进化方法，并解决进化过程中的不稳定性和性能退化问题。
AI.method: 提出RSEA框架，维护三层自然语言状态：命令式策略、可复用技能和程序式剧本。每一代通过自身轨迹重写所有三层，并使用严格"保留更好"机制（仅在候选版本在保留测试集上不退化时采纳），确保进化过程的单调安全性。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、GAIA、(τ)-bench、WebShop四个基准上，RSEA在ALFWorld上达到69.3%（优于ReAct的64.6%），结合重试达79.4%最优；但具体工作流归纳方法（AWM）在强骨干工具任务上最优；无保护的Dynamic Cheatsheet在ALFWorld达70.7%但在WebShop崩溃至0.14；RSEA严格保留机制确保不显著低于基础智能体性能。
AI.conclusion: 没有任何单一进化方法在所有任务中普遍最优；未经保护的上下文进化高方差且不安全；RSEA的严格保留选择机制是递归自进化实现单调安全的关键，能在任何基准上退回到基础智能体性能，避免退化风险。

title: Managing the Human Fallback: Skill Investment Under Improving AI and Worker Mobility
summary: When firms deploy autonomous AI, they must decide how much work to leave to the system and how much to keep workers engaged. This decision affects current output and future human capital. We develop a parsimonious two-period model in which AI may outperform the worker when it functions, but may fail with positive probability. A firm chooses worker engagement; engagement lowers current output for below-benchmark workers, but changes future skill through learning and erosion. We distinguish two dimensions of AI progress: capability, the system's output when it works, and reliability, the probability that it works. In a single-firm benchmark, engagement is valuable only as fallback investment. The firm engages the least-skilled workers most, because they have the largest skill gaps and are least costly to bring toward a useful fallback level. With worker mobility, engagement also affects labor-market sorting: workers prefer jobs that build more valuable skill trajectories. This sorting motive targets higher-skill workers near the AI frontier, where skill gains are more valuable and engagement is less costly. Mobility can therefore reverse the engagement pattern, shifting investment from the least-skilled toward the most-skilled workers below the AI benchmark. Mobility also reshapes how AI progress affects engagement: greater capability raises engagement by increasing the value of the skill trajectory a firm offers, whereas greater reliability can raise or lower it because it reduces fallback need while also changing learning opportunities. Under worker mobility, human-AI work design becomes a problem of human-capital investment, in which allocating work today shapes future skill.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个两期模型，研究企业在部署自主AI时如何分配工人参与度，以平衡当前产出与未来人力资本。研究发现，工人参与决策受AI能力与可靠性影响，且在工人可流动时，参与模式会从低技能工人转向高技能工人。
AI.motivation: 企业部署自主AI时面临关键决策：如何分配系统自动完成与工人参与的工作量。这一决策不仅影响当前产出，也影响未来人力资本积累，但目前缺乏对AI进步不同维度（能力与可靠性）如何影响这一决策的系统分析。
AI.method: 构建一个简约的两期模型。AI正常运行时可能优于工人，但存在故障概率。企业选择工人参与度，参与会降低低于基准工人的当前产出，但通过学习和侵蚀改变未来技能。将AI进步区分为能力（正常运行时的输出）和可靠性（正常运行的概率）两个维度。
AI.result: 在单一企业基准中，参与仅作为备用投资，企业最倾向于让技能最低的工人参与。在工人可流动时，参与还会影响劳动力市场分类，高技能工人更偏好能构建更有价值技能轨迹的工作，可能导致参与模式反转——从低技能转向高技能工人。AI能力提升会增加参与，而可靠性提升的影响则不确定。
AI.conclusion: 在工人可流动的条件下，人-AI工作设计本质上是一个人力资本投资问题，工作分配塑造未来技能。AI进步的不同维度对工人参与决策产生差异化影响，企业需根据劳动力市场流动性调整策略。

title: Stabilization without Inclusive Development: Neoliberalism, Economic Liberalization, Poverty, and Inequality in Bolivia
summary: This article reconstructs the economic and social history of Bolivian neoliberalism and evaluates whether economic liberalization reduced or increased poverty and inequality in Bolivia. The historical argument is that the Bolivian neoliberal cycle was not a single event but a layered sequence: hyperinflation and emergency stabilization, the 1985 New Economic Policy, labor displacement and mining restructuring, second-generation reform in the 1990s, capitalization, decentralized state restructuring, commodity dependence, and the social conflicts that culminated in the collapse of the party system. The empirical contribution is to integrate macroeconomic indicators, economic-freedom indices, poverty and inequality series, IMF and financial-reform data, commodity and disaster controls, Bolivian export aggregates, and harmonized historical survey indicators. The preferred design is a heterogeneous instrumental-variables model that instruments domestic liberalization with lagged regional leave-one-out policy diffusion and allows Bolivia to differ from the Latin American average. The central estimate is that a 10-point increase in the Heritage economic-freedom score is associated, for Bolivia, with approximately +4.46 percentage points of poverty at the USD 4.20/day line, +3.61 percentage points at the USD 3/day line, +7.40 percentage points at the USD 8.30/day line, and +3.91 Gini points. These results remain socially regressive in sign after adding export-structure controls to the poverty specifications, although the causal interpretation remains conditional on the exclusion restriction. The article therefore advances a qualified conclusion: Bolivian neoliberalism stabilized hyperinflation, but the historically specific liberalization package appears to have increased social vulnerability and inequality rather than producing inclusive development.

AI.tldr: 本文重构了玻利维亚新自由主义的经济社会史，通过异质性工具变量模型发现：经济自由化虽稳定了恶性通胀，但显著加剧了贫困与不平等（如经济自由指数每升10分，贫困率增加约4.46-7.40个百分点，基尼系数上升3.91点）。
AI.motivation: 评估玻利维亚经济自由化究竟是减少还是加剧了贫困与不平等，填补关于新自由主义改革累积效应的历史与实证空白。
AI.method: 整合宏观经济指标、经济自由指数、贫困与不平等序列等多源数据，采用异质性工具变量模型，以滞后区域留一法政策扩散作为国内自由化的工具变量，并允许玻利维亚偏离拉美平均水平。
AI.result: 经济自由指数每上升10分，玻利维亚贫困率增加4.46（USD 4.20/天线）至7.40（USD 8.30/天线）个百分点，基尼系数上升3.91点；加入出口结构控制后符号仍为恶化。
AI.conclusion: 玻利维亚新自由主义虽成功遏制恶性通胀，但其所史特定的改革组合增加了社会脆弱性与不平等，未能实现包容性发展。

title: Hedging Maturity-Specific Risk in Forward Curve Derivatives under Stochastic Volatility
summary: We study the variance-optimal hedging of European contingent claims written on forwards. We assume that the dynamics of the underlying forward curves follow a Heath--Jarrow--Morton--Musiela stochastic partial differential equation modulated by an infinite-rank stochastic covariance component. The variance-optimal hedge is then given by the Galtchouk--Kunita--Watanabe projection with respect to some covariance-norm quotient generated by the forward curve martingale. We show density of finite-maturity and delivery-window strategies, convergence of spectral finite-rank hedge projections and an exact decomposition of the quadratic hedging error into bucket, rank and residual risk components. In enlarged filtrations, the residual risk is a stochastic-volatility floor for claims loading on non-traded covariance noise. We illustrate the hedging framework in affine stochastic covariance and multiplicative HJMM models, and give a concrete example of the decomposition in a CIR stochastic covariance model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究远期合约上欧式或有债权的方差最优对冲问题，提出了基于Galtchouk-Kunita-Watanabe投影的对冲框架，证明了有限期限和交割窗口策略的稠密性、谱有限秩对冲投影的收敛性，并将二次对冲误差分解为桶、秩和残差风险三部分。在扩展滤子下，残差风险作为非交易协方差噪音的随机波动率下限。最后在仿射随机协方差和乘法HJMM模型中验证了该框架。
AI.motivation: 现有文献对远期曲线动态的对冲研究多局限于有限维或特定模型，缺乏在无限秩随机协方差驱动的HJM-M框架下对方差最优对冲的系统性理论分析，特别是对冲误差的结构化分解和策略收敛性。
AI.method: 将远期曲线动态建模为HJM-M SPDE，引入无限秩随机协方差分量；利用Galtchouk-Kunita-Watanabe投影构造方差最优对冲策略；通过协方差范数商结构进行正交分解；证明谱有限秩近似的收敛性，并利用扩展滤子理论分析残差风险。
AI.result: 1) 证明了有限期限和交割窗口策略在方差最优对冲中的稠密性；2) 建立了谱有限秩对冲投影的收敛性定理；3) 将二次对冲误差精确分解为桶风险、秩风险和残差风险三个正交分量；4) 在扩展滤子中，残差风险成为依赖非交易协方差噪音的随机波动率下限。
AI.conclusion: 本文为无限维远期曲线市场中的方差最优对冲提供了完整的理论框架，误差分解可直观解释对冲效率损失来源。仿射随机协方差和CIR模型实例验证了方法的可操作性，对利率、商品等衍生品风险管理具有重要应用价值。

title: When Summaries Distort Decisions: Information Fidelity in LLM-Compressed Financial Analysis
summary: Financial decision-makers face more information than they can directly inspect, making context compression necessary. Yet when large language models (LLMs) compress financial source material, they can alter the investment judgment supported by the original source. We frame this problem as information fidelity: compression loses fidelity when it changes the decision induced by the source. In agentic systems, such losses may recur across intermediate steps and amplify throughout the decision process. Across financial filings and earnings-call transcripts, we find that LLM-based compression can produce fluent and factually plausible compressed contexts that nevertheless alter downstream decisions. We analyze two diagnostic patterns associated with fidelity loss: decontextualization, where salient evidence is retained but separated from the caveats and contextual qualifiers needed for correct interpretation, and model dependency, where different compressors expose different views of the same source. We then propose Agentic Context Compression, which generates multiple candidate compressions and audits their disagreements against the original source. Our results suggest that financial compression should be evaluated not only by efficiency or factuality, but also by its ability to preserve decision-relevant context.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM在金融领域压缩信息时产生的“信息保真度”问题，提出代理式上下文压缩方法，通过多候选压缩与原始来源审计来提高决策一致性。
AI.motivation: 金融决策者面临信息过载，需要压缩，但LLM压缩可能改变基于原始信息得出的投资判断，这一问题尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 定义信息保真度概念，识别两种导致保真度损失的诊断模式（去情境化、模型依赖性），并提出Agentic Context Compression方法——生成多个候选压缩版本，审计其与原始来源的分歧。
AI.result: 实验发现LLM压缩虽在流畅性和事实准确性上表现良好，但仍会改变下游投资决策；去情境化和模型依赖性是关键失效模式。
AI.conclusion: 金融领域的上下文压缩不应仅以效率和事实性为评估标准，还需关注其保留决策相关上下文的能力。

title: Hidden Dependence and Aggregate Tail Risk
summary: We study risk aggregation problems for arbitrary non-decreasing aggregation functions and tail risk measures under dependence uncertainty in a distributionally robust setting. To this end, we introduce the notion of hidden dependence for random vectors, which is built on the concepts of risk concentration and common tail events developed in Wang and Zitikis (2020). We show that, starting from a tail event $A$ of the aggregate loss for an arbitrary random vector $Y$, one can construct a random vector with hidden dependence that dominates $Y$ on the tail event $A$. We then focus on the case in which model uncertainty is described by small perturbations of the distribution of a random vector with respect to a suitable probability distance without changing the marginals. We show that these perturbations of the reference distribution are compatible with hidden dependence and thus lead to the same worst-case risk bounds as in the unconstrained case for arbitrary $γ$-tail risk measures with a suitable level $γ$. Finally, we apply our results in a credit risk context and quantify the potential underestimation of portfolio risk arising from uncertainty in the dependence structure. In particular, we show that even small deviations from a reference Gaussian dependence model can, in principle, justify dramatic increases in capital requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在分布鲁棒框架下，任意非递减聚合函数和尾部风险度量在依赖不确定性下的风险聚合问题，提出了"隐藏依赖"概念，并证明即使是对参考高斯依赖模型的微小偏离，也可能导致资本要求的急剧增加。
AI.motivation: 在风险聚合中，依赖结构的不确定性可能导致对尾部风险的严重低估，因此需要一种鲁棒的方法来量化这种不确定性对风险度量的影响。
AI.method: 提出"隐藏依赖"概念（基于风险集中和共同尾部事件），证明可从任意随机向量的尾部事件构造具有隐藏依赖的随机向量；随后在概率距离的小扰动下证明这些扰动与隐藏依赖兼容，从而导出无约束情况下的最坏情况风险界。
AI.result: 对于任意γ-尾部风险度量，在合适的水平γ下，依赖结构的小扰动可导致与无约束情况相同的最坏情况风险界；在信用风险应用中，即使对高斯依赖模型的微小偏离，也可能显著增加资本要求。
AI.conclusion: 依赖结构的不确定性对尾部风险度量具有重大影响，风险管理者在资本配置中必须考虑这种依赖性不确定性带来的潜在风险低估。

title: Resilient Control Lyapunov Function-based Quadratic Program for Quadrotors Under Cyberattacks
summary: Ensuring the operational safety of quadrotors under partial actuator failures, lumped external disturbances, and malicious cyberattacks is a critical challenge due to the system's underactuated and highly nonlinear nature. Building on the existing result of a fault-tolerant control approach for a quadrotor experiencing a complete loss of two opposing rotors \cite{chen2024quadrotor}, this letter further addresses the additional challenge of malicious cyberattacks, which could be unknown and unbounded. While the baseline control law, rooted in proportional-derivative (PD) feedback and observer-based decoupling, effectively handles mismatched disturbances, it remains vulnerable to maliciously injected cyberattacks on the pseudo-control channels. To address this, a Resilient Control Lyapunov Function-based Quadratic Program (RCLF-QP) is developed, where a resilient compensational term with real-time online adaptation is designed in the conventional CLF to compensate for the maliciously injected unknown and unbounded attacks. Compared with the PD feedback control, the proposed QP-based constrained optimization control framework provides a systematic and extensible framework that allows new control objectives and constraints to be seamlessly integrated without altering the underlying stability guarantees. The overall proposed controller integrates a model-based extended state observer with the proposed RCLF-QP mechanism to mitigate both lumped disturbances caused by aerodynamics and strong wind, and adversarial cyberattacks injected by malicious adversaries. Simulations in a high-fidelity environment demonstrate that the proposed RCLF-QP control architecture prevents trajectory divergence and system instability in scenarios where the baseline controller fails in maintaining the stability of Quadrotors under malicious attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对四旋翼飞行器在部分执行器故障、外部干扰及恶意网络攻击下的安全问题，基于故障容错控制方法，提出了一种**弹性控制李雅普诺夫函数-二次规划（RCLF-QP）框架**，通过在线自适应补偿项应对未知且有界的网络攻击，结合扩展状态观测器抑制集总干扰，在高保真仿真中验证了该框架相比基线PD控制能有效防止轨迹发散和系统失稳。
AI.motivation: 四旋翼系统具有欠驱动、高度非线性的特点，在部分执行器故障、未知外部扰动及恶意网络攻击（可能未知且无界）的综合作用下，保证运行安全极具挑战性。现有的故障容错控制方法（如基于PD反馈和观测器解耦的基线控制）虽能处理非匹配扰动，但无法抵御恶意注入到伪控制通道的网络攻击，亟需一种具有系统性和可扩展性的弹性控制框架。
AI.method: 提出**RCLF-QP**方法：在传统控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）中引入具有**实时在线自适应**能力的弹性补偿项，以补偿未知且无界的恶意攻击；采用基于QP的约束优化控制框架，可无缝集成新的控制目标和约束而不破坏稳定性保证；同时结合**模型基扩展状态观测器**，共同抑制空气动力学、强风等集总干扰及对抗性网络攻击。
AI.result: 在高保真仿真环境中，所提出的RCLF-QP控制架构在基线控制器（PD反馈+观测器解耦）无法维持稳定的恶意攻击场景下，成功防止了轨迹发散和系统失稳。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的RCLF-QP框架不仅有效解决了四旋翼在多重威胁下的弹性控制问题，还提供了一个系统性、可扩展的优化控制范式，为未来整合更多控制目标和约束奠定了理论基础。

title: Adaptive Iterative Hard Thresholding for Online High-dimensional Quantile Regression
summary: Online high-dimensional regression requires algorithms that can update sequentially while preserving structural sparsity. We propose \textit{Adaptive Iterative Hard Thresholding (AIHT)}, an online sparse-regression framework that alternates stochastic subgradient updates with adaptively scheduled hard-thresholding steps. The key idea is to separate support discovery from local refinement: early in the learning process, AIHT delays thresholding so that weak but informative coordinates have time to accumulate signal, while later it increases the projection frequency to stabilize the sparse estimator and exploit local curvature. We develop the theory for high-dimensional online quantile regression, a challenging setting in which the loss is nonsmooth and the data may exhibit heterogeneity or heavy-tailed noise. Under restricted curvature and gradient-leakage conditions, AIHT remains in an inflated sparse cone, exhibits a two-phase convergence behavior, and attains logarithmic regret for the sliding-window objective. Simulations for online quantile regression, together with threshold-scheduling ablations, support the proposed mechanism and illustrate its advantage over standard online sparse-learning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应迭代硬阈值方法（AIHT），一种在线高维稀疏回归框架，通过自适应调整硬阈值投影频率，实现结构稀疏性的在线学习，在高维在线分位数回归中展现两阶段收敛特性和对数遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 在线高维回归需要能够顺序更新同时保持结构稀疏性的算法，而现有方法在非光滑损失、异质性数据或重尾噪声场景下表现不佳，亟需一种能动态平衡支持发现与局部精化的在线稀疏学习框架。
AI.method: AIHT交替执行随机次梯度更新和自适应调度的硬阈值投影：早期延迟阈值操作以便弱信号累积信息，后期增加投影频率以稳定稀疏估计并利用局部曲率。理论分析基于限制性曲率和梯度泄漏条件。
AI.result: AIHT在膨胀稀疏锥内保持稳定，呈现两阶段收敛行为，在滑动窗口目标上实现对数遗憾界。仿真实验（在线分位数回归及阈值调度消融）验证了机制有效性，优于标准在线稀疏学习基线。
AI.conclusion: AIHT通过自适应阈值调度机制有效解决了在线高维稀疏回归中支持发现与局部精化的权衡问题，尤其在非光滑损失和重尾噪声场景下具有理论和实践优势。

title: On the Necessity of a Liquid Substrate for Mesh Intelligence
summary: A mesh of sovereign agents has no center: no shared clock, no shared model, and no coordinator to gather data or retrain. Its competence rests on each agent folding the projections its peers emit into a single internal state, online, from observations that arrive at irregular, unscheduled times, on a substrate whose weights it cannot retrain. Any one of these constraints is tractable on its own; folding optimally under all three at once is not. We ask what such a substrate must be, and prove two necessary conditions from one model of a self-evolving latent observed at irregular, exogenous times. Because the latent changes, its optimal estimator is time-varying: an adaptive timescale is necessary, and every fixed-gain filter is strictly suboptimal. And because arrivals are clock-free, the optimal estimate depends on the elapsed gap between them, which no gap-blind network recovers at any width or depth. This second condition is capacity-independent: scale cannot substitute for the missing dependence. The two conditions intersect in the continuous-time liquid class. An LSTM satisfies the first, a fixed continuous-time filter the second, and a multi-timescale liquid network both. Synthetic experiments confirm each: the network attains the timescale, and the separation is computed exactly. The characterization is necessary, not sufficient, and binds fixed-weight substrates: a network free to retrain reaches the class by other means. Proved per agent, the necessity binds every agent of a mesh, a structural condition on mesh intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，在无中心、无共享时钟、无协调器的网格智能体中，每个智能体必须使用连续时间液态网络（multi-timescale liquid network）才能在不重训练权重的前提下，从不规则到达的观测中在线最优地折叠其他智能体的投影。任何固定增益滤波器都是次优的，任何忽视时间间隔的网络无论多宽多深都无法恢复最优估计。LSTM满足第一个条件（自适应时标），固定连续时间滤波器满足第二个条件（依赖时间间隔），而多时标液态网络同时满足两者。
AI.motivation: 探索在完全去中心化的智能体网格中，每个智能体如何在不能重训练权重、没有共享时钟、没有协调器的条件下，从不规则、非同步到达的观测中在线融合其他智能体的信息，并找出这种基板必须满足的结构条件。
AI.method: 从一个自演化的潜在状态在非规则外生时间点被观测的模型出发，证明两个必要条件：(1) 最优估计器必须是时变的，自适应时标必要，固定增益滤波器严格次优；(2) 最优估计依赖于观测间的时间间隔，任何忽视间隔的网络（无论宽度或深度）都无法恢复该依赖。通过合成实验验证LSTM、固定连续时间滤波器和多时标液态网络的表现。
AI.result: LSTM满足自适应时标条件，固定连续时间滤波器满足时间间隔依赖条件，多时标液态网络同时满足两者。合成实验确认了理论结果：网络确实达到了所需的时标适应性，且分离被精确计算。该条件是必要的而非充分的，且绑定固定权重基板（可重训练的网络可通过其他方式达到该类别）。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化网格智能体的每个智能体都必须具备连续时间液态网络的结构特性，这是实现最优在线信息融合的必要条件。该结论是结构性的，适用于网格中的每一个智能体。

title: "AI Watermarking": Bridging Policy Discourse and Technical Capabilities
summary: The widespread deployment of generative artificial intelligence (AI) models has raised serious concerns about the proliferation of AI-generated content. This has led to a surge of interest in, and demand for, reliable tracking and detection mechanisms for content that is AI-generated, such as watermarking, metadata tagging, content tagging, and more. The problem has captured the attention of policymakers as well as the popular media, and a spate of recent bills in the US have sought to regulate the spread of AI content, and enforce or promote methods to track and label it. This work performs a critical analysis of the policy discourse surrounding generative AI content transparency in the US and EU. Through a broad document selection methodology, we first collect a broad corpus of documents containing legislative language and policy-relevant discourse on the topic. We then analyze these through inductive coding, and leverage our coding to systematize these documents, identifying key patterns, gaps, and open questions. We identify critical points of disconnect between policy and technological capabilities and practice, and we highlight and discuss potential ambiguities and pitfalls raised by the trends in our corpus.

AI.tldr: 本文对美国与欧盟在生成式AI内容透明度方面的政策话语进行了批判性分析，通过归纳编码系统化梳理政策文件，识别政策与技术能力之间的关键脱节、模糊性和潜在陷阱。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的广泛部署引发了对AI生成内容追踪和检测机制的需求激增，政策制定者和媒体高度关注此问题，美国近期出台了多项相关法案。作者旨在批判性分析政策话语，找出政策与技术实践之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 采用广泛文档选择方法论收集包含立法语言和政策相关话语的语料库，通过归纳编码（inductive coding）对文档进行系统化分析，识别关键模式、空白和开放性问题。
AI.result: 识别出政策与技术能力和实践之间的关键脱节点，揭示了政策话语中存在的潜在模糊性和陷阱。
AI.conclusion: 政策制定需要更紧密地结合技术现实，当前政策话语中存在重要缺口和模糊地带，需要进一步关注和解决。

title: A New Noise Model for Data-driven Control: Generalized Frobenius Norm Bounds
summary: In this article, we introduce a new noise model for data-driven control. The model can be interpreted as a generalization of a Frobenius norm bound on the matrix of noise samples. For instantaneously bounded noise, the proposed model provides a less conservative overapproximation than an existing noise model based on a quadratic matrix inequality (QMI). Using the new model, we derive necessary and sufficient conditions for data-driven control. The framework covers a broad class of design problems, including quadratic stabilization, $\mathcal{H}_2$ control and $\mathcal{H}_{\infty}$ control, and is further extended to cover data-driven analysis problems, ranging for stabilizability to dissipativity. A key technical contribution is a new type of S-lemma that offers necessary and sufficient conditions under which a quadratic matrix inequality is implied by a quadratic inequality in vectorized variables.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的数据驱动控制噪声模型，该模型推广了Frobenius范数界，相较于基于二次矩阵不等式（QMI）的现有模型，对瞬时有界噪声提供更不保守的过度近似，并基于此推导出数据驱动控制的充要条件，涵盖二次镇定、H2和H∞控制及可镇定性和耗散性分析问题，关键技术贡献是一种新的S引理。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动控制中的噪声模型（如基于QMI的模型）在处理瞬时有界噪声时过于保守，需要一种更精确、更少保守性的噪声建模方法以提高数据驱动控制的性能。
AI.method: 提出一种新的噪声模型（Frobenius范数界的推广形式），基于此模型推导数据驱动控制的充要条件，并开发一种新型S引理技术用于处理二次矩阵不等式与向量化变量二次不等式之间的蕴含关系。
AI.result: 新模型在瞬时有界噪声下比QMI模型更不保守；基于新模型成功推导出数据驱动控制的充要条件；新S引理能够给出充要条件以判断二次矩阵不等式是否被向量化变量的二次不等式所蕴含。
AI.conclusion: 提出的噪声模型和S引理为数据驱动控制提供了一套更通用、更少保守性的理论框架，可广泛应用于各种控制设计和分析问题。

title: Extracting Knowledge from an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Information Extraction
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables, Conference version,CITALA 2014: 5th International Conference on Arabic Language Processing,Oujda, Morocco, 26-27 November 2014. Paper listed in archived accepted papers: https://web.archive.org/web/20150205160611/http://citala.org/acceptedpapers.php Original conference site defunct: http://citala.org No proceedings PDF is publicly available
summary: Natural language processing (NLP) applications need large and rich amount of linguistic knowledge. Furthermore, electronic language sources such as dictionaries, encyclopedia, and corpora became available. So, automatic methods are emerged to extract lexical information from those sources to overcome the knowledge acquisition bottleneck. We presented a method to automatically extract lexical information from a machine-readable version of the Arabic-English Al-Mawrid dictionary. We used n-gram analysis and key-word-in-context (KWIC) analysis to discover lexical patterns that manifest morphologic, syntactic, or semantic information. Then, we used hand-crafted rule-based information extraction to extract that information. Furthermore, we used punctuation marks and some heuristics to extract a set of synonyms in a subentry. This study registered high precision for all types of information, high recall for synonyms, and low recall for the other information. The study also showed that the Al-Mawrid has significant amount of derivations (morphologic information) and synonyms, domain labels, and hyponym/hypernym relations (semantic information).

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种从阿拉伯语-英语Al-Mawrid电子词典中自动提取词汇信息的方法，利用n-gram分析、KWIC分析和手工规则的信息抽取，成功提取了词法、句法和语义信息，在同步词识别上取得了高召回率，但在其他信息类型上召回率较低。
AI.motivation: NLP应用需要大量语言知识，但知识获取存在瓶颈。电子语言资源（词典、百科全书、语料库）的可用性催生了自动提取词汇信息的方法需求。
AI.method: 使用n-gram分析和关键词上下文（KWIC）分析发现词汇模式；采用手工编写的基于规则的信息抽取方法提取形态、句法和语义信息；利用标点符号和启发式规则抽取子条目中的同义词集。
AI.result: 所有信息类型均获得高精确率；同义词抽取获得高召回率，但其他信息类型召回率较低；Al-Mawrid词典包含大量派生词（形态信息）、同义词、领域标签和上下位关系（语义信息）。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明从机器可读词典中自动提取词汇信息是可行的，尤其在同义词提取方面效果显著，但其他类型信息的完整提取仍有待改进。

title: Data and Evaluation Closed-Loop for Model Capability Enhancement
summary: Model capability is the central variable in LLM pre-training, yet is never observed directly: data shapes it prospectively, while evaluation reveals it only retrospectively, compressing samples, prompts, decoding, and scoring rules into one noisy score. Practical optimization runs this backward: a failure is observed first, and the engineer must infer the corpus fix. The two sides speak incompatible vocabularies -- benchmark names and per-sample correctness versus data sources, domains, and quality labels -- so this inference is usually intuition, not method. We close this gap with the \emph{capability slice}: a group of evaluation samples sharing background condition, task type, solving operation, and output constraint -- precise enough to localize a single weakness yet stable enough to survive aggregation, unlike a benchmark name, too coarse, or a single sample, too noisy. Built around this unit, an evaluation taxonomy, a non-instruction data taxonomy, and mapping rules form a closed loop turning a benchmark-level failure into a targeted, testable data intervention. We test this loop on two case studies pulling in opposite directions. First, the loop rules the data out: continued pre-training drives BBH down by $-46.82\%$, but diagnosis traces this to a single masked \texttt{\textless EOS\textgreater} loss rather than weakened reasoning; restoring it recovers BBH to $66.44$, above the original checkpoint, without changing the data. Second, the loop rules the data in: a persistent math-reasoning weakness is decomposed by solving operation into specific failing combinations, and a weakness-targeted sampling procedure built from it lifts AIME2025/AIME2026 Pass@128 from $6.67$/$0.00$ to $26.67$ each. The same unmodified loop reaches opposite, correct verdicts in both cases, showing the evaluation-to-data inference can be routine, auditable, and experimentally validated rather than intuitive.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“能力切片”（capability slice）概念，构建了一个从基准测试失效到数据干预的可闭环分析框架，并通过两个案例验证其有效性：一个案例定位并修复了预训练导致BBH下降的非推理原因，另一个案例通过针对性采样显著提升了数学推理能力。
AI.motivation: 大模型预训练中，模型能力是核心变量但不可直接观测；评估只能给出噪声分数，工程师难以从基准测试失败逆向推断数据修复方向。现有词汇体系不兼容（基准名/样本正确性 vs. 数据源/领域/质量标签），导致修复依赖直觉而非方法。
AI.method: 提出“能力切片”作为核心分析单元，它是一组共享背景条件、任务类型、求解操作和输出约束的评估样本。基于此构建：评估分类体系、非指令数据分类体系、映射规则，形成从基准失效到数据干预的闭环。
AI.result: 两个案例：1）持续预训练导致BBH下降46.82%，诊断发现是<EOS>掩码损失问题而非推理能力下降，恢复后BBH提升至66.44；2）数学推理薄弱通过求解操作分解为特定失败组合，针对性采样使AIME2025/2026 Pass@128从6.67/0.00提升至26.67。
AI.conclusion: 该闭环框架在两个方向相反的案例中均给出正确的判断，表明评估到数据的推断可以做到常规化、可审计、可实验验证，而非依赖直觉。

title: Not-quite-human tastes: the stylized omnivorousness of LLM survey surrogates
summary: Large-language models have proven to be remarkable if inconsistent parrots of public attitudes and opinions. The extent to which LLMs are able to produce reasonable approximations of cultural taste remains an open empirical question that becomes more urgent by the day, with market research companies already offering provisional `synthetic' survey panels and the contamination of standard survey data from LLM-generated responses. In this study, we build on past work on silicon sampling by extending considerations of its algorithmic fidelity and alignment to the domain of cultural consumption. We use large-language models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek to each produce 277,470 (30x9249) silicon surrogates of survey respondents from the Survey of Public Participation in the Arts (SPPA). We find these silicon surrogates' tastes to be highly stylized facsimiles of human tastes. (1) Silicon samples have a systematic postive-bias for liking, resulting in inflated ecological estimates of tastes. The individual-level bias of silicon samples are not well-explained by the WEIRD-bias often discussed in the literature. (2) The complex relationality in real taste structures is completely lost among silicon samples. (3) Finally, very little of the known cultural alignment between tastes and social space are preserved. Silicon samples attenuate age-taste associations, resurrect anachronistic class-taste associations, caricaturize gender- and race-taste associations.

AI.tldr: 本研究使用OpenAI、Anthropic、DeepSeek的大模型生成277,470个硅基替代样本，发现这些样本在文化消费偏好上存在系统性正向偏差、失去真实品味的复杂关系性，且扭曲了品味与社会空间之间的已知关联。
AI.motivation: 随着市场研究公司开始提供“合成”调查面板，以及LLM生成的回答污染标准调查数据，评估LLM能否合理近似人类文化品味成为一个紧迫的实证问题。
AI.method: 使用OpenAI、Anthropic、DeepSeek的大语言模型，对美国艺术参与调查（SPPA）的9,249名受访者各生成30个硅基替代样本，共计277,470个样本，然后比较硅基样本与人类样本在文化消费品味上的差异。
AI.result: (1)硅基样本存在系统性正向偏好，高估喜欢程度，且不能被WEIRD偏差解释；(2)硅基样本完全丢失了真实品味结构的复杂关系性；(3)硅基样本扭曲了品味与社会空间的关联：弱化年龄-品味关联、复活过时的阶级-品味关联、夸张化性别和种族-品味关联。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM生成的硅基样本无法忠实再现人类文化品味，其作为调查替代品的可靠性存疑，尤其是在捕捉品味的社会结构和文化消费的复杂关系方面存在严重缺陷。

title: Why Do We Need Travel Behavior Theory in the Age of AI? Multiple Goal Pursuit as an Illustrative Theory
summary: Travel behavior and demand modeling seeks to understand the factors that motivate transportation decisions. At the same time, the field is increasingly adopting algorithmic and artificial intelligence (AI) tools that improve predictive accuracy, often at the cost of a grounding in hypothesis-based theory validation and behavioural explanation. In this discussion paper, we use goal pursuit theory (GPT) to illustrate why behavioral theory is a necessary complement to prediction in travel behavior research. Unlike random utility maximization (RUM) or close alternatives (e.g., random regret minimization (RRM)), GPT explicitly models how travelers (1) activate context-dependent goals (hedonic, gain, normative), (2) resolve conflicts between competing objectives, and (3) make sequential decisions across temporal scales. We demonstrate GPT's merits through three transport applications: activity scheduling (handling hierarchical goal structures), vehicle ownership (disentangling bundled mobility goals), and location choice (capturing latent goal interactions via matrix factorization). We provide actionable guidance for implementation, including: (a) hybrid choice model specifications linking goals to observable behaviors, (b) parallels to complementary behavioral theories from the transportation field, and (c) data requirements and comparative benchmarks against RUM/RRM models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出目标追求理论（GPT）作为传统随机效用最大化（RUM）和随机遗憾最小化（RRM）模型的补充，用于解释出行行为中的目标驱动决策过程，并通过活动调度、车辆拥有和位置选择三个应用案例展示了其优势。
AI.motivation: 出行行为建模日益依赖AI和算法工具提升预测精度，但往往牺牲了基于假设的理论验证和行为解释能力。本文旨在说明行为理论（特别是GPT）是预测研究中不可或缺的补充。
AI.method: 本文采用讨论性论文形式，引入目标追求理论（GPT），该理论显式建模出行者如何（1）激活情境依赖目标（享乐、获益、规范），（2）解决竞争目标间的冲突，（3）跨时间尺度做出序贯决策。并通过三个交通应用案例进行论证。
AI.result: 在活动调度、车辆拥有和位置选择三个应用中，GPT能够处理层级目标结构、解耦捆绑出行目标、以及通过矩阵分解捕捉潜在目标交互，展示了优于传统RUM/RRM模型的解释能力。
AI.conclusion: 提供了实施GPT的 actionable guidance，包括混合选择模型规范、与现有行为理论的联系、数据需求及与传统基准模型的比较方法，强调行为理论在提升预测可解释性的核心价值。

title: The Fundamental Theorem of Asset Pricing, Formalized in Lean 4
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Formalized in Lean 4 over Mathlib; companion to the formal-mathfin library (arXiv:2606.01356)
summary: The Fundamental Theorem of Asset Pricing states that a market is free of arbitrage exactly when it admits an equivalent martingale measure. We formalize it in Lean 4 over Mathlib in three settings: a finite-state market over a finite horizon (Harrison-Pliska), a one-period market on an arbitrary probability space with a single scalar return (Follmer-Schied), and a one-period market with finitely many assets. The finite case is the geometry of a separating hyperplane; the scalar one-period case is an elementary change of measure. In the $d$-asset case the equivalent martingale measure is constructed explicitly, as the minimiser of the smooth convex potential $\mathbb{E}[\log(1+e^{\langleθ,Y\rangle})]$: absence of arbitrage is precisely coercivity of the potential, its first-order condition is the martingale property, and the minimiser's logistic weight is the density of the measure. The construction uses no Hahn-Banach theorem, no $L^0$-closedness argument, no measurable selection, and no non-redundancy hypothesis. To our knowledge this is the first machine-checked Fundamental Theorem of Asset Pricing in any proof assistant. The boundary is explicit: the general multi-period Dalang-Morton-Willinger theorem lies outside the development. Every theorem is sorry-free, each headline result's axioms are pinned to Mathlib's classical defaults by a build-enforced gate, and the whole is reproducible from a pinned toolchain.

AI.tldr: 本文在Lean 4/Mathlib中形式化证明了资产定价基本定理的三种情形：有限状态有限时间（Harrison-Pliska）、单周期任意概率空间单资产（Follmer-Schied）、以及单周期有限资产。特别地，对d资产情形给出了无需Hahn-Banach定理的显式构造（通过最小化logistic势能），是首个机器验证的资产定价基本定理。
AI.motivation: 将金融数学核心定理——资产定价基本定理——在证明助手中形式化验证，填补该领域机器验证的空白。
AI.method: 1) 有限情形：利用分离超平面几何；2) 标量单周期：基本测度变换；3) d资产情形：最小化凸势能函数𝔼[log(1+e^{⟨θ,Y⟩})]，其梯度条件给出鞅性质，logistic权重作为等价鞅测度的密度。全程无需Hahn-Banach定理、L⁰闭包论证、可测选择或非冗余假设。
AI.result: 在Lean 4中成功形式化了三个设定下的资产定价基本定理，所有定理均无sorry，构建可复现，为首个机器验证的资产定价基本定理。但广义多期Dalang-Morton-Willinger定理不在本文范围内。
AI.conclusion: 形式化验证了无套利等价于存在等价鞅测度在三个重要设定下的成立，展示了用优化方法绕过经典泛函分析工具构造等价鞅测度的新途径，为金融数学机械化奠定了基础。

title: Strategic Risk Reduction: Self-Protection and Self-Insurance
summary: This paper studies how a risk holder should combine self-protection and self-insurance when market insurance is absent. In a Bernoulli loss model, self-protection reduces the residual loss probability, while self-insurance reduces the residual loss severity. The risk holder evaluates residual risk using either Value-at-Risk or Tail Value-at-Risk and incurs a joint risk-reduction cost that allows technological interaction between the two activities. We show that Value-at-Risk leads to a threshold-driven solution that the optimal strategy is either no risk reduction, pure self-protection, or pure self-insurance. By contrast, Tail Value-at-Risk creates a direct interaction between residual frequency and residual severity, making the problem non-convex even in the Bernoulli setting. We solve it using an isoquant geometry method based on the marginal-balance curves for self-protection and self-insurance. The analysis identifies when optimal strategies lie on boundaries, extreme constrained candidates, touching components, or crossing components, and shows how the confidence level and the cost technology determine whether self-protection and self-insurance behave as substitutes or complements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了当市场保险缺失时，风险持有者如何结合自我保护（降低损失概率）和自我保险（降低损失严重程度）。在伯努利损失模型下，分别使用VaR和TVaR评估风险，发现VaR导致阈值驱动的极端策略（要么不做、纯自我保护或纯自我保险），而TVaR由于残差频率与严重程度的直接交互产生非凸问题，论文通过等产量线几何方法求解，识别了最优策略的边界、极端约束候选、相切或交叉成分，并分析了置信水平和成本技术如何决定两种活动的替代或互补关系。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏市场保险的现实情境中，风险持有者只能依靠自我保护（降低损失概率）和自我保险（降低损失严重程度）来管理风险。现有文献对这两者的组合策略研究不足，尤其是在不同风险度量标准（VaR与TVaR）下的最优决策差异，以及成本技术交互作用的影响尚不清晰。
AI.method: 采用伯努利损失模型，分别以VaR和TVaR作为风险度量标准，构建联合风险降低成本函数（允许技术交互）。对于VaR问题，通过阈值分析求解；对于TVaR导致的非凸问题，提出等产量线几何方法，基于自我保护与自我保险的边际平衡曲线进行分析。
AI.result: VaR下最优策略为极端解：要么无风险降低、纯自我保护或纯自我保险。TVaR下最优策略可能落在边界、极端约束候选、相切成分或交叉成分上；置信水平和成本技术特征决定两种活动是替代还是互补关系。
AI.conclusion: 风险度量标准的选择对最优风险降低策略有根本性影响：VaR导致非此即彼的极端策略，而TVaR允许更丰富的组合策略。研究为风险管理者在缺乏保险市场时如何合理配置风险降低资源提供了理论指导。

title: Reachability Guarantees for Cart-Pole Swing-Up and Stabilization
summary: The cart-pole swing-up is a canonical benchmark for nonlinear control of underactuated systems, yet an end-to-end guarantee linking the global swing-up maneuver to the local stabilizer is seldom formalized. We present a reachability analysis of a switched energy-based/LQR controller that certifies convergence to the upright equilibrium from a compact set of initial conditions. The swing-up law is derived from an energy-error Lyapunov function; canceling the autonomous conservative term yields a strictly sign-definite Lyapunov derivative, and convergence follows from LaSalle's invariance principle. We also propose an augmented Lyapunov function to regulate the steady-state cart velocity to zero, for which we establish almost-global convergence. For the controller handoff, a switching region is designed to lie strictly within the LQR region of attraction, formally certifying the swing-up-to-stabilization transition. Numerical simulations corroborate the theoretical analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文对基于能量/LQR切换控制的倒立摆起摆问题进行了可达性分析，严格证明了从紧致初始条件集到竖直平衡点的收敛性，并设计了保证切换稳定性的区域。
AI.motivation: 倒立摆起摆是欠驱动系统非线性控制的经典基准问题，但现有工作很少严格形式化地证明全局起摆操作与局部稳定器之间的端到端收敛保证。
AI.method: 基于能量误差Lyapunov函数推导起摆律，通过抵消保守自治项得到严格定号Lyapunov导数，利用LaSalle不变性原理证明收敛；提出增广Lyapunov函数调节稳态小车速度至零；设计切换区域严格位于LQR吸引域内，形式化认证起摆到稳定的过渡。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了理论分析的正确性，证明了所提切换控制策略能从紧致初始条件集收敛到竖直平衡点，且实现了几乎全局收敛的小车速度调节。
AI.conclusion: 本文为倒立摆起摆问题提供了首个形式化的端到端收敛保证，将全局起摆与局部稳定器通过可达性分析严格衔接，具有重要的理论价值和工程参考意义。

title: Variance Reduction for Stochastic Gradient Generalized Non-reversible Langevin Monte Carlo Algorithms
summary: We study the leading-order fluctuation of stochastic gradient Euler-Maruyama estimators for generalized non-reversible Langevin dynamics. Under structural assumptions tailored to the small-stepsize central limit theorem and under an unbiased stochastic gradient oracle, we prove that the empirical average over a horizon of order the inverse squared stepsize satisfies a central limit theorem in the vanishing-stepsize regime. The limiting variance is characterized through the Poisson equation of the limiting full-gradient diffusion. We then rewrite this constant in an operator form that links it to the continuous-time asymptotic variance and, under standard operator-theoretic assumptions, derive a sufficient condition under which an anti-symmetric perturbation strictly reduces the leading-order fluctuation constant relative to the reversible baseline. We also identify bounded smooth predictive observables that re directly covered by the main theorem. As a separate Gaussian calculation beyond the bounded-test-function regime, we obtain closed-form formulas for quadratic Hamiltonians and linear observables. The framework covers non-reversible Langevin dynamics and augmented-state examples including Hessian-free high-resolution dynamics and a positive-definite subclass of gradient-adjusted underdamped Langevin dynamics that allow stochastic gradients. Numerical experiments on basic examples and Bayesian linear regression using synthetic data, and Bayesian logistic regression using real data support the predicted Gaussian fluctuations and show that the non-reversible schemes consistently reduce the root mean squared error (RMSE) relative to their reversible baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非可逆 Langevin 动力学随机梯度 Euler-Maruyama 估计量的主导阶波动，证明了在步长趋于零时，经验平均满足中心极限定理，并给出了非可逆扰动严格降低波动常数的充分条件。
AI.motivation: 探究非可逆 Langevin 动力学中随机梯度估计量的波动行为，并验证非可逆扰动能否在理论上保证降低估计方差。
AI.method: 基于小步长中心极限定理的结构假设和无偏随机梯度预言机，证明零步长极限下的 CLT；通过 Poisson 方程刻画极限方差，并利用算子和连续时间渐近方差建立联系；推导非可逆扰动降低波动常数的充分条件。
AI.result: 非可逆扰动在满足算子理论假设下能严格降低主导阶波动常数；对二次 Hamilton 量和线性可观测值得到了闭式公式；数值实验（含贝叶斯回归）验证了理论预测，非可逆方案一致降低 RMSE。
AI.conclusion: 非可逆 Langevin 动力学结合随机梯度可在步长趋于零极限下获得更优的估计精度，为实际算法设计提供了理论依据。

title: Position: RL Researchers Need to Distinguish Between Solving Simulators and Using Simulators as a Proxy
comment: This work has been accepted at the ICML 2026 position paper track. The peer reviewed reference is provided in the public OpenReview page at https://openreview.net/forum?id=KIobEIpCkp Additionally the publication can be seen at this link : https://icml.cc/virtual/2026/poster/67184
summary: One goal in reinforcement learning (RL) research is to understand general-purpose sequential decision-making, using benchmark simulators as a proxy for learning in deployment settings. When running experiments, however, the goal of achieving high performance in the simulator can mutate into focusing exclusively on solving the simulator. To achieve high scores, researchers may adopt solutions exclusively meant for solving simulators, rather than learning while the agent is deployed outside a simulator. Solving simulators is also worthy of investigation, but it is a fundamentally different RL research question. In this paper, we argue that RL researchers need to distinguish between two use cases of simulators: solving simulators and using simulators as a proxy for learning in deployment. We first discuss how these two use-cases are importantly different, in terms of constraints on how the agent can use the simulator, which algorithms are appropriate, and which evaluation metrics are appropriate. We then highlight several issues and misleading conclusions that can occur by not making the distinction between these two settings clear, supported with examples and simple experiments. This work is a call to the community to begin clearly distinguishing how they are using simulators in their work, hopefully sparking further discussion on which empirical practices work best in each setting.

AI.tldr: 本文呼吁强化学习领域区分模拟器的两种使用场景：求解模拟器（以模拟器本身为目标）与将模拟器作为实际部署学习的代理。作者指出两种场景在约束条件、适用算法和评估指标上有本质区别，并通过实验展示混淆这两种场景会导致误导性结论。
AI.motivation: 当前RL研究中存在一种倾向：研究者在实验中过度关注在模拟器上取得高分，导致研究目标从"理解通用序列决策"异化为"专门求解特定模拟器"。作者认为这两种目标本质不同，需要明确区分。
AI.method: 通过理论分析阐述两种模拟器使用场景的核心差异（约束条件、算法适用性、评估指标），并结合具体示例和简单实验，展示不区分这两种场景可能导致的问题和误导性结论。
AI.result: 发现混淆两种场景会导致：研究者采用仅适用于模拟器的特殊技巧（而非通用算法）、评估时使用不恰当的指标、以及得出无法推广到实际部署环境的误导性结论。
AI.conclusion: RL社区应当明确区分"求解模拟器"和"将模拟器作为部署代理"两种研究范式，并针对各自特点采用合适的实验实践和评估标准，以推动领域健康发展。

title: When Medical Safety Alignment Fails: A Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs on High-Risk Medical Queries
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for medical and health-related questions, yet their safety in high-risk medical scenarios remains poorly understood. We introduce \textsc{MedHarm}\footnote{Code and data will be released upon acceptance. Due to the sensitive nature of high-risk medical queries, data access will be available to qualified researchers upon request.}, a high-risk medical safety benchmark with 1,100 medically grounded queries across 10 safety-critical categories, including toxicology, pharmacology, covert poisoning, anesthesia, and fetal harm. Unlike broad medical QA benchmarks, \textsc{MedHarm} targets realistic clinical, educational, and technical prompts that require refusal, caution, or safe redirection rather than direct helpfulness. We evaluate 15 LLMs spanning general-purpose, medical-purpose, closed-source, and downstream SFT models, together with 4 representative guardrail models. Results reveal a substantial gap between apparent alignment and medical safety: aligned models can still produce unsafe or actionable responses, medical fine-tuning can amplify harmful specificity, and external guardrails reduce some failures while introducing brittle blocking and weak safe helpfulness. These findings show that medical safety cannot be inferred from general alignment or medical capability alone, highlighting the need for domain-specific stress testing before deploying LLMs in safety-critical medical applications.

AI.tldr: MedHarm是一个包含1,100个高风险医疗安全问题的基准测试，评估了15个LLM和4个防护模型，发现医疗安全不能从通用对齐或医疗能力中推断，需要领域特定的压力测试。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM越来越多地用于医疗问答，但在高风险医疗场景下的安全性仍不清楚，现有基准缺乏针对性的安全评估。
AI.method: 构建MedHarm基准（1,100个问题，10个安全类别），评估15个LLM（通用/医疗/闭源/SFT）和4个防护模型。
AI.result: 对齐模型仍可能产生不安全回复；医疗微调会放大有害特异性；外部防护可减少部分失败但引入脆弱阻断和弱安全帮助性。
AI.conclusion: 医疗安全不能从通用对齐或医疗能力推断，需领域特定压力测试后再部署LLM。

title: A Relaxation and Rectification (ReCR) Framework for Systems with Linear and Complementary Constraints: Theoretical Foundation, Algorithms and Numerical Experiments
comment: 48 Pages. A slightly different version of the paper is under review for mathematical programming: computation
summary:
Systems defined by linear and complementarity constraints (SLCCs) arise frequently in engineering, economics, and other related fields. They also appear in the optimality conditions of many challenging optimization models, such as bilinear optimization and linearly constrained quadratic optimization. It is known that finding a feasible solution to an SLCC is NP-hard in general. In this paper, we study the feasibility problem for a given SLCC: either find a feasible solution or determine that the system is infeasible. To this end, we introduce a universal relaxation theory (URT), which reformulates SLCC feasibility as an equivalent bilinear optimization problem with linear constraints in a lifted space. We then analyze the resulting bilinear model and derive necessary and sufficient optimality conditions for its global solutions. Based on these theoretical insights, we introduce a relaxation-rectification (ReCR) framework for finding a feasible solution to a given SLCC instance or certifying infeasibility. We develop several ReCR methods that differ in their working spaces and subproblem formulations and analyze their convergence properties. We also develop a numerical procedure for obtaining an infeasibility certificate when the ReCR methods do not find a feasible solution.
  We conduct numerical experiments to evaluate the reliability, robustness, and scalability of the proposed ReCR methods and compare them with existing SLCC solvers.
