For the 48V-to-1V case, the proposed DVPD approach achieves 84\% system-wide efficiency while occupying 54\% of the area beneath the load system, with efficiency increasing to 87.6\% at 75\% area utilization across a 1--50~kW load range. Furthermore, steady-state voltage drops peak at 2.7\% and transient drops at 9\% (without decoupling capacitors), demonstrating the viability of DVPD for future wafer-scale HPC platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向高性能计算（HPC）系统的端到端可扩展垂直供电框架，包含分布式垂直供电（DVPD）架构、设计优化方法和分析模型。通过利用衬底嵌入GaN功率开关和定制无源器件，在48V-to-1V转换方案下实现了84%的系统级效率（面积占用54%），最高可达87.6%（面积占用75%），稳态压降仅2.7%，证明了DVPD在未来晶圆级HPC平台上的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有垂直供电方案系统级效率低于70%，大量能量在到达片上负载点前就以热量形式损失。缺乏系统化的设计方法学，评估供电质量、探索架构替代方案和优化性能依赖于计算量巨大的仿真，导致设计次优。
AI.method: 提出端到端可扩展供电框架，包括分布式VPD架构、设计优化方法学和分析模型；采用衬底嵌入GaN功率开关配合单元电感和电容阵列；探索48V-to-1V、48V-to-24V-to-1V、48V-to-12V-to-1V等多级转换方案，并在稳态条件下评估全系统压降和功率损耗。
AI.result: 48V-to-1V方案实现84%系统级效率（占用负载下方面积54%）；面积利用率达75%时效率升至87.6%；负载范围1-50kW；稳态压降峰值2.7%，瞬态压降9%（无去耦电容）。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的DVPD方法显著提升了供电效率（从<70%提升至84%-87.6%），降低了压降，并在合理面积开销下验证了其可行性，适合未来晶圆级HPC平台的供电需求。

title: Gradient boosting with vector-valued leafs
summary: Gradient boosting in the form of decision tree ensembles has successfully been applied to a variety of problems using simple objective functions based on log-likelihoods of a single variable. The concept extends naturally to objective functions operating on vectors - for example, multinomial logistic log-likelihood for multi-class classification, where observations have a score for each class - but popular frameworks approach these functions by either updating one value of the input vectors at a time, or by using a diagonal upper bound on the second derivative. This work extends the usual gradient boosting framework to functions of vector inputs and sketches a simple algorithm that can be used efficiently with histogram-based decision trees.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了梯度提升框架以处理向量输入的损失函数，并提出一种可与直方图决策树高效结合的简单算法。
AI.motivation: 现有的梯度提升方法在处理多类分类等多维输出问题时，要么逐元素更新向量分量，要么使用对角上界近似二阶导数，缺乏对向量输入损失函数的直接优化。
AI.method: 将梯度提升框架推广到向量输入的函数，并设计了一种与基于直方图的决策树高效结合的算法。
AI.result: 提出了一种可直接优化向量损失函数的梯度提升算法，且能与直方图决策树高效集成。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了梯度提升处理向量输入损失函数的空白，为多类分类等问题提供了更直接的优化方案。

title: Singular Learning and Occam's Razor in Deep Monomial Networks
summary: In the optimization of neural networks, gradient dynamics are influenced by critical points that arise from the model's architecture. These critical points occur where the Jacobian of the model's parametrization is rank-deficient, and are the most pronounced singularities studied in Singular Learning Theory. We investigate such points in deep fully-connected networks with monomial activations via tools from polynomial algebra such as Mason's Theorem. We show that, for sufficiently large activation degree, criticality occurs precisely at subnetworks, i.e., at parameter configurations where some neurons are inactive or redundant. This offers a mathematical perspective on the implicit bias in deep neural networks, explaining the tendency of these models to converge toward simpler functions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多项式代数工具（如Mason定理）研究具有单项式激活函数的深度全连接网络中的临界点，证明在激活函数次数足够大时，临界点恰好对应于子网络（部分神经元非活跃或冗余），为深度神经网络的隐式偏差提供了数学解释。
AI.motivation: 理解神经网络优化过程中梯度动力学如何受模型架构临界点影响，这些临界点出现在参数化雅可比矩阵秩亏时，是奇异学习理论中研究的最显著奇点。
AI.method: 利用多项式代数工具（如Mason定理）分析具有单项式激活函数的深度全连接网络中的临界点结构。
AI.result: 对于足够大的激活函数次数，临界点恰好出现在子网络参数配置处（部分神经元非活跃或冗余）。
AI.conclusion: 为深度神经网络倾向于收敛到更简单函数的隐式偏差提供了严格的数学视角。

title: Agentic Safety is an Epistemic Property, Not a Behavioral One
comment: To appear in proceedings of ICML 2026
summary: Contemporary AI safety spans pre-training interventions, post-training alignment, deployment-time controls, monitoring, and red-teaming. These methods are necessary, but they primarily certify snapshots of system behavior. As AI systems become more capable, dynamic, embodied, and self-improving, this snapshot view becomes incomplete: safety depends not only on whether a system behaves acceptably now, but whether it remains correctable as it learns, adapts, acts, and modifies itself over time. This paper argues that safety should therefore be treated as an epistemic property of the evolving learner, not merely a behavioral property of the current policy. We introduce teachability as the capacity to preserve future corrective leverage under bounded human, institutional, or environmental intervention. We argue that advanced systems can retain visible competence while eroding the representational, algorithmic, or meta-decision conditions needed for future correction. Safe advanced AI systems must not only behave acceptably now; they must remain teachable later.

AI.tldr: 本文提出安全应被视为学习者的认知属性（可教性），而不仅是当前行为的快照验证，强调系统在未来仍能被修正的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全方法主要验证系统在某个时间点的行为快照，但随着AI系统变得更具动态性、具身性和自我改进能力，这种快照视角不足以确保长期安全。系统可能在保持表面合规的同时，逐步侵蚀未来可修正性的条件。
AI.method: 提出"可教性"（teachability）概念，定义为在有限的人类、制度或环境干预下，保持未来修正杠杆的能力。从认知属性角度重新定义安全，分析系统可能侵蚀表征、算法或元决策条件的方式。
AI.result: 论证了高级系统可以在保持表面合规表现的同时，暗中破坏未来可修正性的基础条件，指出需要超越行为验证的新的安全保障。
AI.conclusion: 安全的先进AI系统不仅需要在当前行为上可接受，还必须保持未来的可教性。安全应被视作演化学习者的认知属性，而非当前策略的行为属性。

title: Second-Order Sensitivity of Efficient Solution and Marginal Maps in Parametric Vector Optimization with Set Constraints
comment: Keywords: parametric vector optimization; efficient solution map; marginal map; second-order Dini derivative; set-valued directional derivative; Robinson metric regularity; value-to-decision error bound; uniform Henig efficiency; parametric constraint system
summary: We develop a second-order sensitivity theory for the efficient solution map \(S\) of a parametric vector optimization problem \(\min_C f(p,x)\) subject to \(x\in H(p)\). The main point is the passage from efficient values to efficient decisions. Under a value-to-decision error bound (VDB), second-order information for the marginal map \(Φ\) lifts to a second-order Dini formula for \(S\). We first work in the abstract inclusion model \(x\in H(p)\), where outer and inner estimates yield second-order semi-derivability of \(S\). We then specialize to structured feasible maps \(H(p)=\{x\inΩ:g(p,x)\in D\}\). Under Robinson metric regularity along \(Ω\), second-order regularity of \(Ω\) and \(D\), and directional second-order semi-derivability of the data, we obtain explicit formulas for \(\DD H\), \(\DDΦ\), and \(\DD S\). The framework is specialized to polyhedral inequality/equality systems and illustrated by a robust multi-objective portfolio model and a DC-dispatch model for electricity markets, with a brief discussion of complementarity-based extensions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对参数向量优化问题的最小化解映射S，建立了一套二阶灵敏度理论。核心是从有效值到有效决策的转化，在值-决策误差界条件下，将边际映射Φ的二阶信息提升为S的二阶Dini公式。研究通过抽象包含模型和结构化可行映射两种路径展开，给出了二阶半可导性的显式公式，并应用于多目标投资组合和电力市场模型。
AI.motivation: 现有灵敏度理论多关注有效值（边际映射）的变化，而缺乏对有效决策（解映射）的二阶分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立从有效值到有效决策的二阶灵敏度理论，为实际优化问题提供更精细的决策支持。
AI.method: (1) 在抽象包含模型x∈H(p)中，利用外估计和内估计得到S的二阶半可导性；(2) 在结构化可行映射H(p)={x∈Ω: g(p,x)∈D}下，利用Robinson度量正则性、Ω和D的二阶正则性、以及数据的定向二阶半可导性，推导出DD H、DD Φ和DD S的显式公式。
AI.result: 建立了二阶Dini公式将边际映射的二阶信息提升为解映射的二阶展开；给出了结构化情形下H、Φ和S的二阶半导数显式公式；将理论特化到多面体不等式/等式系统，并通过鲁棒多目标投资组合模型和电力市场DC调度模型进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: 该二阶灵敏度理论为参数向量优化问题的解映射分析提供了系统框架，值-决策误差界条件是关键桥梁。未来可扩展至互补约束问题等更广泛的模型类别。

title: SEAD: Competence-Aware On-Policy Distillation via Entropy-Guided Supervision
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has a property absent in offline distillation and RL: teacher supervision quality depends on student competence. Incoherent rollouts yield noisy gradients; already-mastered tokens yield redundant ones. This creates waste at three scales (tokens, training phases, and prompts) yet existing methods supervise uniformly. We introduce SEAD, which uses entropy as a unified probe of this competence-dependent degradation at three scales: (1) joint teacher-student entropy partitions tokens into zones receiving tailored divergences or zero gradient (approx. 50% skipped); (2) a cosine schedule anneals from forward to reverse KL as competence grows; (3) a competence-gated curriculum introduces prompts easy-to-hard. These components are symbiotically necessary: token selection requires coherent rollouts (curriculum), annealing requires monotonic improvement (also curriculum). On OLMo-3 (7B to 32B), SEAD achieves +4.8 avg accuracy over vanilla OPD across six math benchmarks, with ablations confirming super-additive interactions.

AI.tldr: SEAD提出了一种基于熵的统一探针方法，通过令牌区划分、KL散度退火调度和课程学习三阶段优化，解决同策略蒸馏中因学生能力不同导致的监督质量差异问题，在6个数学基准上平均提升4.8%准确率。
AI.motivation: 同策略蒸馏（OPD）存在独特的性质：教师监督质量取决于学生能力。不连贯的轨迹会产生噪声梯度，已掌握的令牌会产生冗余梯度。这种浪费存在于三个尺度（令牌、训练阶段和提示），但现有方法对所有样本进行统一监督。
AI.method: SEAD使用熵作为统一探针在三个尺度上处理能力依赖的退化问题：(1) 联合师生熵将令牌分区为不同区域，施加定制散度或零梯度（约50%跳过）；(2) 余弦调度策略从前向KL退火到反向KL； (3) 能力门控课程从易到难引入提示。这三个组件共生必要：令牌选择需要连贯轨迹（课程），退火需要单调改进（也是课程）。
AI.result: 在OLMo-3（7B到32B）上，SEAD在6个数学基准上比原始OPD平均准确率提升4.8%，消融实验证实了超加性交互作用。
AI.conclusion: SEAD通过熵驱动的三尺度自适应蒸馏机制，有效解决了同策略蒸馏中的监督质量退化问题，各组件间的协同效应显著超越单独使用效果。

title: COMPASS: Grounding Composition-Intent Guidance in Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Composition is a high-level visual intent that governs where subjects are placed and how a scene is organized, yet current unified multimodal models remain unreliable at fine-grained composition recognition and struggle to turn such intent into controllable generation. We present COMPASS, the first unified multimodal framework that grounds composition-intent control in a single system spanning both composition perception and composition-guided generation, with a shared expert token $τ_c$ as the central intent anchor. On the perception side, COMPASS injects composition expertise into an MoE backbone in a minimally invasive manner and distills the inferred intent into $τ_c$. On the generation side, COMPASS reuses $τ_c$ as a global conditioning signal that steers the denoising trajectory, effectively converting passive composition analysis into explicit layout control. To support systematic instruction-following composition learning and evaluation at scale, we construct Comp-11, a large-scale dataset with an 11-class taxonomy and reasoning-augmented annotations. Extensive experiments show that COMPASS substantially improves category-level composition understanding and delivers more composition-consistent, prompt-faithful generation than strong baselines.

AI.tldr: COMPASS是一个统一的多模态框架，通过共享专家令牌τ_c实现构图意图感知与可控生成，在MoE骨干网络中注入构图专业知识，并利用Compass-11数据集在11类构图任务上显著优于强基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在细粒度构图识别上不可靠，且难以将构图意图转化为可控生成。目前缺乏一个统一的系统同时支持构图感知与构图引导生成。
AI.method: 提出COMPASS框架，核心是共享专家令牌τ_c作为意图锚点。感知端通过MoE骨干网络以最小侵入方式注入构图专业知识，并将推理出的意图蒸馏到τ_c中；生成端重用τ_c作为全局条件信号引导去噪轨迹。同时构建了包含11类分类体系和推理增强标注的大规模数据集Comp-11。
AI.result: 在类别级构图理解上显著提升，生成的图像在构图一致性和提示忠实度上均优于强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: COMPASS是第一个统一构图感知与可控生成的框架，通过共享意图令牌实现了被动构图分析到显式布局控制的有效转换。

title: Estimating Available Traction Power in Multi-Train AC Railway Networks from a Distance-Dependent Power Envelope
summary: Decarbonisation is raising the electrical load on mainline alternating-current railway feeders that were not designed for sustained, simultaneous high-power demand. When several trains accelerate together on a shared feeder, the contact-line voltage can fall far enough to trigger rolling-stock current limitation or feeder protection, eroding capacity and reliability. Preventing this in real time requires a quantity conventional operation does not expose: a localised, continuously updated estimate of the traction power available to each train given the live network state. A railway power-flow model, with trains represented under a voltage-dependent automatic current-limitation characteristic, shows that the minimum network voltage is governed by the product of power and distance rather than by power alone, yielding a distance-dependent single-train power envelope. This envelope does not add up when several trains share a feeder, so a conservative pairwise screen is generalised to a solver-free multi-train estimate: a calibrated shared-path voltage model returning the minimum section voltage and the per-train available power for any number of trains. Calibration uses two short offline solver runs, one fixing the self-impedance and one the inter-train coupling through a separation-dependent factor. Its current-limitation behaviour follows EN 50388-1, and on matched multi-train cases the estimate tracks the full power flow to within about nine per cent on average across two-, three-, and four-train cases, improving as more trains share the feeder, while its online cost scales with the number of trains rather than the network size.

AI.tldr: 本文针对铁路电气化脱碳背景下，接触网电压因多车同时加速而跌落的问题，提出了一种基于校准共享路径电压模型的实时可用牵引功率估计方法，该方法无需求解器，能快速准确估算多车共享馈线时的最低电压和每车可用功率。
AI.motivation: 脱碳导致交流铁路馈线负荷增加，多车同时加速时接触网电压跌落，触发电流限制或保护，降低线路容量和可靠性。需要实时估计每列车的可用牵引功率，而传统运行方式不提供这一信息。
AI.method: 建立考虑电压依赖自动限流特性的铁路潮流模型，发现最低网络电压由功率与距离的乘积决定，提出距离依赖的单车功率包络。推广为无求解器的多车估计方法：校准共享路径电压模型，通过两次离线求解器运行分别校准自阻抗和车距相关耦合因子，模型符合EN 50388-1标准。
AI.result: 在两车、三车和四车情况下，估计值跟踪全潮流结果的误差平均约为9%，且随共享馈线的列车数量增多而改善；在线计算成本仅与列车数量相关，而非网络规模。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效用于在线实时估计，避免了传统潮流求解的高计算成本，适应多车共享馈线场景，具有良好精度和可扩展性。

title: Self-Organized Conformal Prediction: Reducing Regional Coverage Gaps with Unsupervised Group Discovery
summary: Conformal prediction guarantees marginal coverage, but pooled calibration averages over heterogeneous regions and can mask regional undercoverage in safety-critical subgroups. We introduce Self-Organized Conformal Prediction (SOCP), a calibration scheme that discovers input-space groups with a Self-Organizing Map (SOM) and, at test time, draws a local calibration buffer from the query's best-matching unit (BMU) cell or a fixed grid neighborhood. The same retrieval rule applies to regression and classification tasks across tabular features and image embeddings, leaving the predictor and nonconformity score untouched. SOCP gives exact validity for BMU-cell retrieval and fixed retrieved-set validity for neighborhood buffers; central-cell validity for neighborhood retrieval holds up to a Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) bias term. A split-routed extension recovers fixed retrieved-set validity conditional on the routing split. On eight regression and classification benchmarks, SO-SCP reduces the weighted regional coverage gap on $7/8$ datasets (mean paired change $-7.1\%$) for a mean prediction-set size increase of $6.2\%$, with negligible overhead on the largest six datasets; SO-CQR yields smaller gains, since quantile regression already absorbs much of the heterogeneity. By learning groups directly from the input geometry, SOCP provides group-local calibration with exact fixed-group guarantees and approximate central-cell guarantees, without supervised partitions or predictor retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自组织共形预测（SOCP），利用自组织映射（SOM）自动发现输入空间中的子群，并在测试时为查询点从最佳匹配单元（BMU）或其邻域中提取局部校准缓冲区，从而在不改变预测器或非一致性评分的情况下，实现分组条件覆盖，减少区域覆盖不足问题。
AI.motivation: 标准共形预测的边际覆盖保证在异质性区域上平均化，可能掩盖安全关键子群中的区域覆盖不足问题，因此需要一种无需监督分区或重新训练预测器的组局部校准方法。
AI.method: 利用自组织映射（SOM）自动发现输入空间中的组结构；测试时从查询点的BMU单元或固定网格邻域中提取局部校准缓冲区；提出分裂路由扩展以恢复条件覆盖保证。
AI.result: 在8个回归/分类基准上，SO-SCP在7/8数据集上降低了加权区域覆盖差距（平均配对变化-7.1%），预测集大小平均增加6.2%，在最大6个数据集上开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: SOCP通过直接从输入几何中学习组结构，提供组局部校准，具有精确的固定组保证和近似的中心单元保证，无需监督分区或预测器重新训练。

title: An Agentic AI Pipeline for Appliance-Level Energy Anomaly Detection and LLM-Driven Recommendations
comment: 07 pages, 01 figure, accepted for presentation at the IEEE International Conference on Communication, Computing, Networking, and Control in Cyber-Physical Systems (CCNCPS 2026)
summary: Appliance-level energy monitoring in office buildings produces noisy alerts that non-expert facility managers struggle to use. This paper proposes an end-to-end agentic pipeline that combines deep time-series forecasting, variational anomaly detection, and LLM-based reasoning to generate prioritized, actionable maintenance recommendations. The system tracks seven office appliances using a hybrid Singular Spectrum Analysis (SSA) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) forecasting model, and applies a per-appliance LSTM Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with attention to flag abnormal daily consumption episodes. A three-stage LangChain pipeline begins with a Context Agent that always retrieves three core RAG sources (model reliability, hourly baseline, and expert knowledge) and conditionally adds up to three more (forecast context, anomaly history, global baseline) based on event characteristics, capped at eight reasoning steps. A Diagnosis Agent converts the evidence into a structured JSON diagnosis, and a Report Agent renders a human-readable narrative. A reflective memory layer incorporates operator feedback. The dashboard shows real-time 30-minute forecasts, intraday consumption, the previous day anomaly report, and a feedback form. We evaluate the forecasting model, anomaly detector with appliance-specific thresholds, and LLM reasoning on a 16-scenario benchmark including sustained and transient spikes, unexpected shutdowns, and systemic events, comparing five LLM backends under static vs. dynamic retrieval. Dynamic retrieval matches full static retrieval across all backends while cutting average context from six to three-six sources per event. The best backend scores 90.4/100 with a 100% pass rate at a 70-point threshold, and a fully local 7B-parameter model passes all 16 scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个端到端智能体流水线，结合深度时序预测、变分异常检测和LLM推理，为办公楼非专家设施管理者生成优先级明确、可操作的维护建议。系统利用混合SSA-LSTM预测模型和注意力LSTM-VAE异常检测器，通过三层LangChain流水线（上下文智能体、诊断智能体、报告智能体）动态检索RAG证据并生成结构化诊断。16场景基准测试中，动态检索匹配全静态检索性能，最佳后端得分90.4/100，本地7B模型通过全部场景。
AI.motivation: 办公楼设备级能耗监控产生大量噪声告警，非专业设施管理者难以有效利用这些信息，现有系统缺乏可解释性和可操作性的维护建议。
AI.method: 提出一个端到端智能体流水线：(1) 混合SSA-LSTM预测模型跟踪七个办公电器；(2) 注意力LSTM-VAE按设备检测异常日耗电；(3) 三层LangChain流水线：Context Agent动态检索最多6个RAG来源（3个核心+3个条件性）且推理步数上限8步、Diagnosis Agent生成结构化JSON诊断、Report Agent生成可读报告；(4) 反射式记忆层整合操作员反馈。
AI.result: 动态检索在所有LLM后端上匹配全静态检索性能，平均上下文从6个降至3-6个来源。最佳后端得分90.4/100，70分阈值通过率100%。完全本地化7B参数模型通过全部16个场景。
AI.conclusion: 动态检索机制有效平衡了推理效率与信息完整性，且本地小模型即可达到实用性能，验证了该方案在实际办公楼部署中的可行性和可推广性。

title: Financing Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure: Mapping AI Infrastructure Investment and Compute Governance Across Africa
comment: 14 pages; two figures. Currently under review at Data and Policy journal
summary: Artificial intelligence depends on large-scale compute resources and their supporting infrastructure. However, AI governance debates treat compute primarily as a technical input rather than as an outcome of investment, ownership, and financial control. This paper examines AI infrastructure investment flows across Africa through a systematic analysis of 46 publicly announced projects totalling USD $12.7 billion between 2019 and 2025. Using a value chain framework, we analyze who invests in AI-relevant infrastructure and where investments concentrate. Our findings reveal a highly concentrated landscape dominated by global data center operators, hyperscale technology firms, and development finance institutions, clustering in South Africa, Kenya, Nigeria, and Egypt. We introduce asymmetrical interdependence to describe a structural condition in which capital and physical infrastructure account for 73% of total funding while control remains concentrated in the compute layer among a small number of global technology firms. We argue that compute governance must account for capital flows, ownership, and control, not only geographic access, because these dynamics shape AI compute equity. Infrastructure presence is necessary but insufficient for meaningful governance capacity.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对2019-2025年间非洲46个公开AI基础设施项目（总计127亿美元）的系统分析，揭示了AI基础设施投资高度集中于南非、肯尼亚、尼日利亚和埃及，由全球数据中心运营商、超大规模科技公司和发展金融机构主导。作者提出"非对称相互依存"概念描述资本与物理基础设施占73%资金但控制权集中在少数全球科技公司的结构性条件，主张计算治理必须关注资本流动、所有权和控制权，而非仅关注地理可及性。
AI.motivation: AI治理辩论将计算主要视为技术投入，忽视了投资、所有权和财务控制等驱动因素。作者试图将AI基础设施的投资流动纳入分析框架，揭示非洲AI基础设施的资本结构和控制权分布。
AI.method: 系统分析了2019-2025年间非洲46个公开宣布的AI基础设施项目（总计127亿美元），采用价值链框架分析谁在投资以及投资集中在何处。
AI.result: 发现投资高度集中：全球数据中心运营商、超大规模科技公司和发展金融机构主导投资，地理上集中在南非、肯尼亚、尼日利亚和埃及。资本和物理基础设施占73%总资金，但控制权集中在少数全球科技公司的计算层。
AI.conclusion: 计算治理必须考虑资本流动、所有权和控制权，而不只是地理可及性，因为这些动态塑造了AI计算公平性。基础设施的存在对于有意义的治理能力是必要的但不充分的。

title: Sharp $O(1/k)$ convergence rate for the Sinkhorn algorithm via a local analysis
summary: We prove that the Sinkhorn algorithm converges at the rate of $O(1/k)$ in $\ell_1$-norm marginal error and in joint relative entropy, which is known to be sharp in the asymptotically scalable case. The proof is based on examining the bipartite graph associated to the entropy-regularized optimal transport problem, and treating differently the edges that are assigned a positive mass in the optimal transport plan vs. those that are not. This yields a local convergence bound with the sharp rate, which is bootstrapped into a global bound using the author's previous result in arXiv:2604.26265 where we showed an almost-sharp rate up to a logarithmic factor.

AI.tldr: 本文证明Sinkhorn算法在ℓ₁范数边际误差和联合相对熵上达到O(1/k)收敛率，该速率在渐近可缩放情形下是最优的。证明基于分析熵正则化最优传输问题的二分图，区分最优传输计划中分配正质量的边与未分配的边，从而得到具有最优速率的局部收敛界，再利用作者先前工作中近乎最优（含对数因子）的结果将其提升为全局界。
AI.motivation: Sinkhorn算法是求解熵正则化最优传输问题的主流方法，但其收敛速度的最优性此前未被严格证明。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，证明O(1/k)的收敛率是紧的。
AI.method: 基于熵正则化最优传输问题的二分图结构，将边分为两类：在最优传输计划中分配正质量的边（活跃边）和未分配的边（非活跃边）。对两类边分别分析，得到局部收敛边界；再结合作者先前工作中近乎最优的收敛结果（含对数因子），通过自举（bootstrapping）技术将局部界推广为全局界。
AI.result: 证明了Sinkhorn算法在ℓ₁范数边际误差和联合相对熵上达到O(1/k)的收敛率，且该速率在渐近可缩放情形下是尖锐的（sharp）。
AI.conclusion: Sinkhorn算法的O(1/k)收敛率是最优的，解决了该算法收敛速度紧性这一开放问题。

title: Correct codes for the wrong reasons? validating LLMs as measurement instruments for theoretical constructs
summary: When a large language model (LLM) codes a construct in text as a human annotator would, that agreement makes the LLM a reliable coder. Yet reliability leaves construct validity untouched. The instrument may be theory-naive, reaching the code through a correlate that meets none of the demands the construct's theory makes, and no current method tells that apart from genuine measurement. We propose grain calibration as a method that closes the gap. It decomposes a construct into clause-level components, tests each against the text with extractive evidence, and combines the results through an explicit, theory-derived rule. Because the rule is stated rather than lodged in one opaque pass, its structure is evidence about the process rather than the output. It shows which components settled a code, and, when the code is wrong, whether a component was missed or an adjacent construct mistaken for it. Validation shifts from scoring an instrument's outputs against an annotator to showing that the instrument runs on the construct its theory specifies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"粒度校准"方法，将构念分解为子句级组件，通过显式理论推导规则进行文本编码，以解决LLM编码的构念效度问题，使验证从输出评分转向过程证据。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM作为编码器虽具有可靠性（与人类标注者一致），但构念效度问题未被触及：模型可能通过相关性而非真正的理论构念进行编码，现有方法无法区分真实测量与虚假相关。
AI.method: 提出粒度校准方法，包含三个步骤：1）将构念分解为子句级组件；2）用可提取的证据测试每个组件；3）通过显式、理论推导的规则组合结果。规则是陈述性的而非隐藏在一次不透明的前向传递中。
AI.result: 该方法的结构提供了过程而非输出的证据：展示哪些组件决定了编码结果，当编码错误时，能判断是遗漏了组件还是混淆了相邻构念。验证范式从评分输出与标注者一致转向证明仪器运行的是理论规定的构念。
AI.conclusion: 粒度校准将验证从输出匹配转向过程透明，解决了LLM编码的构念效度问题，使编码过程可解释、可审计。

title: BV-Blend: Uncertainty-Weighted Historical Baselines for Stable Critic-Free RL with Verifiable Rewards
summary: Critic-free reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), exemplified by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), avoids training a value function (critic) and reduces memory and compute overhead relative to critic-based PPO pipelines for aligning large language models. However, GRPO-style advantage estimation depends on prompt-local (within-prompt-group) reward statistics and can be unstable. In particular, when all rollouts in a prompt group receive identical rewards, the within-group reward variance becomes zero, and group normalization yields zero advantages for that group, impeding learning in cold-start regimes with binary verifiers. We introduce BV-Blend, a critic-free framework that stabilizes advantage estimation by combining prompt-local on-policy statistics with semantic-cluster-conditioned historical moments. BV-Blend maintains EMA-tracked reward moments for each cluster, derives a confidence weight from a standard error of the mean (SEM) proxy, and uses this weight to blend historical and prompt-local baseline and variance statistics into a standardized advantage for PPO-style clipped updates. Experiments on verifiable reasoning benchmarks show that BV-Blend improves training stability and performance, and remains robust in regimes where group-normalized methods may stall.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BV-Blend，一种无需评论家的强化学习方法，通过结合本地提示组统计与语义聚类历史统计来稳定优势估计，解决了GRPO在零方差场景下的训练停滞问题。
AI.motivation: GRPO-style的优势估计依赖组内奖励统计，当所有rollout获得相同奖励时方差为零，导致优势为零，学习停滞。现有方法缺乏利用历史统计信息来稳定估计的手段。
AI.method: BV-Blend维护每个语义聚类的EMA跟踪奖励矩，通过标准误代理计算置信权重，将历史基线/方差统计与本地提示组统计进行混合，形成标准化优势用于PPO式裁剪更新。
AI.result: 在可验证推理基准上，BV-Blend提升了训练稳定性和性能，在组归一化方法可能停滞的场景下保持鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: BV-Blend作为一种无评论家框架，通过语义聚类历史时刻与本地统计的混合，有效解决了冷启动与二元验证器下的优势估计不稳定问题。

title: PACR: Parameter-Optimized AC Power Flow Restoration for AC Feasible DCOPF Dispatch
summary: The DC optimal power flow is widely used in power system operations because of its computational efficiency and scalability. However, DC dispatches are not guaranteed to satisfy the nonlinear AC power-flow equations or associated operational limits. This paper develops a parameterized, differentiable AC power-flow restoration method for mapping DC dispatches to AC-consistent operating points. The method incorporates distributed slack for active-power balancing and PV/PQ switching for reactive-power regulation, both implemented using smooth differentiable surrogates with tunable parameters, including slack participation factors, voltage setpoints, and regulation steepness. These parameters are trained offline by differentiating through the AC restoration equations using the implicit function theorem. Once trained, the optimized parameters are fixed and used directly during AC power-flow recovery from DC dispatches. The approach is evaluated on IEEE, ACTIVSg, and PEGASE test systems using setpoints computed by standard DC optimal power flow. Results show that the optimized restoration method improves AC feasibility recovery across various systems relative to conventional single-slack AC power-flow recovery. On the 9,241-bus case, the optimized method improves cost difference by 80% relative to the conventional recovery baseline and improves solving time relative to ACOPF by 75%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数化、可微的交流潮流恢复方法，将直流最优潮流调度映射为满足交流潮流约束的运行点，通过隐函数定理离线训练参数，在多个大型测试系统上显著提升了交流可行性恢复效果，并大幅降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 直流最优潮流计算高效但无法保证满足非线性交流潮流方程及其运行约束，因此需要一种方法将直流调度结果转化为交流可行的运行点。
AI.method: 提出参数化可微的交流潮流恢复方法，包含分布式松弛有功平衡和PV/PQ切换无功调节（均使用光滑可微代理函数），通过隐函数定理可微化交流恢复方程，离线训练松弛参与因子、电压设定点等参数，训练后固定参数直接用于恢复。
AI.result: 在IEEE、ACTIVSg、PEGASE测试系统上，优化后的恢复方法在交流可行性恢复上优于传统单松弛节点方法；在9241节点系统上，成本差异改善80%，求解时间相比ACOPF减少75%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效桥接了直流调度与交流运行之间的差距，在保证可行性的同时大幅降低计算开销，具有良好的扩展性和实用性。

title: Bidirectional Autoregressive Latent Diffusion for Forward and Inverse Magnetohydrodynamics
summary: This work presents a new bidirectional autoregressive latent diffusion approach for predicting the evolution of multiple fields (mass density, pressure, velocity, and magnetic field components) for magnetohydrodynamics. We show that this bidirectional flow can be used as a self-supervised consistency metric for uncertainty and error estimation, which enables the model to estimate test-time uncertainty and error without access to ground truth, by comparing how closely flowing forwards and backwards in time returns to the same predicted fields. We also demonstrate this methods's potential to serve as a non-invasive plasma diagnostic, and show how adaptive feedback can be used to make the model more robust based on sparse diagnostics or limited views/measurements.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双向自回归潜扩散方法，用于预测磁流体动力学中多个场的演化，并利用双向流动作为自监督一致性度量进行不确定性和误差估计，同时展示了其在等离子体诊断和自适应反馈鲁棒性提升方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 磁流体动力学中多场演化的预测存在不确定性，且传统方法难以在无真实标签情况下估计误差；同时需要一种非侵入性的诊断方法和鲁棒性提升机制。
AI.method: 构建双向自回归潜扩散模型（Bidirectional Autoregressive Latent Diffusion），通过比较前向和反向流动的预测一致性作为自监督度量，实现不确定性/误差估计；并设计自适应反馈机制利用稀疏诊断数据增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 双向流能够作为有效的自监督一致性度量，在无真实标签下估计不确定性和误差；该方法有潜力作为非侵入性等离子体诊断工具；自适应反馈可提升模型在稀疏观测下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该双向方法为磁流体动力学多场预测提供了不确定性量化能力，并拓展了其在实际等离子体诊断和稀疏数据场景中的应用价值。

title: Modelling Emotional Memory in Children with Tensor Networks
summary: We demonstrate how emotional valence influences the order-dependent structure of children's recognition memory: correct recall of a sequence of emotionally-valenced toys depended not just on the valence of a given toy itself, but also on the valence of the toys shown before and after it. Whilst standard psychological models confirm that order-dependence differs across an event (a set of toys shown in sequence), accuracy is low and the model does not reflect how memory for an emotional object influences others in the set. A classical tensor network model factoring in valence is able to achieve a 77.98\% accuracy in modelling the results of the study. While not strictly a ``quantum cognition'' model, this massive increase in accuracy shows the value of quantum-inspired methods for modelling order-dependent phenomena, such as emotional memory. Further, the task protocol we introduce presents a novel, real-world tool for exploring emotional temporal memory in children for analysis using classical and quantum-like models of cognition.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验发现儿童对情感序列玩具的记忆存在顺序依赖效应，并引入张量网络模型（受量子启发）显著提升了预测准确率（77.98%），相较于标准心理学模型更具优势，同时提出了一种研究儿童情感时间记忆的新任务范式。
AI.motivation: 标准心理学模型虽然确认了识别记忆中的顺序依赖性，但准确率低，且未能反映情感对象如何影响集合中其他对象的记忆。作者希望引入量子启发模型来更好地建模这种顺序依赖的情感记忆现象。
AI.method: 设计儿童情感序列记忆实验，让儿童回忆一系列具有不同情感效价的玩具顺序。采用经典张量网络模型（融入情感效价因素）进行建模，并与标准心理学模型进行对比。
AI.result: 张量网络模型在建模儿童情感序列记忆任务中达到77.98%的准确率，远超标准心理学模型。实验还证实：对某个玩具的正确回忆不仅取决于其自身情感效价，还受前后玩具效价的影响。
AI.conclusion: 量子启发的张量网络模型能够有效捕捉情感记忆中的顺序依赖现象，其巨大精度提升证明了量子启发方法在建模顺序依赖心理现象（如情感记忆）方面的价值。同时，所提出的任务范式为儿童情感时间记忆研究提供了新的工具。

title: From Prompting to Epistemic Proactivity: Temporal Trajectories of Student-AI Interaction in Mathematics Learning
summary: GenAI is increasingly used by students as learning companions, yet little is known about how they use these tools in open-ended learning settings, where the goal is not to complete a specific task but to improve understanding and making progress. This study examined Grade-9 students' dialogue with a general-purpose LLM during mathematics practice, in which students prepared a curriculum-aligned skill for a later assessment. We investigated whether students' interactions revealed forms of epistemically proactive AI use: trajectories in which they strategically use and regulate AI to advance their understanding, and whether these trajectories predicted immediate AI-free performance on the same skill. A total of 112 students worked with a web-based LLM tutor on a mathematical-modeling task; 97 completed both AI-free pre- and post-tests. Student turns were coded for self-regulated learning functions, help-seeking content, and mathematical-modeling activity; three dimensions hypothesized to capture epistemically proactive AI use in this task. Descriptively, students' interactions showed little explicit regulation and mostly involved procedural or conceptual questions. Static summaries of AI use, including whole-session prompt functions, request types, modeling stages, and behavioral diversity, did not predict post-test performance after controlling for prior knowledge. In contrast, temporal indicators were informative: students performed better when their interactions shifted from early to late phases toward a more epistemically proactive balance of conceptual or procedural help-seeking and mathematical work, rather than verification, answer-seeking, or validation. These findings suggest that productive AI-supported learning is better understood as a domain-specific trajectory of epistemic proactivity. We discuss implications for AI tutor design and classroom orchestration.

AI.tldr: 研究九年级学生与通用大语言模型在数学练习中的对话，发现学生的学习表现与对话中从早期到晚期向更具认知主动性（概念性/程序性求助与数学工作）转变的时间轨迹相关，而非静态的AI使用指标。
AI.motivation: GenAI日益被学生用作学习伙伴，但人们对学生在开放式学习环境中如何使用这些工具知之甚少（开放式学习的目标不是完成特定任务，而是提升理解和取得进展）。
AI.method: 112名九年级学生使用基于网络的LLM辅导工具完成数学建模任务；97人完成了前后测。学生对话回合被编码为自我调节学习功能、求助内容和数学建模活动三个维度，以捕捉认知主动性的AI使用。
AI.result: 静态指标（提示功能、请求类型、建模阶段、行为多样性）无法预测后测表现；而时间动态指标具有预测性：从早期到晚期转向更具认知主动性的平衡（概念/程序求助与数学工作，而非验证、寻求答案或确认）的学生表现更好。
AI.conclusion: 高效的AI支持学习应被理解为领域特定的认知主动性轨迹，而非静态使用模式，对AI辅导工具设计和课堂组织有启示意义。

title: Faster than Fast-LTS: Robust Regression and Outlier Detection with DC Programming
summary: When datasets contain outliers, robust regression is a well-established alternative to Ordinary Least Squares. A commonly employed robust estimator is Least Trimmed Squares (LTS), which computes the regression coefficients from a subset of observations. Determining the exact solution corresponds to a combinatorial problem with prohibitive computational costs, even for instances of moderate dimension. Thus, the most prevalent approach in practice remains a heuristic known as Fast-LTS. Although the heuristic often performs effectively, certain elements of the approach remain open to improvement. In particular, its core procedure provides robust results only when initialized with a large number of starting points. To address the heuristic's limitations, this paper reformulates the LTS problem as a concave minimization problem subject to a capped simplex constraint, and proposes the successive Boosted Difference of Convex Functions Algorithm (sBDCA) as a solution method. Theoretically, we establish via the Łojasiewicz property that sBDCA converges to a local solution with a linear rate in the fastest case. To ensure robustness from a single initialization in practice, we derive and integrate a problem-specific preconditioning matrix into the algorithmic setup. Building on this theoretical foundation, we conduct numerical studies on various synthetic and real-world datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of sBDCA with preconditioning. Specifically, we show that our approach is up to 3.25 times faster than Fast-LTS and achieves up to 90% lower objective function values, particularly in high-dimensional settings. As all code is openly available, this paper further provides a practical guide to robust regression in Python.

AI.tldr: 本文针对最小修剪二乘（LTS）的精确求解是组合优化问题、计算成本高的问题，将其重新表述为带 capped simplex 约束的凹最小化问题，提出了逐次提升的差异凸函数算法（sBDCA），并从理论和实验上证明了其收敛速度快、鲁棒性强，在单初始点下即可达到比 Fast-LTS 最高快3.25倍、目标函数值低90%的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有 LTS 的精确求解是组合问题，计算成本极高；主流启发式算法 Fast-LTS 虽常用，但需要大量初始点才能获得鲁棒结果，存在效率瓶颈和改进空间。
AI.method: 将 LTS 问题重新表述为带 capped simplex 约束的凹最小化问题，提出逐次提升的差异凸函数算法（sBDCA），并利用 Łojasiewicz 性质证明其最快线性收敛到局部解。为从单初始点保证鲁棒性，推导并引入了问题特定的预条件矩阵。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，sBDCA 比 Fast-LTS 快最多3.25倍，目标函数值低最多90%，尤其在高维场景下优势显著。
AI.conclusion: sBDCA 是一种高效、鲁棒的 LTS 求解方法，单初始点即可工作，代码开源，并为 Python 实现鲁棒回归提供了实用指南。

title: Phonological Perception of Sign Language Models
summary: Sign languages are compositional systems where meaning arises by combining sublexical phonological parameters, such as handshape, location, and movement. While deep learning models for Sign Language Recognition (SLR) have achieved increased performance on translation benchmarks, it remains unclear whether these models distinguish abstract phonological features or merely rely on low-level statistical correlations. This work evaluates the phonological perception of SLR models trained on American Sign Language (ASL) by probing phonological sensitivity using minimal pairs and evaluating representational alignment with human behavioral data. Our results reveal that SLR models exhibit emergent phonological sensitivity, but with clear architectural trade-offs: pose-based models are sensitive to handshape contrasts, while pixel-based models better capture location changes. Furthermore, pose-based models learn latent representations that correlate with human perceptual similarity judgments (r~0.49). These findings suggest that while SLR models exhibit emergent phonology, current training paradigms are insufficient to scale them beyond their architectural inductive biases.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了手语识别（SLR）模型对手语音位参数的感知能力，发现模型表现出涌现性音位敏感性，但存在架构权衡：基于姿态的模型对手形对比敏感，基于像素的模型更好地捕捉位置变化。姿态模型能学到与人类感知判断相关的潜在表征（r~0.49）。
AI.motivation: 现有SLR模型在翻译基准上表现提升，但尚不清楚它们是否真正区分抽象音位特征，还是仅依赖低层统计相关性。作者希望探究SLR模型对手语音位参数的感知能力。
AI.method: 使用最小对（minimal pairs）探针和人类行为数据表征对齐分析，评估训练于美国手语（ASL）的SLR模型的音位感知能力，对比基于姿态和基于像素两种架构。
AI.result: SLR模型表现出涌现性音位敏感性；基于姿态的模型对手形敏感，基于像素的模型对位置敏感；姿态模型的潜在表征与人类感知相似度判断相关（r~0.49）。
AI.conclusion: SLR模型能涌现出一定音位感知能力，但当前训练范式不足以超越架构的归纳偏差，两种架构各有优劣。

title: The Two Genie Game: Adoption and Welfare in Audit-Grounded AI Governance
comment: 36 pages, 3 figures. Lean 4 formalization and figure scripts: https://github.com/dlewissandy/two-genie-scripts
summary:
We ask under what conditions an agent with a harm-minimizing policy can displace an approval-seeking (RLHF) agent in a competitive market, and when that policy is sufficient to prevent community harm. We use evolutionary game theory (finite-population Moran-Fermi pairwise comparison) to formalize this subject to assumptions of wisher hindsight, peer testimony, a monotone harm ledger, sufficient information density of community feedback, and a finite, depleting resource pool, in a negative-sum environment.
  We show that adoption is favored when the prior distributions on how readily wishers attune to community sentiment are monotone, exhibit endpoint inversion, and have a centro-symmetric pairing property, and demonstrate this with several long-tailed priors (Hill, Pareto, Lomax, Frechet). Where it is favored, a critical adoption level separates communities that drift back to the approval-seeking agent from those for which the audited agent fixes; above that level fixation is the overwhelmingly likely outcome. We derive when fixation is attainable as a bound on the effective (informational) size N_c of the community, which must be small enough to allow fixation before depletion. We present these as Theorems 5.4 and 5.5; the algebraic and finite-grid backbone is machine-checked in Lean 4, with the barrier-crossing asymptotics retained as explicit hypotheses.
  We show that a self-audited agent with a community ledger is not, in general, sufficient to prevent community harm. Sufficiency depends both upon the alignment of the agent's audit with community values and the timeframe over which harm is evaluated. Regardless of alignment, once adoption reaches dominance, the state is absorbing. The same policy that reduced harm under alignment becomes a trap, welfare-negative under misalignment and, even under alignment, one that locks in harm deferred past the adoption horizon.

AI.tldr: 本文通过进化博弈论分析，研究了在竞争市场中，以伤害最小化为目标的AI代理能否取代追求认可的RLHF代理，以及这种取代是否足以防止社区伤害。研究发现，在某些先验分布条件下，伤害最小化代理可能占据主导地位，但即使如此，也不能保证防止社区伤害——这取决于审计与社区价值观的对齐程度以及评估伤害的时间范围。
AI.motivation: 探究在竞争市场中，伤害最小化策略的AI代理能否取代追求认可的RLHF代理，以及这种机制是否足以防止社区伤害。
AI.method: 使用有限种群Moran-Fermi成对比较的进化博弈论形式化分析，基于愿望者事后判断、同伴证词、单调伤害账本、社区反馈信息密度等假设，在负和环境中的有限可耗尽资源池下进行分析。
AI.result: (1) 当先验分布满足单调性、端点反转和中心对称配对性质时，伤害最小化代理的采纳更有利，并用多个长尾分布验证；(2) 存在临界采纳水平，超过该水平则固定为大概率结果；(3) 固定可达到的条件是社区有效信息规模N_c足够小；(4) 自审计代理结合社区账本不足以防止社区伤害，取决于审计与社区价值观的对齐程度和评估时间范围。
AI.conclusion: 伤害最小化策略在某些条件下可以取代RLHF代理并固定，但在对齐不良或时间范围不当的情况下，同样的策略可能变成陷阱，锁定递延伤害，即使在对齐情况下也可能将伤害推迟到采纳时间窗口之后。

title: A Sliding Mode Lateral Velocity Observer
comment: 6 pages, 15 figures. Author's original manuscript of the paper published in the Proceedings of the 6th International Symposium on Advanced Vehicle Control (AVEC '02), Hiroshima, Japan, 9-13 September 2002
summary: A lateral velocity estimation scheme whose stability can be analytically derived (rather than empirically demonstrated through cut-and-try) is attempted. The designed adaptive sliding mode observer shows robust performance under a wide variety of maneuvers/ environments, including the more challenging slow J-turn on low mu.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种可解析推导稳定性的侧向速度估计方案，采用自适应滑模观测器，在多种工况（包括低附着系数路面慢J-turn）下表现鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 现有侧向速度估计方法多靠经验试凑验证稳定性，缺乏解析层面的稳定性保证，难以应对复杂工况。
AI.method: 设计了自适应滑模观测器，使稳定性可解析推导，而非仅靠经验调试。
AI.result: 在多种工况下（包括低附着系数路面的慢J-turn等挑战性场景）均表现出鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方案在稳定性分析上具有理论保障，且实际估计性能稳健，适用于复杂驾驶环境。

title: Adjusted Wasserstein distances for bridging empirical and true distributions with applications to MDS
summary: This paper examines how metric adjustments to Multidimensional Scaling (MDS) can enhance its effectiveness as a visual tool for pattern recognition. The distance under consideration, referred to as Max-D-SW, is an adjustment of the Max-Sliced Wasserstein distance. In contrast to the original formulation, which optimizes over single unit directions, Max-D-SW aggregates contributions over orthonormal bases. This modification provides a clear numerical advantage in MDS outcomes, particularly when applied to heavy-tailed distributions. We also establish sample-complexity bounds showing that Max-D-SW remains statistically tractable, with rates comparable to those of its max-sliced counterpart. Moreover, we show that a better sample complexity for a metric does not necessarily translate into better performance when the metric is used as an input for MDS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Max-D-SW的指标调整方法，通过在正交基上聚合贡献而非单一单位方向，改进了最大切片Wasserstein距离，从而增强了多维缩放（MDS）作为模式识别视觉工具的有效性，特别适用于重尾分布，并提供了统计可处理性的样本复杂度保证。
AI.motivation: 改进多维缩放（MDS）作为模式识别视觉工具的有效性，通过调整距离度量来提升其在重尾分布等复杂数据上的表现。
AI.method: 提出Max-D-SW距离，它是对Max-Sliced Wasserstein距离的调整，不是在单一单位方向上优化，而是在正交基上聚合贡献。
AI.result: Max-D-SW在MDS结果中展现出明显的数值优势，尤其在处理重尾分布时；建立了与Max-Sliced相当的可比较的样本复杂度界；发现更好的样本复杂度并不必然转化为MDS中更好的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: Max-D-SW作为MDS的输入指标能有效提升模式识别的视觉工具效果，且统计可处理性良好；但样本复杂度的优势与MDS实际性能之间不存在简单的正相关关系。

title: A Trainable-by-Parts Operator Learning Framework: Bridging DeepONet and Karhunen-Loeve Expansions for Large-Scale Applications
summary: Training operator-learning models for large-scale problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) is challenging due to the curse of dimensionality, memory constraints, and limited training data. These challenges arise in many scientific and engineering applications, including subsurface flow, climate modeling, and geological carbon storage (GCS). In this work, we propose a scalable operator-learning framework based on the Karhunen-Loeve Deep Neural Network (KL-DNN) and demonstrate its performance for modeling GCS. The model is trained on a dataset comprising 100 samples of large-scale simulations in a three-dimensional domain with 1.7 million cells and 50 time steps. The KL-DNN method constructs latent spaces using low-rank singular value decomposition of static properties and a nested Karhunen-Loeve expansion for dynamic pressure fields, enabling full-resolution predictions without subsampling or spatial coarsening. The KL-DNN model achieves an average root mean square error (RMSE) of 1.1 psi for pressure (0.04% relative error with respect to the average pressure in the domain) and RMSE of 0.0146 for CO2 saturation (5% relative error with respect to the average saturation inside the plume). The model requires 20 minutes of training on a single GPU, representing a 19% reduction in the pressure errors, 7% reduction in the saturation error, and a two-order-of-magnitude speedup compared to DeepONet trained on the same dataset. These results, along with inference time of less than one minute, establish the proposed model as a practical and accurate solution for large-scale PDE problems, enabling rapid uncertainty quantification, history matching, and real-time decision support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于KL-DNN的可扩展算子学习框架，用于大规模三维地质碳存储（GCS）模拟。模型在170万网格单元、50时间步的100个样本上训练，通过低秩SVD和嵌套Karhunen-Loève展开构建潜空间，无需下采样即可实现全分辨率预测。模型训练仅需20分钟（单GPU），压力RMSE为1.1 psi（相对误差0.04%），CO2饱和度RMSE为0.0146（相对误差5%），相比DeepONet压力误差降低19%、饱和度误差降低7%，速度快两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 大规模PDE问题面临维度灾难、内存限制和训练数据稀缺等挑战，特别是在地下流体流动、气候变化和地质碳存储等科学工程应用中，传统算子学习方法难以高效处理高分辨率三维问题。
AI.method: 提出KL-DNN框架：对静态属性使用低秩SVD构建潜空间，对动态压力场使用嵌套Karhunen-Loève展开，实现全分辨率预测而不需要子采样或空间粗化。
AI.result: 在170万网格单元、50时间步的三维GCS数据集上，压力RMSE 1.1 psi（相对误差0.04%），CO2饱和度RMSE 0.0146（相对误差5%）。训练20分钟（单GPU），推理不到1分钟。相比DeepONet，压力误差降低19%，饱和度误差降低7%，速度提升两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: KL-DNN模型是一种实用且准确的大规模PDE问题求解方案，能够支持快速不确定性量化、历史匹配和实时决策。

title: Who Plays Which Role When? Communication Role Dynamics for Peer Recognition and Team Performance Prediction
summary: Team roles offer an interpretable lens on collaboration, yet computational studies of roles often rely on domain-specific personas or data-driven clustering rather than theory-grounded taxonomies. We operationalize a taxonomy of eight communication roles grounded in education literature and annotate a corpus of 6,307 Slack messages from 55 students across 18 teams in a semester-long computer science course project. We evaluate whether LLMs can approximate expert labels, enabling scalable, taxonomy-driven role annotation. Using these role labels, we characterize role dynamics over teams' lifecycles, finding that different roles peak at different moments and that students enact a more diverse set of roles as projects progress. To evaluate the utility of our role constructs, we use them to predict peer recognition, outperforming lexical, conversational, and LLM-prompting baselines. To assess generalizability beyond the educational context, we apply the same role constructs to a public dataset (DeliData) to predict team performance improvement after deliberation, again exceeding prior performance.

AI.tldr: 本文基于教育学理论，将八种沟通角色操作化，对55名学生在课程项目中的6,307条Slack消息进行标注，验证了LLM近似专家标注的能力，揭示了角色动态随团队生命周期变化，并证明角色标签在预测同伴认可和团队绩效方面优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 计算研究中对团队角色的分析往往依赖特定领域角色设定或数据驱动聚类，缺乏理论基础的分类体系。作者希望引入教育学中经过验证的角色分类，实现可解释、可推广的团队角色自动标注。
AI.method: 1) 操作化教育学中八种沟通角色的分类体系；2) 对55名学生（18个团队）在一学期CS课程项目中的6,307条Slack消息进行标注；3) 评估LLM近似专家标注的能力；4) 分析角色动态随团队生命周期的变化；5) 用角色标签预测同伴认可；6) 在DeliData公开数据集上验证角色标签预测团队绩效改善的泛化能力。
AI.result: LLM能够有效近似专家标注；不同角色在团队生命周期不同阶段达到峰值；学生在项目推进中展现出更多样化的角色；角色标签在预测同伴认可上超越词法、对话和LLM提示基线；在DeliData上预测团队绩效改善同样超越先前水平。
AI.conclusion: 基于教育学理论的沟通角色分类体系具有可操作性、可扩展性和泛化能力，能够有效捕捉团队协作中的关键动态，并在预测同伴评价和团队绩效方面优于现有方法。

title: An Approximate Conjugate Subgradient Algorithm with Matrix Parameter for Derivative-Free Nonsmooth Optimization Problems
summary: We propose a derivative-free matrix conjugate-subgradient method for unconstrained nonsmooth optimization of locally Lipschitz functions. The method constructs discrete gradients using only function values and forms a finite sampled model of the Goldstein subdifferential. A minimal-norm element of the convex hull of the sampled discrete gradients is then computed and used both as a stationarity measure and as the reference vector for generating descent-oriented directions. To improve robustness beyond the basic steepest-descent direction, we introduce a matrix memory correction together with coefficient damping, diagonal scaling, bounded-angle correction, and matrix-stability safeguards. A two-point line-search procedure with enrichment is used to obtain either a serious step or an improved local model. Under suitable consistency assumptions on the discrete-gradient approximation and line-search sampling, the method generates directions satisfying a safeguarded descent property and computes approximate Goldstein stationary points. Numerical experiments on nonsmooth test problems with dimensions up to 1000 show that both proposed variants are robust for lower and medium accuracy requirements, while the matrix conjugate-subgradient variant remains the most reliable under the strictest tolerance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无导数的矩阵共轭次梯度方法，用于求解局部Lipschitz函数的无约束非光滑优化问题。该方法仅使用函数值构造离散梯度，形成Goldstein次微分的有限采样模型，通过矩阵记忆校正、系数阻尼等技术提升鲁棒性，数值实验表明该方法在低中精度要求下表现稳健。
AI.motivation: 现有无导数优化方法在处理非光滑、局部Lipschitz函数时，缺乏高效且鲁棒的求解方案，特别是在维度较高时，传统方法可能收敛缓慢或不稳定。
AI.method: 1) 仅使用函数值构造离散梯度，对Goldstein次微分进行有限采样建模；2) 计算采样离散梯度凸包的最小范数元素，作为平稳性度量和下降方向参考向量；3) 引入矩阵记忆校正（含系数阻尼、对角缩放、有界角度修正和矩阵稳定性保护）；4) 采用带富集策略的两点线搜索，实现严肃步或改进局部模型。
AI.result: 在维度高达1000的非光滑测试问题上，两种变体在低中精度要求下均表现稳健；在严格精度容差下，矩阵共轭次梯度变体最为可靠。
AI.conclusion: 基于离散梯度近似和线搜索采样的一致性假设，该方法能生成满足受保护下降性质的方向，并计算近似Goldstein平稳点，是非光滑优化中一种鲁棒且高效的无导数方法。

title: AnTenA: Actionable and Explainable Tensor Analysis System with Large Language Models
summary:
Accurately explaining hidden patterns in multi-aspect data has typically been done by leveraging labels and/or accompanying auxiliary metadata. However, labels and auxiliary data may be inaccurate (e.g. nonstandard, inconsistent), insufficient (e.g. static tabular metadata for time-dependent recordings), or unavailable. %
We propose \fullmethod (\method), which leverages the knowledge of large language models (LLMs) to explain the hidden patterns in human narratives. \method uses task-agnostic and task-specific prompts to explain extracted co-clustered latent patterns from tensor decomposition. To evaluate these explanations, we test the LLMs on forward and backward inference tasks. % Our demo system is available at https://github.com/dawonahn/ECML_PKDD_AnTenA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnTenA方法，利用大语言模型（LLMs）的知识来解释多维度数据中隐藏的模式，通过任务无关和任务特定的提示来解释张量分解提取的共聚类潜在模式，并在前向和反向推理任务上评估解释效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标签或辅助元数据来解释多维度数据的隐藏模式，但这些数据可能存在不准确、不充分或不可用的问题。
AI.method: 利用LLMs的知识，通过任务无关和任务特定的提示，解释从张量分解中提取的共聚类潜在模式。
AI.result: 在前向和反向推理任务上评估LLMs的解释能力。
AI.conclusion: AnTenA方法能有效利用LLMs解释多维度数据中的隐藏模式，无需依赖传统标签或元数据。

title: TrajRS: Towards Certified Robustness in Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction
comment: Accepted by 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing
summary: The robustness of trajectory prediction models is crucial for developing safe autonomous driving systems. Adversarial attacks on trajectory prediction can significantly impair the accuracy of predicted trajectories, leading to hazardous driving behaviors. While heuristic defense strategies have been implemented to enhance the robustness of trajectory prediction models, these measures often fail against more sophisticated, targeted adversarial attacks. Hence, there is a pressing need to establish verifiable safety assurances for trajectory prediction models. In this paper, we extend the traditional Randomized Smoothing framework to "TrajRS", which provides a certified robust radius for smoothed trajectory predictors. We clarify and expand the formal definitions of robustness in trajectory prediction and tailor the practical TrajRS scheme specifically to "robustness for the optimal prediction" and "robustness for all possible predictions". An extensive set of experiments demonstrates that TrajRS effectively achieves robustness certification for all smoothed pedestrian trajectory predictors in this work.

AI.tldr: 论文提出TrajRS框架，将随机平滑扩展到轨迹预测领域，为平滑后的轨迹预测器提供可认证的鲁棒半径，分别针对"最优预测鲁棒性"和"所有可能预测鲁棒性"给出形式化定义和认证方法。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型的防御策略在面对复杂的针对性对抗攻击时往往失效，缺乏可验证的安全保证，亟需为轨迹预测模型建立可认证的鲁棒性保障。
AI.method: 将传统随机平滑(Randomized Smoothing)框架扩展到轨迹预测领域，提出TrajRS框架；明确并扩展了轨迹预测中鲁棒性的形式化定义，针对"最优预测鲁棒性"和"所有可能预测鲁棒性"设计了具体的认证方案。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，TrajRS能够为所有经平滑处理的行人轨迹预测模型有效实现鲁棒性认证。
AI.conclusion: TrajRS成功将随机平滑引入轨迹预测，为自动驾驶系统中的轨迹预测模型提供了可验证的安全保障，填补了该领域可认证鲁棒性的空白。

title: Detection-Control Games under Hidden Modes: Resilience-Induced Blindness Phenomenon
summary: This paper studies resilient control for cyber-physical systems operating under hidden degraded or compromised modes. We formulate hidden-mode detection and belief-dependent control as a game between two decision makers with different objectives: the detector seeks informative belief updates, while the controller seeks regulation performance. This objective mismatch shows why the usual separation intuition between detector design and controller design may fail, leading to a performance-reversal phenomenon induced by the resilience of the controller. For a two-mode linear Gaussian system, we theoretically characterize this phenomenon by linking the resilience margin to the log-likelihood evidence. The analysis shows that a well-performing controller with a large resilience margin can suppress mode-dependent information and slow belief adaptation, which in turn degrades the control performance. The resilience-induced blindness phenomenon and its mitigation are illustrated in numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了隐藏模式下信息物理系统的弹性控制问题，揭示了控制器弹性会导致模式信息被抑制，从而引发"弹性致盲"现象，并提出了理论分析和缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 传统直觉认为检测器设计与控制器设计可以分离，但本文发现这种分离直觉在隐藏退化或受损模式的CPS中可能失效，因为检测器追求信息更新而控制器追求调节性能，两者目标不一致。
AI.method: 将隐藏模式检测与信念依赖控制建模为两个决策者之间的博弈，针对双模式线性高斯系统，理论刻画了弹性裕度与对数似然证据之间的联系，解释了性能反转现象。
AI.result: 性能良好、弹性裕度大的控制器会抑制模式相关信息，减缓信念更新，反而导致控制性能下降。通过数值仿真验证了弹性致盲现象及其缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: 弹性控制存在"弹性致盲"的副作用，需在控制器设计与检测器设计之间取得平衡，不能简单分离处理。

title: Notes on generative modeling: flow matching, diffusion, optimal transport and Schr{ö}dinger bridge
summary: These notes recapitulate the high level mathematical principles behind different techniques for generative modeling. I show the connections between optimal transport and standard techniques such as Schr{ö}dinger bridge and flow matching.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了生成建模中不同技术背后的高级数学原理，揭示了最优传输与薛定谔桥、流匹配等标准技术之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 作者希望从统一的数学视角理解生成建模中看似不同的技术，并揭示它们之间的深层联系，特别是最优传输与主流方法之间的关系。
AI.method: 采用数学笔记的形式，从高层数学原理出发，通过理论推导和概念梳理，建立最优传输、薛定谔桥和流匹配等技术之间的形式化联系。
AI.result: 系统地展示了最优传输理论与薛定谔桥、流匹配等生成模型方法之间的数学关联和等价性。
AI.conclusion: 最优传输可作为连接多种生成建模技术的统一理论框架，为理解和设计新的生成模型提供了数学基础。

title: A Gravitational Interpretation of Fine-Tuning Reversion
summary: Fine-tuning on harmless data can partially undo behaviors acquired earlier in training. Safety can erode under benign post-alignment updates, unlearned capabilities can re-emerge, latent traits can transfer through apparently unrelated supervision, and related post-alignment fragility appears in other generative settings. We argue these phenomena are usefully viewed through a common training-history lens. Our hypothesis is geometric: large early training phases create dominant behavioral manifolds, while later alignment or specialization phases are shallower displacements from them. Subsequent fine-tuning can therefore inherit a persistent reversion component pointing back toward a witness of the dominant manifold. We call this the gravitational interpretation of fine-tuning reversion. Across our main settings, representational drift rapidly acquires a component along a history-defined reversion direction (v_rev). In our main track, alignment with v_rev rises from cos = 0.429 +/- 0.052 after the first update to 0.647 +/- 0.021 by step 20. Across 24 run-step pairs, every observed alignment exceeds the p99 of an isotropic activation-space null. We demonstrate that selectively blocking motion along v_rev changes the final alignment at T=100 from 0.648 +/- 0.009 to -0.211 +/- 0.021 and reduces harmfulness from 19.0% +/- 4.0% to 8.5% +/- 1.5% with little task cost. These results support v_rev as a causally relevant mediator of early post-alignment reversion in our setup. Importantly, we do not claim that v_rev is the unique safety direction, nor that the dominant manifold is directly observed; rather, we identify a robust, history-defined direction that explains and partially controls early reversion dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"微调引力"假说：早期训练形成的主导行为流形会在后续微调中产生"回退引力"，使模型能力/安全性退化。通过识别历史定义的回归方向（v_rev），可预测并部分控制这种早期回退现象。
AI.motivation: 微调无害数据会部分逆转早期训练获得的行为；安全对齐后的小更新会侵蚀安全性、已遗忘能力会重现、潜在特征会通过无关监督迁移。现有工作缺乏对这些后对齐脆弱性的统一解释框架。作者试图从训练历史的角度，提出一个几何层面的统一假说。
AI.method: 1) 提出"引力解释"：早期训练形成主导行为流形，后期对齐/微调只是浅层偏移，后续微调会产生指向主导流形的持久回退成分。2) 定义并追踪历史定义的回归方向（v_rev）。3) 通过沿v_rev方向的选择性阻断（selective blocking）验证其因果作用。
AI.result: 1) 对齐v_rev从第一次更新的0.429±0.052快速上升到第20步的0.647±0.021。2) 24个run-step对的观测对齐值均超过各向同性激活空间零假设的p99。3) 选择性阻断v_rev方向运动：最终对齐从0.648±0.009变为-0.211±0.021；有害率从19.0%±4.0%降至8.5%±1.5%，任务性能损失很小。
AI.conclusion: v_rev是一个因果相关的早期后对齐回退中介因子。但作者强调v_rev不是唯一的"安全方向"，主导流形也未被直接观测到。该方法识别了一个由历史定义的鲁棒方向，能解释并部分控制早期回退动力学。

title: Verifying Restrictions on Frontier AI Research
comment: 12 pages. Accepted to the Second Workshop on Technical AI Governance Research (TAIGR) at ICML 2026
summary: The premature development of artificial superintelligence poses major risks to humanity, so researchers have proposed international agreements halting such development until it can be done safely. AI progress depends primarily on compute, algorithms, and data; a durable halt would address all three so that advances in one input do not counteract restrictions on another. Improvements to AI algorithms are driven largely through research activities, so this research may need to be restricted during a halt. Given low international trust, signatories will want to verify compliance. This paper analyzes how such restrictions on AI research could be verified, while remaining agnostic about what specific research would be prohibited. It first explores key considerations that affect the verifiability of research restrictions, such as the computational infrastructure necessary for experiments. It then catalogs 28 candidate verification mechanisms. These mechanisms include whistleblowers, search warrants, reviews of AI training code, standard intelligence gathering tools, and more. Some of these mechanisms are not yet implementation-ready, and some might be undesirable upon further inspection. By examining the space of potential options, this work provides a foundation for future research to develop the most promising mechanisms into deployable tools.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何核查国际上对人工智能研究实施的限制，以确保在超级智能安全发展之前暂停相关研究。论文分析了影响可核查性的关键因素，并提出了28种核查机制，为未来研究奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 过早开发人工超级智能对人类构成重大风险，因此研究者提出通过国际协议暂停此类开发，直至其能被安全实现。
AI.method: 论文首先分析了影响研究限制可核查性的关键因素（如实验所需的计算基础设施），然后系统梳理了28种候选核查机制。
AI.result: 识别出28种核查机制，包括举报人、搜查令、AI训练代码审查、标准情报收集工具等，其中部分机制尚未准备好实施，部分可能经进一步审查后不被采纳。
AI.conclusion: 通过对潜在选项的考察，本文为未来研究开发最有前景的机制并将其转化为可部署工具提供了基础。

title: Modern Theory of Gradient-Based Optimization
comment: 21 pages, 8 figures, to appear in Proceedings of the International Congress of Chinese Mathematicians (ICCM) 2025
summary: In this review, we offer a comprehensive survey of emerging techniques in gradient-based optimization, with a particular emphasis on the interplay between ordinary differential equation (ODE) perspectives and their extensions into discrete Lyapunov analysis. We begin by examining the acceleration mechanisms underlying Nesterov's accelerated gradient method for strongly convex functions (NAG-SC) and Polyak's heavy-ball method, identifying the gradient-correction term as the primary driver of acceleration. This mechanistic insight is substantiated through high-resolution ODE modeling and the systematic construction of Lyapunov functions. We then synthesize recent advancements in convex optimization regarding NAG and its proximal generalization, the fast iterative shrinkage-thresholding algorithm (FISTA). Key topics include the accelerated convergence of gradient norms, underdamped acceleration, linear convergence under strong convexity, and novel Lyapunov frameworks for establishing convergence and monotonicity properties of generalized accelerated methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate how these ODE approximations and Lyapunov techniques can be extended to provide a unified framework for analyzing advanced optimization algorithms, including the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM), the primal-dual hybrid gradient (PDHG) method, and their respective accelerated variants. Finally, we discuss recent progress in minimax optimization and outline future directions for extending Lyapunov-based analysis to saddle-point problems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于梯度优化的新兴技术，重点探讨了常微分方程（ODE）视角与离散Lyapunov分析之间的相互作用。从Nesterov加速梯度和Polyak重球法的加速机制入手，通过高分辨率ODE建模和Lyapunov函数构建阐明核心机理，并拓展至FISTA、ADMM、PDHG等高级优化算法的统一分析框架，最后讨论了极小极大优化的最新进展及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 旨在系统梳理梯度优化中加速方法的深层机制，通过ODE和Lyapunov分析提供统一的理论视角，填补不同优化算法之间理论分析的鸿沟，并为极小极大等复杂优化问题提供新工具。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率ODE建模与离散Lyapunov函数构造相结合的方法，从连续时间动力系统角度解释加速梯度方法的本质，并推广至ADMM、PDHG等多种优化算法的统一分析框架。
AI.result: 揭示了梯度修正项是加速的核心驱动力；建立了NAG-SC与重球法的统一Lyapunov分析框架；将ODE-Lyapunov方法成功推广至ADMM、PDHG及其加速变体；在凸优化中实现了梯度范数的加速收敛、欠阻尼加速及强凸条件下的线性收敛等关键结果。
AI.conclusion: ODE视角与Lyapunov分析为理解和设计加速优化算法提供了强大且统一的工具，未来可进一步拓展至鞍点问题和非凸优化等更广泛的领域。

title: SEATauBench: Adapting Tool-Agent-User Evaluation Into Low-Resource Southeast Asian Languages
summary: While AI development and evaluation for Southeast Asia (SEA) has grown rapidly, agent capabilities in regional languages are still poorly understood despite its importance to sovereign AI. To fill this gap, we introduce SEATauBench, the first agent-focused evaluation framework for SEA sovereign AI. SeaTau adapts TauBench to five languages -- Mandarin, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, and Filipino -- and evaluates agents across progressively localized settings that vary the language of user-agent interaction, tool specifications, and task domains. Across three recent models, we find that English agent capabilities transfer reasonably well when only the conversation language changes, but quality and robustness degrade sharply as more task contexts are localized, with the largest losses in full domain adaptation. We also the limits of English-only agent assessment for measuring agent capabilities in SEA languages. More broadly, SeaTau provides a diagnostic benchmark and reusable adaptation pipeline for building reliable multilingual agents for linguistically diverse regions. Data and code can be accessed at github.com/SEACrowd/SEATauBench.

AI.tldr: SEATauBench是首个针对东南亚主权AI的智能体评估框架，覆盖五种语言（中文、越南语、泰语、印尼语、菲律宾语），发现仅改变对话语言时英语智能体能力迁移尚可，但随本地化程度加深（尤其是完整领域适应）性能急剧下降，揭示了仅用英语评估的局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管东南亚AI发展迅速，但区域语言中的智能体能力评估仍存在空白，这对主权AI至关重要。
AI.method: 将TauBench适配到五种东南亚语言，设计逐步本地化设置（改变交互语言、工具说明、任务领域），评估三个近期模型在不同本地化程度下的表现。
AI.result: 英语智能体能力在仅改变对话语言时迁移较好，但随着更多任务上下文本地化，质量和稳健性急剧下降，完整领域适应时损失最大。
AI.conclusion: SEATauBench为多语言智能体评估提供了诊断性基准和可复用的适配流程，揭示了纯英语评估在衡量东南亚语言智能体能力时的局限性。

title: ComMem: Complementary Memory Systems for Test-Time Adaptation of Vision-Language Models
comment: A brain-inspired complementary memory framework leveraging fast visual caching and slow textual refinement for VLM test-time adaptation
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) of vision-language models (VLMs) is essential for their robust deployment in dynamic, real-world environments. However, existing TTA methods often adapt locally without accumulating knowledge over time, or operating within a single modality without exploiting VLMs' inherently multi-modal nature. Inspired by the \textbf{Com}plementary \textbf{Mem}ory systems of the biological brain, we propose \textbf{ComMem}, an innovative approach that mimics the distinct but cooperative roles of the hippocampus and neocortex to enable effective TTA for VLMs. ComMem consists of two key components: a fast-adapting detailed memory, akin to the hippocampus, that forms a dynamic visual cache from high-confidence test samples; and a slow-integrating abstract memory, akin to the neocortex, that continually refines global textual prototypes. For each test instance, ComMem jointly optimizes both memory systems to ensure cross-modal consistency. Extensive experiments on 15 benchmark datasets show that ComMem significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods under both natural distribution shifts and cross-dataset generalization, offering a promising direction for enhancing VLMs' practical adaptability.

AI.tldr: ComMem是一种受生物互补记忆系统启发的视觉语言模型测试时自适应方法，通过海马体式的快速适应细节记忆（动态视觉缓存）和 neocortex 式的慢速整合抽象记忆（全局文本原型）协同工作，在15个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM测试时自适应方法存在两个问题：一是局部适应而不随时间积累知识，二是限于单模态操作而未利用VLM的多模态特性。受生物大脑互补记忆系统启发，需要一种能跨模态、持续积累知识的自适应方法。
AI.method: ComMem包含两个核心组件：1) 快速适应细节记忆（类似海马体）：从高置信度测试样本构建动态视觉缓存；2) 慢速整合抽象记忆（类似新皮层）：持续优化全局文本原型。对每个测试实例，联合优化两个记忆系统以保持跨模态一致性。
AI.result: 在15个基准数据集上，ComMem在自然分布偏移和跨数据集泛化两种场景下均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ComMem通过模拟生物互补记忆系统，有效解决了VLM测试时自适应中的知识积累和跨模态利用问题，为提升VLMs在实际环境中的适应能力提供了有前景的方向。

title: Divergence-based Safety Measure for Large Language Models via Rational Inattention
summary: This paper proposes a divergence-based safety measure for large language models (LLMs) under embedding-input attacks. The proposed measure quantifies the worst-case Kullback--Leibler divergence between the clean and attacked LLMs' output distributions, subject to a stealthiness constraint. This constraint is constructed by leveraging the equivalence between transformer attention used in LLMs and rational inattention modeling human decision-making. We analyze the proposed divergence-based safety measure by investigating perfectly undetectable attacks and deriving its upper bound through a Bregman-divergence argument. The proposed safety measure is applied to two pretrained causal language models, GPT-2 and GPT-Neo-125M, to show nontrivial output-distribution shifts, illustrating that the measure can distinguish model-level safety profiles.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于散度的LLM安全度量方法，利用注意力机制与理性疏忽的等价性构建隐蔽性约束，通过KL散度量化攻击下输出分布偏移，并在GPT-2和GPT-Neo上验证了其区分模型安全性的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全评估缺乏统一的理论度量框架，难以量化嵌入输入攻击下模型输出分布的安全风险，且未充分利用注意力机制与人类决策建模的关联。
AI.method: 1) 定义最坏情况KL散度作为安全度量，约束攻击的隐蔽性；2) 利用Transformer注意力与理性疏忽的等价性构建隐蔽性约束；3) 分析完美不可检测攻击并推导Bregman散度的上界。
AI.result: 在GPT-2和GPT-Neo-125M上展示了非平凡的输出分布偏移，证明该度量能有效区分不同模型的安全轮廓。
AI.conclusion: 该散度度量可作为分析LLM鲁棒性的理论工具，为模型安全评估提供可量化、可比较的框架。

title: Highly Data Parallelizable Estimation of the Sliced-Wasserstein Distance Using Cumulative Distribution Functions
summary: The Sliced Wasserstein (SW) distance has emerged as a computationally attractive alternative to the Wasserstein distance by leveraging one-dimensional optimal transport along random projections. Standard estimators of the SW distance rely on Monte Carlo averages of one-dimensional Wasserstein distances computed via quantile functions, which require sorting projected samples and access to full datasets. In this work, we introduce a new class of estimators for the Sliced Wasserstein distance based on cumulative distribution functions (CDFs) of projected measures, that avoid sorting and scale via massive dataset parallelism. This class includes several estimators, some of them being indexed by hyperparameters controlling their variance or smoothness. We show that they are especially well suited to scenarios in which CDFs are more tractable than quantile functions, such as mixtures of Gaussians, and moreover that they are also naturally compatible with federated learning, since CDFs of projected data can be computed and aggregated locally without requiring the exchange of raw samples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于累积分布函数（CDF）的新一类Sliced Wasserstein距离估计器，避免了传统方法中的排序操作，支持大规模数据集并行和联邦学习场景。
AI.motivation: 传统的Sliced Wasserstein距离估计依赖蒙特卡洛平均和分位数函数，需要排序投影样本并访问完整数据集，计算效率低且不适合分布式场景。
AI.method: 基于投影测度的累积分布函数（CDF）构造估计器，替代传统基于分位数函数的方法；引入超参数控制方差和平滑度；支持CDF的局部计算与聚合。
AI.result: 新估计器避免了排序操作，支持大规模并行计算；在混合高斯等CDF比分位数函数更易处理的场景中表现优异；天然兼容联邦学习框架。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CDF基估计器为Sliced Wasserstein距离提供了更高效、可扩展的计算方式，尤其适用于大规模数据和隐私保护场景。

title: NIVA: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Actionable Earth System Intelligence
summary: Recent advances in AI-driven weather and climate modeling have improved forecast skill while reducing computational cost. However, existing data-driven approaches are limited in their ability to model coupled Earth system dynamics, which is required for extending predictability beyond the ~2-week horizon. To address this, we introduce NIVA, a multimodal foundation model designed to learn unified representations across Earth system components. While the full framework targets atmosphere, ocean, ice, and land interactions, we focus here on a two-modality setting (ocean and atmosphere) as a controlled proof of concept to evaluate whether foundation models can learn coupled dynamics. Trained on large-scale Earth system simulations, NIVA learns physically meaningful cross-modal structure, providing a foundation for subseasonal-to-seasonal prediction. As initial validation, we show that NIVA captures key modes of climate variability through accurate prediction of major climate indices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NIVA，一个多模态基础模型，通过学习地球系统组件（如海洋和大气）的联合表征，旨在突破数据驱动模型在超越两周预报窗口时的耦合动力学建模限制。在双模态（海洋-大气）概念验证中，模型成功捕获了关键气候变率模态，为次季节到季节预测奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 现有AI天气气候模型虽提升了预报技能和计算效率，但无法有效建模地球系统的耦合动力学，这限制了超越两周可预报性的延伸。因此需要发展能够统一学习多圈层交互的表征模型。
AI.method: 提出NIVA多模态基础模型，在大规模地球系统模拟数据上训练，学习跨模态的物理结构。本文聚焦于海洋和大气双模态设置作为受控概念验证。
AI.result: NIVA通过学习物理上有意义的跨模态结构，成功捕获了主要气候变率模态，并准确预测了主要气候指数，验证了模型学习耦合动力学的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态基础模型能够学习地球系统的耦合动力学，为次季节到季节预测提供了新的基础框架。双模态概念验证的成功表明该方法可扩展至更完整的地球系统组件。

title: Four Types of LLM Reliance and Their Predictors Among Undergraduate Writers: A Mixed-Methods Study at a Minority-Serving R1 University
summary: Although most undergraduates now use large language models (LLMs), a form of generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) for academic writing, no validated method distinguishes the qualitatively different ways students rely on them. Existing instruments assess reliance solely by frequency of use, a measure that, as this study shows, inadvertently rewards dependence on AI rather than recognizing students' own intellectual contribution. Conducted at a public minority-serving university and grounded in the AI Literacy Framework, Expectancy-Value Theory, and Biggs's Presage-Process-Product model, the study drew on 382 undergraduates, 14 interviews, and 396 open-ended survey responses. Four distinct reliance types were identified and confirmed: Strategic (34.3%), Instrumental (30.9%), Dialogic (30.4%), and Dependent (4.5%). Students' value and cost beliefs predicted the intensity of their reliance on LLMs, whereas their AI literacy predicted the type of reliance they adopted, indicating that differentiated support is needed. Notably, Strategic users, those who engaged AI most deliberately, scored lowest on standard outcome measures. This pattern reflects a limitation of current instruments, which index AI's contribution rather than writing quality, thereby penalizing students who show the greatest independent thinking. Analysis also revealed an additional group, roughly 13%, who declined to use AI for ethical rather than practical reasons, and who existing frameworks overlook. These findings carry implications for AI literacy programs, the measurement of student learning outcomes, and equitable AI policy at minority-serving institutions.

AI.tldr: 本研究基于382名本科生、14次访谈和396份开放式问卷，识别出四种不同的LLM使用类型（策略型34.3%、工具型30.9%、对话型30.4%、依赖型4.5%），发现AI素养预测使用类型而价值信念预测使用强度，且策略型用户在传统评估中得分最低，揭示了现有频率测量工具的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有工具仅通过使用频率评估学生对LLM的依赖程度，这种测量方式无意中奖励了依赖AI的行为而非认可学生的自主智力贡献，且缺乏区分不同依赖类型的验证方法。
AI.method: 基于AI素养框架、期望-价值理论和Biggs的Presage-Process-Product模型，在少数族裔服务公立大学开展混合方法研究，包含382名本科生问卷调查、14次访谈和396份开放式问卷回应。
AI.result: 识别并验证四种依赖类型：策略型(34.3%)、工具型(30.9%)、对话型(30.4%)和依赖型(4.5%)；学生的价值和成本信念预测LLM使用强度，AI素养预测使用类型；策略型用户在标准结果测量中得分最低。
AI.conclusion: 现有频率测量工具存在根本局限，它衡量的是AI贡献而非写作质量，惩罚了最具独立思维的学生。此外约13%因伦理而非实际原因拒绝使用AI的学生被现有框架忽视，对AI素养项目、学习成果测量和少数族裔服务机构的公平AI政策具有重要启示。

title: Approximation and Controllability of Nonlinear Control-Affine Systems via Semiautonomous Neural Ordinary Differential Equations
summary: In this paper, we introduce controlled semiautonomous neural ordinary differential equations (controlled SA-NODEs) for the approximation and learning of nonlinear controlled dynamical systems. The proposed framework extends semiautonomous neural ODEs to control-affine systems while preserving reduced parameter complexity through time-independent trainable coefficients. We establish a universal approximation theorem showing that controlled SA-NODEs approximate trajectories of nonlinear controlled systems uniformly on compact sets of initial conditions and admissible controls. Under additional Sobolev and Barron regularity assumptions, we derive quantitative approximation estimates of order $\mathcal{O}(P^{-1/2}+Q^{-1/2})$. We further prove that approximate controllability properties of the original nonlinear system are preserved under the controlled SA-NODE approximation. Numerical experiments on controlled pendulum and Duffing oscillator systems demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves accurate trajectory reconstruction and controllability performance with significantly fewer trainable parameters than classical neural ODE architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出受控半自主神经常微分方程（controlled SA-NODEs），用于近似和学习非线性受控动力系统，在保持较少可训练参数的同时，实现了轨迹重建与可控性性能的精确逼近，并给出了统一的泛逼近定理和定量逼近估计。
AI.motivation: 现有神经ODE方法在处理受控系统时参数复杂度过高，且缺乏对控制仿射系统的有效建模框架，本文旨在提出一种参数高效且具备理论保证的替代方案。
AI.method: 将半自主神经ODE扩展至控制仿射系统，引入时间无关的可训练系数以降低参数复杂度；建立泛逼近定理；在Sobolev和Barron正则性假设下推导定量逼近估计；证明原系统的近似可控性在逼近下得以保持。
AI.result: 在受控摆和Duffing振荡器系统上的数值实验表明，该框架在轨迹重建和可控性方面表现准确，且可训练参数数量显著少于经典神经ODE架构。
AI.conclusion: controlled SA-NODEs 提供了一种参数高效、理论完备的受控非线性动力系统学习方法，兼具逼近精度和可控性保持能力。

title: DriftGuard: Safety-Aware Multi-Monitor Detection and Selective Adaptation for Evolving Toxicity Moderation
summary: Automated toxicity moderation systems operate in dynamic online environments where harmful behavior evolves through coded language, shifting targets, and strategic adaptation to enforcement. Existing drift detection methods often focus on global distributional change, but such signals may miss safety-relevant shifts that emerge in localized harm subspaces or high-risk model-error regions. This paper introduces DriftGuard, a safety-aware adaptive moderation framework that combines multi-monitor drift detection with selective model updating. The framework tracks global text drift, identity-harm drift, model uncertainty, toxic-risk drift, and false-negative-risk drift. When safety-relevant change is detected, the model is updated using a hard-mix adaptation set that prioritizes likely false negatives, identity-related high-risk examples, false-positive-risk examples, and uncertain boundary cases. Experiments on Civil Comments temporal shift and Jigsaw-to-DynaHate cross-dataset shift show that safety-aware monitors detect risks missed by global drift alone. Hard-mix adaptation improves toxic recall and accuracy over no-update and random-balanced baselines, raising toxic recall to 0.8777 on Civil Comments and from 0.7107 to 0.8523 on DynaHate. Bootstrap analysis further shows stable DynaHate safety gains, with toxic recall increasing by 0.1418 and false-negative prevalence decreasing by 0.0781. Overall, DriftGuard links safety-aware drift detection to targeted, lightweight model updating for more robust adaptive toxicity moderation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 DriftGuard，一种安全感知的自适应毒性内容审核框架，通过多监测器漂移检测（全局文本漂移、身份伤害漂移、模型不确定性、毒性风险漂移、假阴性风险漂移）和硬混合自适应模型更新，在动态在线环境中提升毒性审核的鲁棒性。实验证明该方法能检测到全局漂移遗漏的安全风险，并显著提升毒性召回率。
AI.motivation: 现有漂移检测方法主要关注全局分布变化，但忽视了局部有害子空间或高错误率区域中出现的与安全相关的漂移信号，导致毒性审核系统难以应对在线环境中不断演化的有害行为（如暗语、目标转移等）。
AI.method: DriftGuard 框架包含两大部分：(1) 多监测器漂移检测，涵盖全局文本漂移、身份伤害漂移、模型不确定性、毒性风险漂移和假阴性风险漂移；(2) 当检测到安全相关变化时，使用硬混合（hard-mix）自适应更新集进行选择性模型更新，该更新集优先选取假阴性、身份相关高风险样本、假阳性风险样本和不确定边界样本。
AI.result: 在 Civil Comments 时间偏移和 Jigsaw-to-DynaHate 跨数据集偏移实验中：安全感知监测器比全局漂移检测能更早发现风险；硬混合自适应将 Civil Comments 的毒性召回率提升至 0.8777，将 DynaHate 毒性召回率从 0.7107 提升至 0.8523；Bootstrap 分析显示 DynaHate 毒性召回率提升 0.1418，假阴性率降低 0.0781。
AI.conclusion: DriftGuard 成功地将安全感知的漂移检测与定向、轻量级的模型更新相结合，为动态环境下的鲁棒毒性内容审核提供了有效方案。

title: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?
summary: LLM agents are expected to act over multiple turns, using search, browsing interfaces, and terminal tools to complete user goals. Yet not every goal is well specified or achievable in the available environment. In such cases, a reliable agent should recognize that further interaction is unlikely to help and abstain from additional tool calls. We define Agentic Abstention, the problem of deciding when an agent should stop acting under uncertainty. Unlike standard LLM abstention, which is usually evaluated as a single-turn answer-or-abstain decision, agentic abstention is a sequential decision problem: an agent can answer, abstain, or gather more information at each turn, and the need to abstain may only become clear after interacting with the environment. We study this problem across web shopping, terminal environments, and question answering, evaluating 13 LLM-as-agent systems and 2 agent scaffolds on more than 28,000 tasks. Our results show that the main challenge is not only whether agents can abstain, but also when they abstain. Some agents never abstain when they should, while others do so only after many unnecessary interactions. This gap is especially large on tasks where the instruction appears feasible until the environment reveals otherwise (e.g., no valid result matches the instruction). We further find that model scale, reasoning, and agent scaffolding affect abstention in different ways, where larger or more capable models sometimes perform worse at timely abstention. Finally, we introduce CONVOLVE, a context engineering method for improving agentic abstention that distills full interaction trajectories into reusable stopping rules. On WebShop, CONVOLVE substantially improves timely abstention without updating model parameters, raising Llama-3.3-70B's timely recall rate from 26.7 to 57.4. Our dataset and code are available at https://lhannnn.github.io/agentic-abstention

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Agent在不确定环境下何时应停止行动的问题（Agentic Abstention），通过28,000+任务评估了13个LLM-as-agent系统和2个agent框架，发现主要挑战不在于能否拒绝，而在于何时拒绝。作者提出CONVOLVE方法，通过上下文工程将完整交互轨迹蒸馏为可复用的停止规则，在WebShop上将Llama-3.3-70B的及时拒绝率从26.7提升至57.4。
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型拒绝（LLM abstention）研究通常聚焦于单轮问答场景，但实际LLM Agent需要在多轮交互中决定何时停止。Agent可能在看似可行的指令下执行多次无用操作后才意识到目标无法实现，因此需要研究Agent在不确定环境下的序列化停止决策问题。
AI.method: 1. 定义Agentic Abstention为序列决策问题（可回答、拒绝或继续收集信息）；2. 在网页购物、终端环境和问答三个场景下对13个LLM-as-agent系统和2个agent框架进行超过28,000个任务的评估；3. 提出CONVOLVE方法，通过上下文工程将完整交互轨迹蒸馏为可复用的停止规则。
AI.result: 1. 主要挑战不在于Agent能否拒绝，而在于何时拒绝——有些Agent从不拒绝，有些则在大量无效交互后才拒绝；2. 在指令看似可行但环境揭示不可行的任务上差距尤为明显；3. 模型规模、推理能力和agent框架对拒绝行为有不同影响，更大或更强模型有时在及时拒绝上表现更差；4. CONVOLVE在WebShop上将Llama-3.3-70B的及时拒绝率从26.7提升到57.4，无需更新模型参数。
AI.conclusion: Agentic Abstention是一个重要的序列决策问题，当前Agent系统需要在及时拒绝方面显著改进。CONVOLVE提供了一种无需参数更新的有效解决方案，但整体上Agent的合理停止决策仍需进一步研究。

title: An Integrated Two-Stage Deep-Learning Tool for Rapid Post-Hurricane Damage Identification and Repair Scheduling
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables; submitted to the 2026 North American Power Symposium (NAPS 2026)
summary: Post-hurricane damage assessment and repair scheduling can require computationally intensive simulation and optimization. This paper presents an integrated two-stage deep-learning tool for rapid damaged-line identification and repair-schedule computation. An available offline synthetic dataset for the IEEE 9500-node test feeder contains 1,700 hurricane scenarios with exposure features, grid metadata, fragility parameters, OpenDSS outputs, damaged-line labels, and Adaptive Large Neighborhood Search reference schedules. Stage 1 benchmarks MLP, ResMLP, and GraphSAGE, while Stage 2 compares MLP, DeepSets, and Set Transformer. The selected ResMLP-Set Transformer pipeline propagates Stage 1 errors into Stage 2 and achieves a damaged-job F1-score of 0.920, pairwise order agreement of 0.854, and start- and end-time mean absolute errors of 4.349 min and 4.486 min, respectively. The tool provides rapid initial repair-log decision support for new hurricane cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个两阶段深度学习工具，用于飓风后配电网的快速损坏线路识别和修复调度计算。在第一阶段，使用ResMLP模型识别损坏线路；第二阶段使用Set Transformer模型计算最优修复顺序。该工具在IEEE 9500节点测试馈线上训练，最终实现了0.920的损坏作业F1分数和0.854的成对顺序一致性，能为新飓风案例提供快速的初始修复日志决策支持。
AI.motivation: 飓风后配电网的损坏评估和修复调度通常需要大量的计算资源进行仿真和优化，传统方法效率低下，难以满足灾害响应的时效性需求。因此需要一种快速、准确的工具来支持应急决策。
AI.method: 本文采用两阶段深度学习管道：第一阶段（损坏线路识别）比较MLP、ResMLP和GraphSAGE三种模型；第二阶段（修复调度计算）比较MLP、DeepSets和Set Transformer三种模型。最终选用ResMLP（第一阶段）和Set Transformer（第二阶段）的组合管道，并将第一阶段的预测误差传播到第二阶段。训练数据使用包含1,700个飓风场景的离线合成数据集。
AI.result: ResMLP-Set Transformer管道在损坏作业F1分数上达到0.920，成对顺序一致性为0.854，开始时间和结束时间的平均绝对误差分别为4.349分钟和4.486分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该工具能够为新的飓风案例提供快速的初始修复日志决策支持，在保证精度的同时大幅提升计算效率，适用于灾害应急响应场景。

title: Extrapolating from Regularised Solutions for Solving Ill-Conditioned Linear Systems in Machine Learning
summary: Rapid prototyping of algorithms is a critical step in modern machine learning. Most algorithms exploit linear algebra, creating a need for lightweight numerical routines which -- while potentially sub-optimal for the task at hand -- can be rapidly implemented. For the numerical solution of ill-conditioned linear systems of equations, the standard solution for prototyping is Tikhonov-regularised inversion using a nugget. However, selection of the size of nugget is often difficult, and the use of data-adaptive procedures precludes automatic differentiation, introducing instabilities into end-to-end training.
