Together, these results show that MedEvoEval provides a concrete basis for evaluating whether doctor agents improve through experience, transfer useful behavior, and retain earlier capabilities over time.

AI.tldr: MedEvoEval是一个面向门诊场景的纵向可执行评估框架，支持对医生智能体在多轮诊疗决策与跨轮次经验累积能力进行系统性评估，并提供了700个处理后的病例、执行器、评分脚本等完整工具链。
AI.motivation: 现有基准无法充分评估医生智能体在门诊场景中的多轮决策（证据收集、检查资源使用、诊疗结论确定）与跨轮次经验演化（记忆、检索、反思等更新机制）能力。
AI.method: 将每个源病例转化为角色特定的患者视图、检查视图和管理员视图；证据仅通过有效动作揭示；每条记录包含结构化轨迹，链接观察、动作、最终输出、管理员评分和可选的经验回写。提供700个病例的执行器与评估工具。
AI.result: 轨迹分析暴露了最终答案评分隐藏的过程成本，展示了MDT会诊式资源再分配效果，支持记忆成熟度、跨域迁移、更新阶段响应和向后保持等纵向分析。
AI.conclusion: MedEvoEval为评估医生智能体是否通过经验改进、迁移有用行为、随时间保持早期能力提供了具体评估基础。

title: Quantifying Realizable Flexibility Limits in Fast and Ultra-Fast EV Charging Using Real-World Data
comment: 53 pages, 21 figures. Submitted for journal review
summary: The rapid growth of electric vehicles (EVs) is increasing the need to accurately quantify their flexibility as a resource for power system operation. However, most existing approaches rely on simplified or power-controllable models that overlook the intrinsic constraints of fast and ultra-fast DC charging. In practice, flexibility is fundamentally shaped by battery management system (BMS) behavior, connection time availability, and battery-protection limits. This paper introduces a trajectory-aware data-driven framework to quantify EV charging flexibility as an energy-bounded and time-constrained process. Based on 252 real charging sessions, 141 representative Power-SoC profiles are reconstructed to capture real-world charging dynamics. Unidirectional flexibility is defined through bounds on the maximum shiftable charging energy, while bidirectional flexibility is quantified as the bounds of the maximum extractable discharge energy under feasibility constraints. Results show that flexibility depends on charging state and connection time. Charging beyond 80% SoC increases duration with limited gains, while higher charger power saturates due to BMS limits. Charging time in the 20%-80% range drops by over 60%, and mean power increases by up to 40%. The maximum extractable bidirectional energy can exceed twice its value depending on the point at which flexibility is activated. These results highlight that EV flexibility is not a controllable resource, but a bounded and time-dependent capability. As such, the proposed framework provides actionable limits that can be directly used by system operators and aggregators for scheduling, peak shaving, and short-duration flexibility services.

AI.tldr: 本文基于252次真实充电数据，提出了一种轨迹感知的数据驱动框架，量化电动汽车在直流快充条件下的充放电灵活性。研究发现灵活性受BMS约束和充电状态影响，充电超过80% SoC收益有限，20%-80%区间时间缩短60%以上，可提取的双向能量可翻倍。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用简化或功率可控模型，忽略了直流快充中BMS行为、连接时间可用性和电池保护限制等固有约束，导致无法准确量化EV的实际灵活性。
AI.method: 基于252次真实充电会话构建141个代表性Power-SoC曲线，提出轨迹感知的数据驱动框架，分别定义单向灵活性（最大可转移充电能量边界）和双向灵活性（最大可提取放电能量边界）。
AI.result: 充电超过80% SoC后持续时间增加但收益有限；更高充电功率因BMS限制饱和；20%-80%区间充电时间下降超60%，平均功率提升达40%；双向可提取能量因激活时间不同可翻倍。
AI.conclusion: EV灵活性不是可控资源，而是有界且时间依赖的能力。该框架可为系统运营商和聚合商提供调度、削峰和短时灵活性服务的可操作边界。

title: Optimization Dynamics Imprint Semantic Specificity in Contrastive Embedding Norms
summary: Contrastive embedding models trained with scale-invariant losses are typically paired with distance metrics like cosine similarity, effectively ignoring embedding magnitudes. However, surprisingly, empirical studies reveal that despite this, these "discarded" norms seem to correlate with semantic properties such as concept specificity, token frequency, and human uncertainty. In this work, we provide a formal theoretical framework explaining this phenomenon. By analyzing the optimization dynamics, we derive an analytic formula demonstrating that embedding length naturally encodes this information as a byproduct of the training process. We also show how this gives rise to signals that can serve as "free" calibration tools in specific models and retrieval tasks, providing a grounded explanation for a previously heuristic observation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出正式理论框架，解释对比学习嵌入模型中被丢弃的向量范数为何能自然编码语义信息（如概念具体性、词频等），并证明其可作为免费校准工具。
AI.motivation: 经验观察发现对比学习模型中嵌入向量的范数（通常被忽略）意外地与语义属性相关，但缺乏理论解释。作者希望从理论上阐明这一现象的根本原因。
AI.method: 通过分析对比学习（scale-invariant损失）的优化动力学，推导出解析公式，证明嵌入长度在训练过程中作为副产物自然编码了语义信息。
AI.result: 推导出嵌入范数与语义属性之间的解析关系；证明该信号可作为特定模型和检索任务中的免费校准工具。
AI.conclusion: 为之前仅基于经验观察的启发式方法提供了理论支撑，揭示了对比学习中范数的语义编码机制及其实际应用价值。

title: When More Sampling Hurts: The Modal Ceiling and Correlation Ceiling of Test-Time Scaling
comment: 24 pages, 10 figures, 3 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/bay-yearick-lab/sampling-ceilings
summary: People overthink; language models over-sample, and the extra effort can talk both into a worse answer. Reasoning systems answer a hard question by sampling it many times (test-time scaling), and the more they draw, the more often a correct answer turns up somewhere, so coverage, the fraction of problems with at least one correct try, climbs and appears to be progress. But a deployed system must return one answer, and choosing it, not knowing which try is right, is selection; selection is capped, and past a point extra samples only make the model surer of a confident mistake, even as every draw adds cost. The gap between climbing coverage and stalled selection, the identifiability gap, is the answer a model can produce but not pick. So the real question is not whether to sample but how far, and the answer is: not far. For picking an answer, the vote has already settled within a few dozen draws, the modal ceiling; for scoring a benchmark, sooner still, the correlation ceiling. Beyond that, extra draws cost compute and add nothing, and can even make the answer worse. This paper turns the cutoff into a single number, the effective number of samples, that any sampling run already reveals. The bottleneck is recognizing a right answer, not generating one.

AI.tldr: 论文指出，语言模型过度采样会导致性能不升反降。虽然增加采样次数能提升覆盖率（至少有一个正确答案的问题比例），但在需要返回单一答案时，模型的选择能力存在上限——即"可识别性差距"（identifiability gap）。研究表明，投票结果在几十次采样内就已稳定（众数上限），评估基准的相关性更早达到上限（相关性上限）。论文提出一个单一指标"有效样本数"（effective number of samples）来指导采样截断，核心瓶颈在于识别正确答案，而非生成它。
AI.motivation: 当前推理系统通过大量采样（test-time scaling）来提升性能，但忽视了在需要返回单一答案时的选择困境。随着采样次数增加，即使覆盖率上升，模型的最终选择质量反而可能下降，导致资源浪费和性能退化。
AI.method: 论文提出了"可识别性差距"（identifiability gap）概念，量化了模型能生成但无法正确选择正确答案的程度。通过分析采样次数与选择性能的关系，定义了"众数上限"（modal ceiling）和"相关性上限"（correlation ceiling），并引入"有效样本数"（effective number of samples）作为采样截断的指导指标。
AI.result: 发现采样次数超过几十次后，投票结果趋于稳定（众数上限）；评估基准的相关性更早达到上限（相关性上限）。超过这些阈值后，额外采样不仅浪费计算资源，还可能降低回答质量。
AI.conclusion: 核心瓶颈在于识别正确答案而非生成它。采样并非越多越好，应基于有效样本数进行合理截断，避免过度采样导致的性能退化和计算浪费。

title: Spreading the Risk of Scalable Legal Services: The Role of Insurance in Expanding Access to Justice
comment: 13 pages, presented at the 2024 JURIX AI Conference at Stanford Law School
summary: Liability insurance for AI-powered legal services offers a promising solution to two critical barriers in using AI to expand access to justice: mitigating catastrophic risk to individual users from inadequate advice and ensuring meaningful accountability when failures occur. Existing accountability mechanisms face significant challenges: tort liability frameworks encounter barriers including judgment-proof providers and costly information asymmetries, while current regulatory approaches revolve around human oversight requirements, creating cost and scalability barriers which limit access to justice. This Article argues that an insurance-based framework offers a promising response to these challenges by distributing risks across users while establishing market-driven incentives for quality improvement through performance-based premiums. The Article proposes a comprehensive insurance model for AI legal services that establishes clear risk thresholds, streamlined compensation mechanisms, and continuous performance monitoring. Rather than attempting to eliminate all risks through restrictive ex-ante oversight requirements or relying on ineffective ex-post remedies, insurance enables efficient risk spreading while facilitating the scaling of automated legal services. This framework demonstrates how carefully structured insurance mechanisms can help realize AI's transformative potential to democratize legal assistance while maintaining robust user protections through sophisticated risk management rather than direct oversight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过责任保险框架解决AI法律服务中的灾难性风险与责任追究难题，以风险分配和市场激励机制替代传统的人类监督和侵权责任模式，促进AI法律服务规模化并保障用户权益。
AI.motivation: 现有AI法律服务面临两大障碍：个体用户可能因AI建议不充分而遭受灾难性风险，以及出现失误时缺乏有效追责机制。传统侵权责任面临赔偿能力不足和信息不对称问题，而现行监管依赖人类监督，造成成本高、可扩展性差，限制了司法可及性。
AI.method: 提出基于保险的综合框架，包括明确风险阈值、简化赔偿机制、持续性能监控、绩效挂钩保费等机制，以风险分散和市场激励替代事前限制性监管和事后低效补救。
AI.result: 保险框架能够实现高效风险分散，推动AI法律服务规模化，同时通过精密的风险管理而非直接监管来维护用户保护水平。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的保险机制可以在保持用户保护的前提下，释放AI在民主化法律服务方面的变革潜力。

title: AdaGrad does not adapt to Hölder-smoothness for composite objectives
summary: We exhibit a simple deterministic one-dimensional convex composite optimization problem for which AdaGrad scheme does not achieve the classical convergence rate $\mathcal{O}(n^{-(1+ν)/2})$ associated with Hölder-smooth objectives. The example highlights a basic mismatch between classical AdaGrad accumulation and composite optimality. A main insight is that the gradient of the smooth term may not vanish at the optimum, causing AdaGrad to keep reducing its stepsize excessively and converge more slowly. We also discuss why alternative accumulation mechanisms based on gradient mappings or on successive gradient differences, avoid this pathology.

AI.tldr: 本文发现AdaGrad在一类简单的一维凸复合优化问题中无法达到Hölder光滑目标下经典收敛率O(n^{-(1+ν)/2})，原因是光滑项梯度在最优解处可能不为零，导致步长过度衰减。文章还讨论了基于梯度映射或梯度差的替代累积机制可避免此问题。
AI.motivation: 揭示AdaGrad在复合优化场景下的理论收敛缺陷，指出其梯度累积机制与复合最优性之间的不匹配，推动更鲁棒的自适应优化器设计。
AI.method: 构造一个简单的一维确定性凸复合优化反例，通过理论分析展示AdaGrad步长因梯度不消失而过度衰减，并与梯度映射/梯度差累积机制进行对比。
AI.result: 证明AdaGrad在该反例上的收敛速度慢于理论预期的Hölder光滑收敛率；而替代累积机制可恢复该收敛率。
AI.conclusion: AdaGrad的经典梯度平方和累积机制在复合优化中存在根本性缺陷，梯度映射或梯度差累积是更优选择。

title: Memory-Managed Long-Context Attention: A Preliminary Study of Editable Request-Local Memory
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Preliminary technical report
summary: Long-context language models often conflate two different goals: compressing history into an efficient state, and maintaining reliable long-term memory. Linear, recurrent, and sparse attention reduce the cost of processing long sequences, but they do not by themselves specify when a fact should be written, overwritten, protected from distractors, or discarded. We study memory-managed long-context attention, a research route that separates a fast recurrent or sparse backbone from explicit editable request-local memory slots and query-time sparse fallback. Across structured synthetic tasks, token/chunk/sequence bridges, generated natural language, and local frozen-model diagnostics, pure fixed-state or pure sparse methods fail some overwrite, version, anti-pollution, or no-write-signal cases, while a hybrid covers both routes. A small 2,097,152-token mechanism stress test reaches 50/50 pooled accuracy with 2-132 active chunks. A 2.74M-parameter minimal causal event-token model reaches 595/600 with lite write supervision, supporting proof of trainability rather than scale. A six-family frozen-hidden-state bridge reaches 1079/1080 controlled pointer accuracy, but it uses generator-provided integer key IDs and separately encoded canonical key strings; it is an oracle-metadata probe, not open-text entity resolution. Local non-leaderboard RULER 4K diagnostics remain close to full context, whereas a 33-record LongBench v1 16K subset shows that naive lexical selection is not general. The evidence separates three claims: controlled slot lifecycle is feasible, sparse fallback is needed when writes lack future-query signals, and learned open-domain selection remains the main architectural bottleneck. We do not claim a final generative architecture, global slot-trajectory convergence, or systems superiority.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨长上下文语言模型中记忆管理机制的设计，提出将快速循环/稀疏主干网络与显式可编辑请求局部记忆槽相结合的混合架构，并通过多项实验证明：受控槽生命周期是可行的，当写入缺乏未来查询信号时需要稀疏回退，而学习型开放域选择仍是当前架构的主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 长上下文语言模型常混淆"压缩历史为高效状态"和"维护可靠长期记忆"两个目标。线性、循环和稀疏注意力虽降低了长序列处理成本，但未明确何时写入、覆盖、保护或丢弃事实。本文旨在研究记忆管理型长上下文注意力机制，分离记忆管理职责。
AI.method: 将快速循环/稀疏主干网络与显式可编辑请求局部记忆槽和查询时稀疏回退分离。在结构化合成任务、词元/块/序列桥接、生成自然语言和局部冻结模型诊断上进行系统评估，并与纯固定状态和纯稀疏方法对比。
AI.result: 纯固定状态和纯稀疏方法在覆盖、版本、抗污染或无写入信号场景下均失败，而混合方法覆盖两种路径。2百万词元压力测试达50/50准确率（2-132个活跃块），2.74M参数因果事件词元模型达595/600（轻量写监督），六族冻结隐藏状态桥接达1079/1080控制指针准确率（但依赖oracle元数据）。
AI.conclusion: 分离了三个主张：受控槽生命周期可行；当写入缺乏未来查询信号时需要稀疏回退；学习型开放域选择仍是主要架构瓶颈。未声称完整的生成架构、全局槽轨迹收敛或系统优越性。

title: Expert Evaluation of Clinical AI Tools on Real Point-of-Care Clinical Queries
summary: Physicians now pose millions of clinical questions to AI tools each week, yet these tools are evaluated largely on hypothetical or exam-style questions, not those actually asked in practice. We report a blinded evaluation built on 620 Real-world Point-Of-Care Queries (Real-POCQi) submitted to the OpenEvidence (OE) platform by physicians spanning 30 specialties, as well as 187 questions from HealthBench. 149 practicing physicians across 36 states made head-to-head comparisons between answers from three frontier general-purpose models (Claude Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.5) and a specialized clinical tool (OE), with graders matched to each question's specialty. When comparing answers along five dimensions relevant to clinical decision support -- accuracy, clinical utility, source quality, verifiability, & completeness -- physicians scored the specialized tool highest on all axes; in the primary analysis on Real-POCQi, win differences (margins between win and loss rates) ranged from 25 to 39 percentage points (p<0.001). Results remained consistent in sensitivity analyses stratifying by citation display, answer length, OE-user status, and Real-POCQi versus HealthBench. In parallel, LLM judges were found to systematically differ from expert judges, though both generally agreed on the best model. These findings underscore two conclusions: (i) AI tool evaluations should reflect real-world query distributions and use expert judges that mirror the specialization defining modern medicine and (ii) the consistent advantage of the specialized tool over general-purpose models does not necessarily mean that the latter cannot serve similar purposes, but that targeted engineering and customization can yield meaningful gains in performance for its users. We release Real-POCQi as a public benchmark, as well as the prespecified statistical analysis for reproducing results of this study.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了包含620个真实临床查询的基准（Real-POCQi），由149名执业医师盲法比较专业临床工具（OpenEvidence）与三个通用前沿模型（Claude Opus 4.8、Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.5）的回答。专业工具在准确性、临床实用性、来源质量、可验证性和完整性五个维度上均显著优于通用模型（胜率差25-39个百分点，p<0.001）。研究还发现LLM评估者与专家评估者存在系统性差异。
AI.motivation: 当前AI医疗工具主要基于假设性或考试式问题评估，而非真实的临床实践问题。医生每周向AI工具提出数百万个临床问题，但缺乏基于真实世界查询的盲法评估，导致评估结果可能脱离实际临床需求。
AI.method: 收集620个来自OpenEvidence平台的真实临床查询（Real-POCQi）及187个HealthBench问题；邀请149名执业医师（覆盖36个州、30个专科）作为评估者；在准确性、临床实用性、来源质量、可验证性、完整性五个维度上进行盲法比较；评估专业工具（OpenEvidence）与三个通用模型（Claude Opus 4.8、Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.5）。
AI.result: 专业工具在所有五个维度上均得分最高；在Real-POCQi上，胜率差（胜率与负率之差）为25-39个百分点（p<0.001）；在引用显示、回答长度、用户状态等敏感性分析中结果一致；LLM评估者与专家评估者存在系统性差异，但两者在最佳模型选择上基本一致。
AI.conclusion: （i）AI工具评估应基于真实世界查询分布，并使用反映现代医学专业化的专家评估者；（ii）专业工具的持续优势并不意味着通用模型无法服务类似目的，而是表明针对性的工程优化和定制化能带来有意义的性能提升。研究公开了Real-POCQi基准和预设统计分析方案。

title: LEO-NA Walker Constellation Design with Bi-objective Optimisation Approaches
summary: Low Earth Orbit (LEO) constellation design for navigation augmentation (NA) has attracted increasing attention in navigation satellite system studies, yet balancing navigation performance and deployment cost remains a fundamental challenge. To address this issue, this paper proposes a bi-objective optimization framework for LEO Walker constellation design. The problem is formulated as a bi-objective optimization model with constellation cost and positioning accuracy as objectives. In the formulation, PDOP tail risk and satellite visibility are incorporated into the objective formulation to better characterize navigation performance. The Pareto-optimal solution set isobtained using the Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II). Simulation results show that, under the same satellite deployment cost, the proposed LEO-NA Walker constellation improves the average number of visible satellites by 42.5% and 24.4%, and reduces the mean PDOP by 18.9% and 10.5% compared with representative Polar and optimized-LFC constellations, respectively, thereby enhancing service continuity and resource utilization efficiency. These results provide useful guidance for the design and deployment of LEO-NA constellations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对LEO导航增强星座设计中导航性能与部署成本的平衡问题，提出了一种基于NSGA-II的双目标优化框架，通过同时优化星座成本和定位精度（含PDOP尾部风险与卫星可见性），在相同成本下相比Polar和优化LFC星座，可见卫星数提升42.5%和24.4%，平均PDOP降低18.9%和10.5%。
AI.motivation: LEO星座导航增强设计面临导航性能与部署成本之间的根本性权衡，现有方法难以有效平衡二者，亟需一种能够同时优化这两个目标的系统化框架。
AI.method: 将问题建模为以星座成本和定位精度为目标的双目标优化模型，目标函数中引入PDOP尾部风险和卫星可见性以更好刻画导航性能，采用NSGA-II算法求解Pareto最优解集。
AI.result: 在相同部署成本下，所提LEO-NA Walker星座相比Polar和优化LFC星座，平均可见卫星数分别提升42.5%和24.4%，平均PDOP分别降低18.9%和10.5%，提升了服务连续性和资源利用效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提双目标优化框架能够有效指导LEO导航增强星座的设计与部署，在成本约束下获得更优的导航性能。

title: Closed-Form Steepest Descent Direction toward Flat Minima: Reducing Upper Bounds on the Loss Hessian Eigenspectrum in Neural Networks
summary: The flatness hypothesis suggests that flatness of the loss landscape, as measured by the eigenvalues of the loss Hessian, correlates with better neural network generalization. While various algorithms reduce these eigenvalues, most focus on procedural design, leaving it unclear how data distributions and NN parameters structurally determine directions toward flat minima. Characterizing these directions analytically is generally intractable. To overcome this mathematical difficulty, recent studies derived the Wolkowicz-Styan (WS) upper bound on the maximum eigenvalue of the cross-entropy loss Hessian in three-layer NNs. Although this upper bound is differentiable, its gradient was not derived. Therefore, we analytically derive the gradient of the WS upper bound to characterize directions leading to flat minima. Based on this, we propose Hessian Spectral Range (HSR) Regularization, which updates parameters along the steepest descent direction of the WS bound. Experiments demonstrate that HSR Regularization narrows the Hessian eigenvalue spectrum, avoids sharp minima and saddle points, and promotes convergence to flat minima. Although the applicability of this method is currently limited to cross-entropy loss and three-layer architectures, to the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first study to report a closed-form gradient that promotes convergence to flat minima without numerical approximations. Therefore, the theoretical analysis of this gradient is expected to contribute to the further development of NNs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对三层神经网络，推导了交叉熵损失Hessian矩阵最大特征值Wolkowicz-Styan上界的解析梯度，并提出HSR正则化方法，沿该梯度下降方向更新参数以促进收敛到平坦最小值，实验表明该方法能缩小Hessian谱范围、避免尖锐极小点和鞍点。
AI.motivation: 现有降低损失Hessian特征值的方法多聚焦于程序性设计，缺乏对数据分布和网络参数如何从结构上决定平坦最小值方向的理论理解，且解析刻画这些方向在数学上极其困难。
AI.method: 推导了Wolkowicz-Styan上界关于网络参数的解析梯度，提出Hessian Spectral Range (HSR) Regularization，沿该梯度的最速下降方向更新参数，从而在训练中显式缩小Hessian特征值谱范围。
AI.result: HSR正则化能够缩小Hessian特征值谱范围，避免尖锐极小点和鞍点，促进收敛到平坦最小值。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个无需数值近似就能以闭式梯度促进收敛到平坦最小值的研究，尽管目前仅适用于交叉熵损失和三层架构，但其理论分析有望推动神经网络的进一步发展。

title: The Body as Status: Muscularity, Engagement, and Body Image Risk on #GymTok
summary: Body image concerns among boys and young men are increasingly oriented toward muscularity, with social media serving as a central context for communicating and evaluating these ideals. While prior research has focused on the thin-ideal, less is known about how the muscular-ideal is represented and reinforced on visual social media platforms. This study examines (1) dominant content themes, (2) perceived harm to body image, and (3) engagement patterns across #GymTok, a muscularity-oriented fitness subculture on TikTok. We conducted a content analysis of 2,210 #GymTok videos annotated by clinical experts across themes like self-objectification, rigid dieting, excessive exercise, supplement and steroid use, and masculinity. Annotators also rated the perceived harm of videos to the viewers' body image, and depicted bodies were coded according to muscularity level. Perceived harm varied across content themes, with supplement- and steroid-related content rated as most harmful. Engagement was positively associated with both muscularity and perceived harm: videos depicting more muscular bodies and those rated as more harmful received greater views, likes, shares, and comments. Although less prevalent, masculinity-focused content generated the highest engagement. These findings suggest that TikTok may not only expose users to muscular ideals and potentially harmful behaviors, but also algorithmically amplify them. By increasing the visibility of highly muscular and harmful content, recommendation systems may intensify social comparison processes, while objectification elevates the muscular body into a marker of status, masculinity, and social worth. Together, these dynamics may contribute to body image risk among boys and young men.

AI.tldr: 本研究对TikTok上#GymTok的2,210个视频进行内容分析，发现肌肉理想、有害内容（尤其是补充剂和类固醇相关）与高参与度正相关，表明平台可能通过算法放大此类内容，加剧年轻男性的身体意象风险。
AI.motivation: 以往研究多关注"瘦理想"，但对社交媒体中"肌肉理想"的呈现与强化机制知之甚少，特别是针对男性群体。
AI.method: 对2,210个#GymTok视频进行内容分析，由临床专家对自我物化、严格节食、过度运动、补充剂与类固醇使用、男子气概等主题进行标注，评估视频对观众身体意象的感知危害，并编码身体肌肉程度。
AI.result: 感知危害因内容主题而异，补充剂和类固醇相关内容被评为最有害；参与度与肌肉程度和感知危害正相关；男子气概内容虽不常见但参与度最高。
AI.conclusion: TikTok不仅向用户展示肌肉理想和潜在有害行为，还可能通过算法放大这些内容，增强社会比较过程与物化，从而加剧男孩和年轻男性的身体意象风险。

title: Semi-discrete convex order and Laguerre tessellation fitting
summary: Laguerre tessellations offer an efficient way to parameterize a large class of convex partitions of Euclidean space using only a set of points and scalar weights. For this reason, they have become popular in computational geometry, imaging and numerical analysis, both as a modeling and a discretization tool. In this paper we study the problem of reconstructing a Laguerre tessellation with prescribed cell volumes from the barycenters of its cells. We establish a geometric interpretation of this problem in terms of the set of discrete measures dominated in convex order by an absolutely continuous measure. In particular, we show that the reconstruction problem can be solved approximately by computing a Wasserstein projection onto this set. More generally, our method can also be applied to fit a Laguerre tessellation to an arbitrary set of barycenters. We give a concrete application of this in materials science, of fitting a Laguerre tessellation to an electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) image of a steel.

AI.tldr: 本文研究从给定胞体重心重建具有指定胞体体积的Laguerre剖分问题，建立了该问题与离散测度在凸序意义下被绝对连续测度控制的关系，并证明可通过计算Wasserstein投影近似求解，最后在材料科学中应用于EBSD图像拟合。
AI.motivation: Laguerre剖分是一种高效的凸剖分参数化工具，广泛应用于计算几何、成像和数值分析。然而，如何从已知的胞体重心和体积约束重建Laguerre剖分是一个重要但尚未充分解决的问题，本研究旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 将重建问题转化为离散测度在凸序意义下被绝对连续测度控制的几何问题，进而通过计算该集合上的Wasserstein投影来近似求解。
AI.result: 建立了重建问题与测度论之间的几何联系，证明了可通过Wasserstein投影近似求解，并成功应用于材料科学中钢的EBSD图像拟合。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法不仅能从给定胞体重心和体积约束重建Laguerre剖分，还可推广到拟合任意重心集的Laguerre剖分，在实际材料科学中具有应用价值。

title: PASTA: A Paraphrasing And Self-Training Approach for Knowledge Updating in LLMs
summary: Knowledge updating in pre-trained Large Language Models (LLMs) remains an important challenge. While continual training provides a potential avenue for knowledge updating, it continues to present substantial technical difficulties. Furthermore, LLMs often struggle with accurately answering questions about specific factual information, such as news articles - a capability limitation widely recognized in the research community. This paper proposes PASTA, a simple yet powerful framework for integrating detailed factual information from news articles as new knowledge into LLMs, with the primary goal of building specialized models that accurately answer questions about this knowledge. Our framework combines data augmentation, question-answering generation, and a novel self-learning DPO process that simultaneously enables knowledge overwriting and hallucination suppression. We provide insights into effective knowledge updating through systematic analysis of learning parameters and data configurations. In our experimental evaluation with web articles published after the base model's knowledge cutoff, PASTA achieved remarkable improvement from 0.02 to 0.82 accuracy while maintaining general language capabilities, demonstrating its effectiveness for creating domain-specialized LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出PASTA框架，通过数据增强、问答生成和自学习DPO方法，成功将新闻文章中的事实知识注入LLM，准确率从0.02提升至0.82，同时保持通用语言能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在知识更新方面存在技术困难，尤其难以准确回答涉及新闻文章等特定事实信息的问题，需要一种有效方法将新知识注入模型。
AI.method: 提出PASTA框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 数据增强，(2) 问答对生成，(3) 自学习DPO（直接偏好优化）过程，同时实现知识覆盖和幻觉抑制。
AI.result: 在知识截止日期后发布的网络文章评估中，准确率从0.02大幅提升至0.82，且通用语言能力得以保持。
AI.conclusion: PASTA框架能够有效将新闻事实信息注入LLM，构建领域专业化模型，为知识更新提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Customized Generative AI Agent for Transportation Engineering Practice: A Development and Continued Pre-training Guideline
summary: Recent advancements in generative artificial intelligence (AI) and large language models (LLMs) have shown significant promise in automating complex reasoning, summarization, and question-answering tasks. However, the effectiveness of general-purpose LLMs in specialized engineering domains remains limited due to insufficient exposure to technical standards, engineering terminology, and domain-specific semantics. This study proposes a systematic approach to developing a customized generative AI agent for transportation engineering applications. A curated corpus of U.S. transportation manuals, design guidelines, and regulatory documents is used to conduct continued pretraining of six state-of-the-art LLMs through a unified low-rank adaptation (LoRA) framework. The training process is monitored to ensure convergence and model stability. Performance is evaluated using standard natural language processing metrics, including BLEU-4 and ROUGE, with Qwen2.5-7B and LLaMA-3.1-8B demonstrating the highest domain alignment and response quality. Results validate the effectiveness of LoRA-based adaptation in improving LLM performance on technical content interpretation and context-specific reasoning. This work contributes a reproducible development framework for constructing domain-specialized generative AI agents, supporting broader deployment in transportation research, design, planning, and policy analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LoRA微调框架的系统方法，通过美国交通工程领域的技术文献对六个大语言模型进行持续预训练，开发出面向交通工程的专用生成式AI代理。实验表明Qwen2.5-7B和LLaMA-3.1-8B在领域对齐和响应质量上表现最优。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型在交通工程等专业工程领域表现受限，原因是缺乏对技术标准、工程术语和领域语义的充分接触，亟需开发领域特化的生成式AI代理。
AI.method: 构建了包含美国交通手册、设计指南和监管文件的语料库，通过统一的LoRA框架对六个最新LLM进行持续预训练，并监控训练过程的收敛性和模型稳定性。
AI.result: Qwen2.5-7B和LLaMA-3.1-8B在BLEU-4和ROUGE等指标上表现最佳，验证了LoRA自适应方法能有效提升LLM在技术内容解读和上下文推理方面的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提供了可复现的领域特化生成式AI代理开发框架，可支持交通工程研究、设计、规划和政策分析等领域的广泛应用。

title: End-to-End Abstraction-Based Control with LLM-Enhanced NL-to-LTL Translation
summary: Abstraction-Based Controller Design (ABCD) offers a principled framework for the safe control of complex Cyber-Physical Systems (CPSs), but interfacing real-world requirements with its formal synthesis machinery remains a major bottleneck: such requirements are most naturally expressed in Natural Language (NL), whereas ABCD requires formal specifications such as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL). Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising way to bridge this gap by translating NL requirements into formal specifications. This paper makes three contributions. First, we formalize an LLM-enhanced pipeline for ABCD, in which NL requirements are translated into LTL and used within a formal synthesis workflow. Second, we implement this pipeline in the Dionysos toolbox and introduce a benchmark for evaluating NL-to-LTL translation under both logical diversity and linguistic variation. Third, through experiments with state-of-the-art LLMs, we show that translation accuracy degrades systematically as the target specifications become more complex, across several measures including Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) size, temporal depth, and Büchi automaton size, while also accounting for the length of the NL input. These results reveal a scaling law that links LLM success rate to the intrinsic complexity of the underlying LTL formula. Together, these contributions provide both an evaluation framework and a practical integration pathway for making ABCD more accessible while preserving the rigor of formal methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用大语言模型（LLM）将自然语言需求自动翻译为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范，从而桥接抽象控制器设计（ABCD）形式化框架与真实世界需求之间的鸿沟。作者形式化了LLM增强的ABCD流水线，在Dionysos工具箱中实现，并通过实验揭示了LLM翻译成功率随LTL公式复杂度（如AST大小、时间深度等）呈系统性下降的缩放规律。
AI.motivation: ABGD形式化框架要求输入LTL等严格形式化规范，而真实世界中的需求通常以自然语言表达，两者之间存在巨大的语义鸿沟，成为该框架实际应用的主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) 形式化了一个LLM增强的ABCD流水线，将NL需求翻译为LTL；2) 在Dionysos工具箱中实现该流水线，并构建了包含逻辑多样性和语言变体的NL-to-LTL翻译基准测试；3) 使用多个SOTA LLM进行实验，分析翻译准确率与规范复杂度（AST大小、时间深度、Büchi自动机大小、NL输入长度）之间的关系。
AI.result: LLM的翻译准确率随目标规范复杂度的增加而系统性地下降，该现象在多种复杂度度量（AST大小、时间深度、Büchi自动机大小）上均成立，揭示了LLM翻译成功率与LTL公式内在复杂度之间存在缩放规律。
AI.conclusion: 本文既提供了一个评估框架，也为将LLM集成到ABCD形式化方法中提供了实践路径，在提升框架易用性的同时保持了形式化方法的严谨性。

title: Entropy Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Zero-Sum Stochastic Differential Games in a Regime-Switching Jump-Diffusion Process
summary: To address parameter misspecification and sudden structural environmental changes in conventional stochastic differential game (SDG) frameworks, this paper introduces a distributional control approach that characterizes optimal strategies as probability distributions over actions, conditioned on the continuous state, the discrete regime state, and parameters. This forms a reinforcement learning framework for entropy-regularized zero-sum stochastic differential games (ERRL-ZSSDGs) in a regime-switching jump-diffusion process. Using the dynamic programming principle (DPP), we derive the associated coupled systems of Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman-Isaacs (HJBI) equations, from which equilibrium strategies are expressed via gradients of the value function. For linear-quadratic problems, semi-analytical solutions for both value function and equilibrium strategies are obtained by solving a system of coupled ordinary differential equations (ODEs). In more general settings, an Actor-Critic policy improvement algorithm is developed to approximate the value functions and equilibrium policies across different regimes. The method is applied to an investment game, and numerical examples illustrate the effect of the temperature parameter and regime transitions on optimal policies and values.

AI.tldr: 本文针对随机微分博弈中的参数误设和结构突变问题，提出一种分布控制方法，将最优策略建模为基于连续状态、离散机制状态和参数的条件概率分布，构建了机制切换跳扩散过程中的熵正则化零和随机微分博弈强化学习框架，并推导了HJBI方程、半解析解及Actor-Critic算法，最后通过投资博弈验证了方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统随机微分博弈框架存在参数误设定（parameter misspecification）和结构性环境突变（sudden structural environmental changes）两大问题，亟需一种更具鲁棒性和适应性的方法。
AI.method: 提出分布控制方法，将策略表示为概率分布；构建熵正则化零和随机微分博弈（ERRL-ZSSDGs）框架；利用动态规划原理推导HJBI耦合方程组；针对线性二次问题求解耦合ODE半解析解；针对一般问题设计Actor-Critic策略改进算法。
AI.result: 在投资博弈中，数值实验展示了温度参数和机制转换对最优策略和值函数的影响，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过分布控制和熵正则化，有效应对参数误设定和环境突变问题，为复杂动态环境下的博弈决策提供了新途径。

title: Uncovering Salience-Driven Dynamics in Consumer Confidence with Generative Social Simulation
summary: Consumer confidence is typically modeled as a persistent macroeconomic index, yet its movements arise from households that interpret economic information through heterogeneous constraints, exposures, prior beliefs, and attention. We introduce ConsumerSim, a generative Human--Environment response framework that reconstructs Consumer Confidence Index (CCI) dynamics from a microdata-calibrated synthetic population, time-stamped macroeconomic, financial, policy, and news signals, survey-like response generation, post-stratified belief expansion, and behavioral inertia alignment. Across U.S., EU27, and Japanese official CCI target series, ConsumerSim ranks first among persistence, time-series, regression, and information-augmented baselines on the reported reconstruction metrics, with clear gains around high-salience shocks. Its reconstructed signal also improves short-horizon prediction of real activity, most consistently for housing outcomes. Mechanism analyses show that CCI movements concentrate around salient events; subgroup trajectories often align in direction while differing in magnitude; and signal sensitivity varies across income, homeownership, education, and political-alignment groups. Population-expansion and ablation results indicate that representative aggregation, situational signals, persona heterogeneity, and inertia are necessary for both accuracy and diagnosis. The findings support a behavioral view of consumer confidence as an interpretable Human--Environment response process rather than a purely aggregate time series.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConsumerSim框架，通过生成式人类-环境响应模型，从微观数据校准的合成人口、宏观信号、新闻等多源数据重建消费者信心指数(CCI)，在美、欧、日官方数据上超越多种基线，并揭示CCI波动集中于高显著性事件，不同人群对信号敏感度存在异质性。
AI.motivation: 传统消费者信心模型将CCI视为持续性宏观时间序列，忽略了家庭个体在解读经济信息时受到异质性约束、风险暴露、先验信念和注意力限制的影响。作者希望从微观行为视角重建宏观信心指数。
AI.method: 构建ConsumerSim框架，包含：微观数据校准的合成人口、时间戳宏观经济/金融/政策/新闻信号、类调查响应生成、后分层信念扩展、行为惯性对齐。通过多源信号驱动个体响应，再聚合为宏观CCI。
AI.result: 在美国、EU27和日本官方CCI数据上，ConsumerSim在重建指标上排名第一，显著优于持续性、时间序列、回归和信息增强基线，尤其在高显著性冲击时期表现突出。重建信号能改善对实际经济活动（尤其是住房指标）的短期预测。
AI.conclusion: CCI变动集中于显著性事件；不同人口亚组（收入、住房拥有、教育、政治倾向）的轨迹方向趋同但幅度各异；代表性聚合、情境信号、个体异质性和惯性对准确建模与诊断均不可或缺。研究支持将消费者信心视为可解释的人类-环境响应过程，而非纯宏观时间序列。

title: Factorized low-rank matrix recovery problem, Schatten-$q$ quasi-norm, Error bound for critical point, Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz property, Inexact proximal alternating linearized minimization
summary: The Schatten-$q$ quasi-norm is a widely used nonconvex rank surrogate and matrix factorization is an effective approach to reduce computational cost. In this paper, we consider the equivalent group-sparse factorized reformulation of Schatten-$q$ norm regularized low-rank matrix recovery problem. Though this factorized model exhibits favorable performance, two issues remain: (i) the error bound of critical points is unexplored; (ii) the proximal operator of $\|\cdot\|_2^q$ lacks a closed-form solution for general $q$, limiting algorithms to adopt fixed $q$ like $1/2$ or $2/3$. This paper addresses both issues. We investigate the properties of critical points for the factorized problem and show that, compared to nuclear norm, the Schatten-$q$ norm implicitly endows critical points with column orthogonality. From this insight, we introduce the notion of S-critical points under mild conditions that ensure column orthogonality with easily operable criterion for identifying. We show that global optimal points must be S-critical points and we derive an error bound between S-critical points and the true matrix. We further present an inexact proximal alternating linearized minimization method for the factorized problem, along with practically computable inexact proximal operator for $\|\cdot\|_2^q$ and criteria to find solutions satisfying inexactness conditions, and we establish the whole sequence convergence and a convergence rate guarantee under Kurdyka--Łojasiewicz condition. Moreover, we prove that the factorized model with least-squares loss has KL exponent $1/2$ at S-critical points, then the iteration converges linearly under suitable condition. Extensive numerical experiments validate the effectiveness of our algorithm and confirm the theoretical properties of the factorized model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Schatten-$q$拟范数在低秩矩阵恢复中的因子化模型，提出了S-临界点概念并建立了误差界，同时设计了非精确近端交替线性化最小化算法（含可计算的非精确近端算子），证明了全局收敛性与线性收敛速率，并通过实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: Schatten-$q$拟范数作为非凸秩代理广泛使用，但因子化模型存在两个未解决问题：(i) 临界点的误差界未被探索；(ii) $\|\cdot\|_2^q$的近端算子对一般$q$无闭式解，限制了算法只能取固定值（如$1/2$或$2/3$）。本文旨在同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: (1) 分析了因子化问题中临界点的性质，发现Schatten-$q$范数隐含地赋予临界点列正交性，并据此提出S-临界点概念； (2) 推导了S-临界点与真实矩阵之间的误差界； (3) 提出非精确近端交替线性化最小化算法，设计了可计算的非精确近端算子用于$\|\cdot\|_2^q$，并给出了满足非精确性条件的判据； (4) 在Kurdyka–Łojasiewicz条件下证明序列全局收敛性及收敛速率，并证明最小二乘损失模型的KL指数为$1/2$，从而保证线性收敛。
AI.result: 理论方面：建立了S-临界点概念及其与全局最优点的关系、误差界、算法全局收敛性与线性收敛速率。实验方面：数值实验验证了算法有效性与理论性质。
AI.conclusion: 本文从理论和算法两个层面完善了Schatten-$q$范数因子化模型，不仅提供了更清晰的临界点几何刻画（列正交性），还设计了适用于任意$q$的实用算法，具有理论保证的收敛性，为低秩矩阵恢复问题提供了更灵活有效的解决方案。

title: Latent Bridges for Multi-Table Question Answering
summary: We introduce GRAB, a constructor-encoder-bridge pipeline for table question answering. Our method lifts relational data into an heterogeneous graph, encodes it via message passing, and transfers the signals to an LLM through a small set of query-conditioned latent tokens. This provides the LLM with a compact, task-relevant structural representation together with the flattened text. Crucially, the LLM remains strictly frozen to preserve its general reasoning capabilities; we train only the lightweight graph encoder and latent bridge (91M parameters), allowing the entire pipeline to be trained efficiently. Our pipeline significantly improves performance on relational Question Answering, with the largest gains in demanding multi-table settings, offering an efficient, principled way to connect relational deep learning with LLMs.

AI.tldr: GRAB是一个构造器-编码器-桥接流水线，通过异构图编码和少量查询条件潜变量令牌，将关系数据与冻结的LLM连接，高效提升表格问答性能，尤其在多表场景下表现显著。
AI.motivation: 现有表格问答方法在处理关系型数据（特别是多表场景）时，直接将表格文本送入LLM会丢失结构信息且计算成本高。作者希望在不微调LLM的前提下，以轻量级方式引入图结构信息，提升性能。
AI.method: 首先将关系数据构建为异构图，通过消息传递进行图编码；然后利用少量查询条件化的潜变量令牌（bridge）将图结构信号传递给冻结的LLM。仅训练轻量级图编码器和桥接模块（共91M参数），LLM完全冻结。
AI.result: 在关系型问答任务上显著提升性能，尤其在多表设置下增益最大。
AI.conclusion: GRAB提供了一种高效、有原则的方式将关系深度学习与LLM连接，在不微调LLM的前提下通过结构信息提升表格问答能力。

title: Preventing Error Propagation in Multi-Agent AI through Runtime Monitoring
summary: Multi-agent AI systems can improve answer selection by allowing different language models to exchange reasoning traces, revise initial predictions, and support a final decision. However, such communication may also introduce reliability risks: reasoning from one agent can correct another agent's mistake, but it can also mislead an agent that was initially correct. This paper studies reliable multi-agent AI communication through reasoning exchange and runtime answer revision. We develop a framework in which agents first answer multiple-choice questions independently, then share reasoning traces and revise their decisions. We conduct numerical experiments where we evaluate whether this process improves accuracy, produces more positive than negative answer transitions, and remains effective across domains such as cybersecurity, networking, and general knowledge. The results help identify when multi-agent reasoning improves reliability and when it may propagate errors.

AI.tldr: 研究多智能体AI系统通过推理交换修正答案的可靠性，发现该过程在网络安全、网络和常识领域有时提升准确率，有时传播错误。
AI.motivation: 多智能体AI通过推理交换可能提升答案选择质量，但也可能引入可靠性风险——一个智能体的推理可能纠正错误，也可能误导原本正确的智能体。
AI.method: 构建多智能体框架：各智能体先独立回答多选题，然后共享推理轨迹并修订答案，在网络安全、网络、常识等领域进行实验评估。
AI.result: 推理交换过程有时提高准确率、产生正向答案转变多于负向转变，但效果因领域而异，可能传播错误。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体推理交换能否提升可靠性取决于具体场景，需要识别何时有效、何时会传播错误。

title: Model Predictive Current Control with Harmonic Correction for Single-Phase AC-DC EV Charging
summary: The increasing integration of Electric Vehicles (EVs) has imposed a growing harmonic challenge on the power grid. For AC/DC Power Factor Correction (PFC) in single-phase On-Board Chargers (OBCs), Model Predictive Current Control (MPCC) improves the current quality by predicting and tracking the inductor current. However, finite control set MPCC selects switching states, resulting in discrete control actions and a limited optimisation space. Moreover, the MPCC cost function based on instantaneous current tracking error has limited capability to compensate for low-order harmonic disturbances induced by dead time, control delay, and model parameter mismatch. This paper proposes a duty cycle predictive MPCC incorporating a real-time harmonic estimation reference. The proposed method dynamically estimates the low-order harmonic components of the input current and corrects the MPCC reference current, enabling continuous duty cycle control and targeted suppression of dominant low-order harmonics. Simulation results on a single-phase OBC demonstrate that the proposed duty cycle predictive MPCC reduces the steady-state current THD_i from 11.47% to 6.10% compared with the switching state predictive MPCC. With the harmonic reference, the THD_i is further reduced to 2.85%.

AI.tldr: 针对单相车载充电器中AC/DC功率因数校正的模型预测电流控制（MPCC）存在开关状态离散、优化空间有限、低次谐波抑制能力不足等问题，本文提出了一种结合实时谐波估计参考的占空比预测MPCC方法，通过动态估计输入电流低次谐波分量并修正参考电流，实现连续占空比控制与低次谐波靶向抑制。仿真结果显示，该方法将稳态电流THDi从11.47%降至2.85%。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车规模化接入使电网谐波问题加剧，现有单相车载充电器中的有限控制集MPCC存在开关状态离散、优化空间有限，且基于瞬时电流跟踪误差的代价函数对死区时间、控制延迟、模型参数失配导致的低次谐波扰动补偿能力不足。
AI.method: 提出占空比预测MPCC方法，集成实时谐波估计参考；动态估计输入电流低次谐波分量；修正MPCC参考电流；实现连续占空比控制与低次谐波靶向抑制。
AI.result: 在单相OBC仿真中，所提占空比预测MPCC相比开关状态预测MPCC，稳态电流THDi从11.47%降至6.10%；引入谐波参考后，THDi进一步降至2.85%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效抑制低次谐波，显著改善电流质量。

title: Entropy-Regularized Reinforcement Learning for Linear-Quadratic Stackelberg Differential Games in Regime-Switching Diffusion Models
summary: Stackelberg differential games (SDGs) provide a powerful framework for hierarchical decision-making in stochastic and continuous-time environments, yet their solution remains computationally challenging due to the complexity of traditional dynamic programming and Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman-Isaacs (HJBI) methods, especially in high-dimensional systems. This paper proposes an entropy-regularized reinforcement learning (ERRL) approach for linear-quadratic SDGs (LQ-SDGs) within a continuous-time diffusion framework governed by Markovian regime switching. The key innovation lies in deriving exploratory weakly-coupled HJBI equations with entropy regularization, which promotes stochastic policies that actively avoid suboptimal equilibria -- a limitation of classical SDG methods. Neural networks are integrated to approximate regime-dependent value functions and solve high-dimensional partial differential equations (PDEs) efficiently, while a novel sampling technique enhances computational tractability. Numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the framework compared to conventional approaches, particularly in escaping suboptimal traps through exploratory policies. The study highlights the critical role of entropy regularization and neural network approximations in achieving robust solutions for hierarchical decision-making problems under abrupt environmental shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于熵正则化强化学习的方法，用于求解具有马尔可夫机制切换的线性二次型Stackelberg微分博弈，通过引入探索性弱耦合HJBI方程和神经网络近似，有效解决了高维系统中的计算难题，并能逃离次优均衡陷阱。
AI.motivation: 传统的动态规划和HJBI方法在求解连续时间随机环境下的Stackelberg微分博弈时面临高维计算复杂度过高的问题，且容易陷入次优均衡。
AI.method: 提出熵正则化的探索性弱耦合HJBI方程，结合神经网络近似机制依赖的价值函数，并利用新颖的采样技术提升计算可行性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在逃离次优陷阱方面优于传统方法，展现了探索性策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 熵正则化和神经网络近似对于在环境突变下实现层次化决策问题的鲁棒求解至关重要。

title: Can LLMs Rank? A Tale of Triads and Triage
summary: From housing allocation for households experiencing homelessness to triage in emergency departments, LLMs are increasingly being considered as judges of consequential decisions that require ranking people for scarce resources. Ranking large groups simultaneously is cognitively demanding and error-prone. A natural solution, drawing on decades of social choice theory, elicits pairwise comparisons and aggregates them into a total order. However, a fundamental question remains when LLMs serve as the pairwise judge: how can a practitioner tell, before committing to a ranking, whether the LLM's judgments are sufficiently consistent to trust the result? We discuss two different ways of identifying consistency. A classical diagnostic, the coefficient of consistency $ζ$, originally developed to measure judge reliability by counting circular triads in tournament graphs, provides a cheap, model-free measure of intra-run consistency. Various standard measures of distance between rankings, for example Kendall's $τ$, can measure inter-run variability. We show, in both theory and practice, that these measures are independently valuable, and advocate for using both to assess reliability of rankings. We demonstrate the practical importance of our results across two high-stakes prioritization tasks: homelessness service allocation and emergency department triage. Three different leading LLMs have considerably different performance profiles across these two axes of consistency. We provide guidelines for how practitioners could think about measuring and assessing consistency before committing to a model for ranking or prioritization.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了当LLM被用作成对比较法官来对稀缺资源进行排名时，如何评估其判断的一致性。作者提出了两种一致性衡量方法：内部一致性（通过ζ系数检测循环三元组）和运行间变异性（通过Kendall's τ等距离度量），并在无家可归者住房分配和急诊分诊两个高风险场景中验证了其重要性。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被用于需要排序的高风险决策（如住房分配、急诊分诊），但直接让LLM对大量群体进行排序容易出错。虽然可以通过成对比较聚合排序来解决，但关键问题在于：在确定排序结果之前，如何判断LLM的判断是否足够一致以值得信任？
AI.method: 1. 提出两种一致性衡量指标：内部一致性——使用经典的一致性系数ζ（通过计算锦标赛图中的循环三元组数量来衡量法官可靠性）；运行间变异性——使用Kendall's τ等排序距离度量。2. 在理论上证明了这两个指标相互独立且有各自价值。3. 在无家可归者住房分配和急诊分诊两个高风险场景中，使用三个不同的主流LLM进行实证验证。
AI.result: 三个主流LLM在这两种一致性维度上表现出截然不同的性能特征。内部一致性和运行间变异性是相互独立的衡量指标，各自具有独特价值，不能互相替代。
AI.conclusion: 建议实践者在将模型用于排序或优先级决策之前，应同时测量和评估内部一致性与运行间变异性两种一致性指标，以判断LLM的判断是否足够可靠。

title: A Restart-Free Accelerated Algorithm for Non-Convex Minimization: Continuous and Discrete Analysis
summary: We propose two novel first-order methods for minimizing nonconvex functions with Lipschitz-continuous gradients and Hessians. These algorithms attain an $\varepsilon$-approximate first-order stationary point in $\mathrm{O}(\varepsilon^{-7/4})$ function and gradient evaluations, without using $\varepsilon$ as an input parameter. While existing methods rely on restart mechanisms to achieve this complexity, our methods do not. Consequently, the first algorithm enjoys a simple implementation, making its last iterate differentiable with respect to the initial point. By estimating the Lipschitz constants adaptively, we develop the second algorithm that does not require prior knowledge of the constants. This algorithm exhibits better numerical performance than existing parameter-free methods for certain problems, which can be attributed to its restart-free design. Both algorithms are derived by discretizing a newly introduced continuous-time model represented by an ordinary differential equation, and their continuous- and discrete-time convergence analyses proceed in a parallel manner under the Performance Estimation Problem framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新的一阶方法用于最小化非凸函数，能在O(ε^{-7/4})次函数和梯度评估内达到ε-近似一阶稳定点，无需重启机制，具有简单实现和自适应估计Lipschitz常数的优点。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖重启机制达到最优复杂度，重启机制导致算法实现复杂且损失了最终迭代点对初始点的可微性。本文旨在设计无需重启、实现简单且具良好性质的一阶方法。
AI.method: 通过离散化一个新引入的常微分方程连续时间模型，在性能估计问题框架下进行连续和离散时间收敛分析。第一个算法实现简单且可微；第二个算法自适应估计Lipschitz常数，无需预先知道这些常数。
AI.result: 两个算法均达到O(ε^{-7/4})的复杂度，无需将ε作为输入参数。第二个算法在数值实验中对某些问题优于现有无参数方法。
AI.conclusion: 无重启设计不仅简化了实现、保持了可微性，还提升了数值性能，为设计高效的非凸优化一阶方法提供了新思路。

title: FinInvest-GTCN: Explainable Graph-Temporal-Causal Modeling for Risk-Aware Investment Decision Optimization
summary: Venture capital (VC) investment decisions face distinct challenges, such as multi-source heterogeneous data, non-stationary time series, and the demand for explainable predictions in high-stakes, low-data settings. To overcome these issues, we introduce \textbf{FinInvest-GTCN}, a Graph-Temporal-Causal Network that redefines the task from content recommendation to quantitative risk-return assessment. This architecture combines a relational graph encoder to capture the investment ecosystem's topology, a multi-scale temporal fusion module to handle long-term dependencies and non-stationarity, and a causal decision head that generates risk-adjusted predictions with interpretable causal attributions. A core innovation is the Meta-Causal Adaptation (MCA) strategy, which facilitates robust fine-tuning for new, data-scarce sectors by aligning updates with causally-plausible structures derived from meta-pretraining. Comprehensive experiments on proprietary VC datasets show that FinInvest-GTCN delivers state-of-the-art results, markedly lowering the primary Risk-Adjusted Mean Squared Error (RA-MSE) to 2.51 from a baseline of 3.05 and boosting the cumulative return of a simulated portfolio by 18.7\%. Ablation studies underscore the essential role of each component, while additional analyses confirm the model's stability, interpretability, and enhanced adaptability. This work pioneers a data-driven, explainable framework for investment decision support.

AI.tldr: 提出FinInvest-GTCN，一种图-时序-因果网络，将风险投资决策从内容推荐重构为量化风险评估，通过元因果适配策略实现小样本场景下的可解释预测，在专有数据集上RA-MSE降至2.51，模拟组合收益提升18.7%。
AI.motivation: 风险投资决策面临多源异构数据、非平稳时间序列以及高利害低数据场景下对可解释预测的需求等独特挑战，现有方法难以同时解决上述问题。
AI.method: FinInvest-GTCN包含三个核心模块：(1)关系图编码器捕捉投资生态拓扑结构；(2)多尺度时序融合模块处理长期依赖与非平稳性；(3)因果决策头生成风险调整预测与可解释因果归因。核心创新是元因果适配(MCA)策略，通过元预训练获得因果合理结构，实现数据稀缺领域的鲁棒微调。
AI.result: 在专有VC数据集上，RA-MSE从基线3.05降至2.51，模拟组合累积回报提升18.7%。消融实验验证了各组件的必要性，额外分析证实了模型稳定性、可解释性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作开创了数据驱动且可解释的投资决策支持框架，为高利害、低数据场景提供了有效解决方案。

title: Memory as an Attack Surface in LLM Agents: A Study on Multiple-Choice Question Answering
summary: AI agents extend conventional large language model (LLM) applications by integrating language understanding with task execution, external tool use, and memory mechanisms. While memory allows agents to retain prior interactions and provide more personalized and context-aware responses, it also introduces a new vulnerability: information stored in memory can influence future outputs even when the current query is clean. In this paper, we investigate memory manipulation in LLM-based agents for multiple-choice question answering. We first design and implement an LLM-based AI agent with an external memory component that stores and retrieves task-relevant information. We then introduce basic memory manipulation scenarios in which misleading or corrupted memories are inserted into the agent before it answers multiple-choice questions. Using a controlled experimental setup, we compare the agent's performance before and after memory manipulation and measure changes in answer accuracy, attack success rate, and selection of manipulated options. Our results show that even simple memory manipulations can noticeably affect the agent's final answers, causing it to select incorrect options despite receiving clean and well-formed questions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于LLM的AI智能体在多项选择题回答中，外部记忆组件被注入误导信息后，即使当前查询干净，答案准确性也会显著下降。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体的记忆机制在提供个性化服务的同时引入了新的安全漏洞，记忆中的信息可能污染未来输出，即使当前查询是干净的。
AI.method: 设计并实现了一个带外部记忆组件的LLM智能体，在回答多项选择题前向记忆体插入误导/污染信息，通过控制实验比较操作前后的准确率、攻击成功率和被操控选项的选择率。
AI.result: 简单的记忆操纵就能明显影响智能体的最终答案，使其在接收到干净、格式良好的问题时仍选择错误选项。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的AI智能体的记忆机制存在严重安全风险，需要开发防御策略来保护记忆组件的完整性。

title: Constrained Tabular Diffusion for Finance
comment: Published at ACM International Conference on AI in Finance (ICAIF) 2025
summary: Generative models in finance face the dual challenge of producing realistic data while satisfying strict regulatory and economic objectives, a requirement that standard tabular diffusion models cannot provide. To address this difficulty, we introduce Constrained Tabular Diffusion for Finance (CTDF), a novel integration of sampling-time feasibility operations with mixed-type tabular diffusion in financial applications. By incorporating a training-free feasibility operator into the reverse-diffusion sampling loop, CTDF enforces hard constraints for applications such as simulation, legal compliance, and extrapolation. Extensive experiments on large-scale financial datasets demonstrate zero constraint violations and improvement in scarce data utility. CTDF establishes a robust method for generating trustworthy and compliant synthetic data, opening new avenues for rigorous generative modeling and analysis in the financial domain.

AI.tldr: CTDF通过将无训练的可行性算子集成到反向扩散采样循环中，在金融应用中生成同时满足真实性和硬约束的混合类型表格数据，实现零违规并提升稀缺数据效用。
AI.motivation: 标准表格扩散模型无法同时满足金融领域对数据真实性和严格监管/经济目标的约束要求。
AI.method: 在反向扩散采样过程中引入无训练的可行性算子，强制执行硬约束（如模拟、法律合规、外推），并与混合类型表格扩散模型结合。
AI.result: 在大规模金融数据集上实现零约束违规，并显著提升稀缺数据的效用。
AI.conclusion: CTDF为生成可信且合规的合成金融数据提供了鲁棒方法，为金融领域的严格生成建模与分析开辟了新途径。

title: "Why Put in This Much Effort?": How AI Availability Shapes Students' Motivation in Introductory Programming
summary: When AI tools can easily complete programming assignments, students face a motivational question: why invest effort in completing them independently? While prior work has examined instructor policies and usage patterns, we focus on how students themselves experience and respond to AI availability, a perspective important for designing courses that sustain engagement with programming practice. We investigate two research questions: (1) How do engineering students describe how AI availability shapes their motivation to put effort into programming assignments? (2) How do students navigate the tension between their expressed value for learning through effort and the constant availability of AI as an alternative to effort? We conducted semi-structured interviews with 13 engineering majors in an introductory MATLAB course where students could use a course-specific AI chatbot. Using Situated Expectancy-Value Theory (SEVT) as an analytical framework, we examined how students described their expectancy, values, and costs in the context of AI availability. When AI could complete assignments quickly, students questioned whether their time on programming was well spent (cost), questioned the long-term usefulness of programming skill (utility value), reported less satisfaction when AI bypassed productive struggle (intrinsic value), and described confidence that depended on AI being available (expectancy). Nearly all students expressed a preference for learning through effort and a simultaneous temptation to take shortcuts with AI (sanctioned or otherwise). Our findings complicate the assumption that students need external constraints to protect their learning. Students who managed the tension found motivation in the learning process itself, suggesting that course design may need to shift from valuing what students produce to supporting how they learn.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过对13名工科学生的半结构化访谈，探讨了AI工具（如编程助教聊天机器人）如何影响学生对编程作业的动机。学生面临"通过努力学习的价值"与"AI提供的捷径"之间的张力，多数学生既珍视学习过程又难以抵抗AI诱惑。研究发现，学生的动机并非完全依赖外部约束，能够管理这种张力的学生更多地从学习过程本身获得动力。
AI.motivation: 当AI工具能轻易完成编程作业时，学生面临"为何还要投入精力独立完成"的动机困境。现有研究多关注教师政策和使用模式，但缺乏从学生主体视角理解他们如何体验和应对AI可用性对其动机的影响。
AI.method: 采用半结构化访谈法，对13名参加MATLAB入门课程的工科专业学生进行深度访谈。以情境期望-价值理论（SEVT）为分析框架，分析学生在AI可用情境下对期望、价值和成本的描述。
AI.result: AI能快速完成作业导致学生质疑时间投入是否值得（成本）、质疑编程技能的长期有用性（效用价值）、对AI绕过"有价值的挣扎"感到满意度降低（内在价值），并产生依赖AI的自信（期望）。几乎所有学生都表达了对通过努力学习的偏好，同时又受到AI捷径的诱惑。
AI.conclusion: 学生并不一定需要外部约束来保护学习；能够管理"努力与捷径"张力的学生从学习过程本身获得动机。课程设计可能需要从重视学生的产出转向支持学生的学习过程。

title: Relative Weak Convexity and Projected Subgradient Methods: Analysis and Convergence
summary: We introduce the class of relatively weakly convex functions, which extends the classical notion of weak convexity by measuring nonconvexity relative to a distance-generating function. We investigate the fundamental properties of this function class, establishing characterization results, calculus rules, and illustrative examples. We further analyze the associated optimization landscape and identify a neighborhood of the set of global minimizers that is free of saddle points. Motivated by this geometric structure, we propose the Projected SubGradient Algorithm (PSGA) with several step-size strategies. Under a sharpness error bound, we prove that, when initialized within this saddle-point-free neighborhood, the iterates generated by PSGA converge to a global minimizer for each of the proposed step-size strategies. Furthermore, linear convergence is established for the geometrically decaying step-size strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了相对弱凸函数类，扩展了经典弱凸性概念。研究了其性质、微积分规则和示例，分析了优化景观，发现全局极小点集附近无鞍点。基于此提出投影次梯度算法（PSGA），在sharpness误差边界下证明算法收敛到全局极小点，几何衰减步长策略实现线性收敛。
AI.motivation: 扩展经典弱凸性概念，引入相对弱凸函数类，以更灵活地衡量非凸性，从而适用于更广泛的优化问题。
AI.method: 定义相对弱凸函数类，建立刻画定理和微积分规则；分析优化景观，识别全局极小点附近无鞍点的邻域；提出投影次梯度算法（PSGA）并设计多种步长策略。
AI.result: 在sharpness误差边界条件下，若初始化在无鞍点邻域内，PSGA对所有提出的步长策略均收敛到全局极小点；几何衰减步长策略实现线性收敛。
AI.conclusion: 相对弱凸函数类有效扩展了经典弱凸性，所提出的PSGA算法在特定条件下能高效收敛到全局最优解，具有理论保证。

title: EVLA: An Electro-Aware Multimodal Assistant for Physically-Grounded Driving Reasoning and Control
summary: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) for driving assistants typically treat vehicle dynamics as a black box, resulting in decisions that lack awareness of the vehicle's real-time electro-mechanical state. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Electro-Visual-Language Assistant (EVLA) -- a novel framework that combines multi-modal scene understanding with real-time perception of the electrified powertrain state (e.g., motor torque, battery SOC). Our approach features two key innovations: first, a Unified Co-State Encoder (UCSE) that fuses visual, textual, and vehicle-state inputs into a shared latent representation, augmented with an Energy-Efficiency Field to model spatial energy costs; and second, an Electro-aware Structured Reasoning Chain (ESRC), which replaces external chain-of-thought prompting with an internal, deterministic reasoning process grounded in physical constraints and optimization objectives. Trained end-to-end with a physics-guided joint loss, EVLA learns to generate context-aware and energy-optimal driving decisions. Extensive evaluations on a driving QA benchmark demonstrate that EVLA substantially outperforms strong fine-tuned VLM baselines, improving the final score by +0.0871 and accuracy by +5.6\%. Ablation studies validate the necessity of each component, and efficiency analyses show that EVLA achieves 36\% faster inference than multi-stage pipelines. This work underscores that integrating vehicle-state awareness and structured physical reasoning is crucial for developing next-generation, physically-grounded driving assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVLA框架，将视觉、文本与车辆实时电驱动状态（如电机扭矩、电池SOC）融合，通过统一共态编码器（UCSE）嵌入能量效率场，并借助电感知结构化推理链（ESRC）进行物理约束下的确定性推理。实验表明，EVLA在驾驶问答基准上显著优于基线模型，准确率提升5.6%，推理速度比多阶段流水线快36%。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM驾驶助手将车辆动力学视为黑箱，决策缺乏对车辆实时机电状态的感知，导致生成决策不考虑实际能量效率与物理可行性。
AI.method: 提出两个核心组件：(1) UCSE——融合视觉、文本和车辆状态输入为共享潜表征，并加入能量效率场建模空间能量成本；(2) ESRC——用内部确定性物理约束推理替代外部思维链提示。采用物理引导联合损失进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在驾驶QA基准上，最终得分提升+0.0871，准确率提升5.6%；消融实验验证各组件必要性；推理速度比多阶段流水线快36%。
AI.conclusion: 融合车辆状态感知与结构化物理推理是开发下一代物理可解释驾驶助手的关键方向。

title: Low-cost concept-based localized explanations: How far can we get with training-free approaches?
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI), 8-10 May 2026, Granada, Spain. Code: https://github.com/darianfgUgr/CoNa
summary: Concept-based Explainable AI (C-XAI) seeks human-understandable explanations grounded in semantic concepts, yet validation is limited by the scarcity of fine-grained concept annotations. We evaluate whether mid-scale Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can perform localized concept naming under strict zero-shot conditions by assigning labels to bounding-box regions at both object and part levels. We propose a reproducible zero-shot evaluation protocol for Concept Naming (CoNa) with (i) closed-set, category-constrained prompting for moderate vocabularies and (ii) Open-CoNa, an embedding-similarity-based strategy for large label spaces. Experiments with four MLLMs (7B-32B) show consistent performance trends across datasets, reaching 62%-88% object-level exact-match accuracy, highlighting the potential of training-free concept annotation from localized regions. We discuss limitations and failure modes and release a reproducible framework to support future low-cost C-XAI research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种零样本的概念命名方法（CoNa），利用中等规模多模态大模型对图像区域进行物体和部件级别的语义标注，在无训练条件下达到62%-88%的精确匹配准确率，为可解释AI提供了低成本的概念标注方案。
AI.motivation: 基于概念的可解释AI（C-XAI）因细粒度概念标注稀缺而验证受限，现有方法依赖人工标注，成本高昂且难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出CoNa零样本评估协议：(i) 闭集类别约束提示用于中等词汇量；(ii) Open-CoNa基于嵌入相似度策略用于大标签空间。在4个MLLM（7B-32B）上实验。
AI.result: 在物体级精确匹配准确率达62%-88%，不同数据集上表现一致，展示了无训练概念标注的潜力。
AI.conclusion: MLLM可在零样本条件下进行局部概念命名，为低成本C-XAI研究提供了可复现的框架，并指出了当前方法的局限与失败模式。

title: Analysis of Adam Algorithms for Stochastic Dynamic Systems
summary: The adaptive moment estimation algorithm, known as Adam, is widely used in modern machine learning, owing to its low per-iteration complexity and strong empirical performance. Despite its prevalent use, the theoretical foundation of Adam remains largely unexplored for time-varying and nonstationary systems. In fact, the existing theoretical analyses of Adam-type algorithms are primarily concerned with time-invariant model parameters and explicitly or implicitly rely on independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data assumptions, under which the learning taskcan be formulated as minimizing a fixed expected objective with a static minimizer. However, such assumptions are often violated in time-varying and nonstationary systems, thereby calling for a theoretical investigation beyond the conventional yet idealized i.i.d. setting. The main objective of this paper is to solve this challenging problem by establishing a general theory of Adam for time-varying and nonstationary stochastic systems. We will introduce some new techniques for analyzing the products of nonstationary and dependent random matrices induced by Adam's coupled first- and second-moment recursions, and will construct a new stochastic Lyapunov function that blends these two moment dynamics. Under a stochastic excitation condition that allows nonstationary and dependent data, we will derive both parameter tracking and output prediction error bounds explicitly, quantifying the effects of stepsize, first- and second-momentum parameters, gradient noise and parameter drift. These bounds not only provide guarantees for Adam performance, but also provide guidelines for hyperparameter selection. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world data validate our theory and design guidelines.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了Adam优化算法在时变非平稳随机系统中的理论框架，通过引入新的随机矩阵分析技术和李雅普诺夫函数，推导出了参数追踪和输出预测误差的显式界，并提供了超参数选择指南。
AI.motivation: 现有Adam理论分析主要局限于时不变参数和i.i.d.数据假设，无法适用于时变非平稳系统。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为Adam在更现实场景中的应用提供理论基础。
AI.method: 1) 提出分析非平稳依赖随机矩阵乘积的新技术；2) 构建融合Adam一阶和二阶矩动态的随机李雅普诺夫函数；3) 在随机激励条件下推导参数跟踪与预测误差界。
AI.result: 显式推导出Adam在时变非平稳系统中的参数跟踪误差界和输出预测误差界，量化了步长、动量参数、梯度噪声和参数漂移的影响。
AI.conclusion: 不仅为Adam在非平稳系统中的性能提供了理论保证，还给出了超参数选择的实用指导，合成数据与真实数据实验均验证了理论的有效性。

title: A Path-Space Formulation of Prediction in World Models: From a Single Action to Prediction, Planning, and Irreversibility
summary: We propose a path-space formulation of prediction in AI world models. Rather than sequences of one-step conditional distributions, we argue that a world model implicitly defines a probability measure over future trajectories. In the local regime where latent dynamics admit an effective Markovian description, this path measure takes the Onsager-Machlup form. Within this framework, prediction (most probable trajectory), planning (constrained optimization), and uncertainty (fluctuations) emerge as operations on a single action functional. We decompose the latent dynamics into reversible and irreversible components and introduce operational measures of entropy production from model rollouts. In controlled small-scale attention-based models, we find that attention asymmetry is acquired during training in proportion to the irreversibility of the data. Symmetrizing the learned attention suppresses entropy production and selectively degrades long-horizon prediction of irreversible dynamics while preserving relaxational prediction. These results suggest that irreversibility may serve as a computational resource for predictive world models. More generally, the fundamental predictive object is a distribution over future paths rather than states.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于路径空间的形式化框架来理解AI世界模型中的预测问题。作者认为世界模型本质上定义的是未来轨迹的概率测度，而非单步条件分布。在潜变量动力学可近似为马尔可夫过程的局部区域，该路径测度呈现Onsager-Machlup形式。通过将潜动力学分解为可逆与不可逆分量，作者引入基于模型 rollout 的熵产生操作度量。在受控的小规模注意力模型中，发现注意力不对称性在训练中与数据不可逆性成比例地被习得。对称化学习到的注意力会抑制熵产生并选择性削弱不可逆动力学的长程预测。这些结果表明，不可逆性可能作为预测性世界模型的一种计算资源。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型通常以序列化单步条件分布进行预测，缺乏对完整未来轨迹概率结构的统一描述。作者旨在提供一种路径空间框架，将预测、规划与不确定性统一在单一作用泛函下，并揭示不可逆性在世界模型中的计算角色。
AI.method: 论文首先将世界模型隐式定义的轨迹概率测度形式化为Onsager-Machlup路径积分形式；接着将潜动力学分解为可逆（保守）与不可逆（耗散）分量；然后通过分析注意力矩阵的结构对称性，将熵产生与注意力不对称性相关联，并在小型注意力模型上进行受控实验验证。
AI.result: 1) 注意力不对称性在训练中与数据不可逆性成比例地获得；2) 人为对称化注意力权重会降低熵产生，并选择性损害不可逆动力学的长程预测能力，但不影响可逆（弛豫）动力学的预测；3) 提供了熵产生作为预测性世界模型资源的经验证据。
AI.conclusion: 不可逆性（熵产生）可能作为一种计算资源，帮助世界模型在长期预测中维持对不可逆动力学的保真度。根本而言，预测的基本对象应是未来路径分布而非状态分布。

title: Situation Perception: A Necessary Primitive to Artificial Superintelligence
summary: Current large language models are extraordinary statistical engines. They compress vast amounts of text into useful patterns and can explain science, write code, imitate reasoning, and participate in philosophical conversation. Yet pattern mastery is not the same as general intelligence. A human infant begins with little explicit knowledge, but gradually discovers object permanence, cause and effect, other minds, bodily agency, and the persistence of the physical world. We make an argument that the path to artificial superintelligence (ASI) depends on a missing capacity we call \emph{situation perception}: the ability to construct, revise, and act within internal simulations of possible worlds across latent time. \emph{ perception} requires at least three core components: abstract prediction, long-term compressed memory, and active learning guided by objectives. In this work, we analyse why modern large language models remain incomplete, and propose the appropriate tests for measuring progress and consequences of machines that can simulate futures, pursue self-directed goals, and possibly judge their own creators.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前大语言模型虽强但缺乏通用智能，提出实现人工超级智能（ASI）的关键在于“情境感知”能力——即在潜在时间中构建、修正并行动于内部模拟可能世界的能力，并分析了现有模型的不足及相应的测试方法。
AI.motivation: 作者认为模式掌握不等于通用智能，当前LLM缺少类似婴儿逐渐发展的物体恒存、因果推理等基础能力，因此需要探索通向ASI的缺失环节。
AI.method: 提出“情境感知”概念，包含三个核心组件：抽象预测、长期压缩记忆、以及目标驱动的主动学习，并据此分析现有LLM的不足。
AI.result: 指出现代大语言模型在情境感知能力上存在根本性缺失，无法真正模拟未来、追求自设目标或对自身行为进行判断。
AI.conclusion: 需要设计适当的测试来衡量机器在模拟未来、自主目标追求等方面的进展，并关注其对人类可能带来的后果。

title: A survey of trust-region radius update mechanisms. Part I: First-order analysis
summary: We isolate three structural conditions on trust-region radius update rules for smooth unconstrained nonlinear optimisation, and study the class of mechanisms they define. The conditions act on the radius directly: a lower bound relative to the gradient norm, a contraction on unsuccessful iterations, and a controlled expansion on successful ones. A mechanism is \emph{weakly admissible} if it satisfies the first two conditions, and \emph{strongly admissible} if it satisfies the lower bound together with the controlled-expansion condition. Under uniformly bounded model Hessians, weak admissibility yields $\lim_{k\to\infty}\|\nabla f(x_k)\|=0$, and strong admissibility yields the optimal worst-case complexity $O(ε^{-2})$ for first-order stationarity. Strong admissibility extends the convergence guarantee to linearly growing model Hessians. We verify admissibility for five mechanism classes: fixed-factor, step-driven, retrospective, criticality-anchored, and gradient-scaled. Along the way, we prove convergence of the retrospective update under linearly growing model Hessians and revisit the framework of Curtis and Scheinberg (2020), and Wang and Yuan (2022): we extend it to three distinct scaling factors with decoupled step acceptance (covering $η= 0$), and specialise its stochastic version to the deterministic gradient-scaled

AI.tldr: 本文提出了信任域半径更新规则的三类结构条件（弱可容许性与强可容许性），在均匀有界模型Hessian下分别保证梯度趋于零与最优O(ε⁻²)复杂度，并将理论推广至线性增长模型Hessian，验证了五类机制的适用性。
AI.motivation: 现有信任域方法中半径更新规则多基于经验设计，缺少统一的收敛性理论框架。本文旨在从结构条件出发，抽象出保证收敛性与复杂度的最小条件，并统一分析多类已有机制。
AI.method: 提出了三类结构条件：(1) 半径相对于梯度范数的下界；(2) 不成功迭代时半径收缩；(3) 成功迭代时半径受控扩张。弱可容许性满足(1)(2)，强可容许性满足(1)(3)。在均匀有界模型Hessian假设下分析收敛性，并扩展到线性增长情形。
AI.result: 弱可容许性保证梯度趋于零；强可容许性在均匀有界模型Hessian下达到O(ε⁻²)最优最坏情况复杂度，在线性增长模型Hessian下仍保证收敛。验证了固定因子、步驱动、回溯、临界锚定、梯度缩放五类机制的适用性，并首次证明回溯更新在线性增长模型Hessian下的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的弱/强可容许性框架为信任域半径更新提供了统一理论，覆盖了多种经典和现代机制，并为Curtis-Scheinberg和Wang-Yuan框架提供了扩展（三因子解耦步接受），完善了信任域方法的理论体系。

title: A3M: Adaptive, Adversarial and Multi-Objective Learning for Strategic Bidding in Repeated Auctions
summary: Learning to bid in repeated multi-unit auctions with bandit feedback poses a fundamental challenge. Existing methods often rely on rigid explore-then-exploit schedules, assume stationary adversaries, and optimize solely for bidder utility, thereby limiting adaptability and strategic robustness. To address these limitations, we introduce the A3M framework, which integrates adaptive deep reinforcement learning (DRL), explicit adversarial reasoning, and principled multi-objective reward design for online auction strategy optimization. A3M employs an actor-critic DRL backbone to dynamically balance exploration and exploitation, an opponent model for fictitious play against non-stationary adversaries, and a composite reward function to jointly maximize utility, auctioneer revenue, and fairness. We provide the first comprehensive empirical evaluation of this integrated approach against established baselines in both discriminatory and uniform price auctions. Results show that A3M reduces final regret by 30--40\% in standard settings, maintains robust performance against adversarial strategy shifts, scales favorably with the number of units $K$, and enables tunable multi-objective trade-offs. An extensive ablation study confirms the necessity of each core component. Our work establishes A3M as a powerful and flexible framework for learning in complex auction environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出A3M框架，将深度强化学习、对抗推理和多目标奖励设计相结合，用于在线拍卖策略优化，相比现有方法在多种拍卖场景中显著降低遗憾值并提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有重复多单元拍卖中的学习方法存在三大局限：依赖僵化的探索-利用调度、假设对手是平稳的、仅优化投标者效用，导致适应性和策略鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: A3M框架包含三个核心组件：(1) actor-critic深度强化学习骨干，动态平衡探索与利用；(2) 对手模型，基于虚拟博弈应对非平稳对手；(3) 复合奖励函数，联合最大化效用、拍卖者收益和公平性。
AI.result: 在歧视性定价和统一价格拍卖中，A3M相比基线方法将最终遗憾降低30-40%；对对手策略突变保持鲁棒；随单元数量K扩展性好；支持可调的多目标权衡；消融实验验证了每个组件的必要性。
AI.conclusion: A3M是一个强大且灵活的框架，适用于复杂拍卖环境中的学习问题。

title: Sample-Efficient Learning of Probabilistic Causes for Reachability in Markov Decision Processes with Probabilistic Guarantees
comment: Accepted to UAI2026 as oral presentation
summary: Probabilistic model checking for Markov decision processes (MDPs) provides quantitative guarantees, but often offers limited insight into why undesired outcomes occur. Probability-raising (PR) causality addresses this by identifying states whose visitation increases the probability of reaching designated states. Existing PR-cause identification methods, however, use MDP modifications not well-suited for learning: the gap between conditional and unconditional reachability probabilities can be hard to detect from transition samples, and construction requires reachability probabilities of the MDP, which are unavailable when transition probabilities are unknown. We study unknown MDPs and propose a learning approach with probabilistic guarantees for PR-cause identification. Our key ingredient is a restart-based MDP modification that reduces PR-cause checking to two conditional reachability queries without using reachability values of the original MDP. We prove correctness, establish sample-complexity bounds, and develop an anytime learning-and-checking algorithm based on two-sided value iteration that progressively classifies states as causal, non-causal, or undecided. Experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate reliable and fast identification of PR causes.

AI.tldr: 针对未知MDP，提出了一种基于重启的免原始可达概率的PR因果识别学习方法，并给出了概率保证。
AI.motivation: 现有PR因果识别方法依赖MDP的修改和可达概率计算，不适用于未知转移概率的MDP，且难以从样本中检测条件与无条件概率的差距。
AI.method: 提出重启式MDP修改方法，将PR因果检验转化为两个条件可达性查询；基于双侧值迭代设计任意时刻学习与检验算法，渐进分类状态为因果、非因果或未决定。
AI.result: 在两个基准实验上验证了方法的可靠性和快速性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未知MDP下的因果识别提供了理论保证和高效实践方案。

title: Few-Step Boltzmann Generators via Scalable Likelihood Flow Maps
summary: Recent progress in flow-based generative modeling has led to models that output high-quality samples while using only a small number of function evaluations. However, at present, there is a lack of similar advances in estimating the model likelihood. In particular, most existing methods either rely on restrictive architectures that enable exact calculations, or use stochastic approximations such as Hutchinson's trace estimator that introduce substantial variance. In this work, we introduce SCAlable LikeLihood distillation of flOw maPs (SCALLOP). SCALLOP builds on the recently proposed F2D2, a likelihood flow map model that can generate samples and their densities in a small number of function evaluations. While F2D2 uses Hutchinson's estimator during training, we introduce an alternative and more scalable likelihood distillation objective that is Hutchinson-free and admits a vectorized formulation. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of SCALLOP as a Boltzmann generator in molecular science, and further validate its benefit on image datasets. SCALLOP significantly reduces both training variance and training time while consistently improving performance compared to F2D2, and is competitive with the state-of-the-art while achieving up to 10x inference speedup over the fastest baseline.

AI.tldr: SCALLOP是一种基于流模型的似然蒸馏方法，通过去除Hutchinson迹估计器实现更高效的密度估计，在分子科学和图像任务上达到SOTA水平，并提供高达10倍的推理加速。
AI.motivation: 现有流模型在生成高质量样本方面进展迅速，但在似然估计方面仍存在瓶颈——要么依赖限制性架构进行精确计算，要么使用Hutchinson迹估计器引入较大方差。本文旨在解决似然估计的可扩展性问题。
AI.method: 基于F2D2模型，提出SCALLOP：设计了一种无需Hutchinson估计器的可扩展似然蒸馏目标函数，支持向量化实现，从而减少训练方差和时间。
AI.result: 在分子科学（Boltzmann生成器）和图像数据集上，SCALLOP相比F2D2显著降低了训练方差和训练时间，一致提升了性能；与最先进方法相比竞争力强，且推理速度比最快基线快10倍。
AI.conclusion: SCALLOP为流模型的似然估计提供了一种更高效、可扩展的蒸馏方案，在保持高质量生成的同时大幅提升推理速度，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Hierarchical Decision Making with Structured Policies: A Principled Design via Inverse Optimization
summary: Hierarchical decision-making frameworks are pivotal for addressing complex control tasks, enabling agents to decompose intricate problems into manageable subgoals. Despite their promise, existing hierarchical policies face critical limitations: (i) reinforcement learning (RL)-based methods struggle to guarantee strict constraint satisfaction, and (ii) optimal control (OC)-based approaches often rely on myopic and computationally prohibitive formulations. To reconcile these trade-offs, hierarchical RL-OC architectures have emerged as a promising paradigm. However, the formulation of the lower-level optimization within these frameworks remains underexplored, often relying on heuristic or myopic objectives. In this work, we propose a principled framework that systematically integrates upper-level goal abstraction with structured lower-level decision making. We adopt an inverse optimization approach to inform the structure of the lower-level problem from expert demonstrations, ensuring that the objective of the lower-level policy remains aligned with the overall long-term task goal. To validate the approach, our framework is evaluated on distinct decision making tasks: network-based resource allocation and continuous collision avoidance. Empirical results demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms strong baselines based on end-to-end RL, learning-augmented optimal control, and existing hierarchical RL approaches in both efficiency and decision quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过逆优化方法将上层目标抽象与下层结构化决策系统整合的分层RL-OC框架，在资源分配和碰撞避免任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有分层决策框架中，RL方法难以保证约束满足，OC方法计算昂贵且短视，而分层RL-OC架构的下层优化目标设计缺乏原则性指导。
AI.method: 采用逆优化方法从专家示范中学习下层问题的目标结构，确保下层策略的目标与上层长期任务目标保持一致。
AI.result: 在网络资源分配和连续碰撞避免两个任务上，所提方法在效率和决策质量上均优于端到端RL、学习增强OC和现有分层RL方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于逆优化来设计下层目标的分层RL-OC框架是有效的，能够克服现有方法的局限性，实现更好的任务表现。

title: Teaching Prompt-Based Programming with LLMs: A 45-Minute Lesson with Guided Practice for End-User Programmers
summary: Prompt-based programming, a new modality enabled by large language models (LLMs), allows users to express computational goals through natural language rather than traditional code. While this approach lowers barriers to entry, especially for non-CS learners, it does not eliminate the need for foundational CS skills. Learners often struggle to communicate their intent clearly to LLMs, resulting in vague or underspecified prompts. Prior work has documented the need for explicit prompting for both CS and non-CS learners. However, it remains less clear how such instruction can fit into busy classrooms or how much time is needed to produce meaningful gains. In this paper, we evaluated a 45-minute prompt-based programming intervention, consisting of a lesson with guided practice, against a business-as-usual CS lab activity (code tracing) of equal length, representing a class without prompt-focused instruction. We conducted a randomized controlled study with 55 engineering students. We found that students in the experimental condition improved more on average (though not significantly more) from pre- to post-test than the control group (+10.8 vs +1.1 percentage points) and showed significantly greater average gains in prompting self-efficacy (+35.4 vs +21.9 percentage points). Our results suggest it is likely that a brief intervention can improve learners' ability to specify computational goals to LLMs. However, the effect was modest, suggesting that prompting skills may require more time and practice to develop. We provide a lightweight lesson that requires no prior CS background and can be readily dropped into existing courses.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了一个45分钟的提示编程干预（包含引导练习），与同等时长的常规CS实验活动（代码追踪）相比，发现实验组学生从测试前到测试后的平均成绩提升更大（+10.8 vs +1.1个百分点），且提示自我效能感提升显著更高（+35.4 vs +21.9个百分点）。结果表明简短干预可能提升学习者向LLM表达计算目标的能力，但效果有限，提示技能可能需要更多时间和练习来发展。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）使基于提示的编程成为可能，降低了非CS学习者的入门门槛，但学习者常难以清晰表达意图导致提示模糊。现有研究记录了CS和非CS学习者都需要明确的提示指导，但不清楚这类教学如何融入繁忙的课堂，以及需要多少时间才能产生有意义的提升。
AI.method: 对55名工程专业学生进行了随机对照研究。实验组接受45分钟的提示编程干预（含引导练习的课程），对照组进行等时长的常规CS实验活动（代码追踪）。通过测试前-后测成绩和提示自我效能感问卷进行评估。
AI.result: 实验组平均成绩提升+10.8个百分点（对照组+1.1），但未达统计显著性；实验组提示自我效能感平均提升+35.4个百分点，显著高于对照组的+21.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 简短干预有可能提升学习者向LLM指定计算目标的能力，但效果有限，提示技能可能需要更多时间和实践来发展。研究提供了一个轻量级课程，无需CS背景即可融入现有课程。

title: Fast Adaptive Tensor Methods Under Local Smoothness
summary: A new, fast adaptive regularization methods is proposed and analyzed under local Lipschitz smoothness of the $p$-th order tensor. For nonconvex problems, it achieves the optimal $\mathcal{O}\!\left(|\log(ε)|ε^{-(p+1)/p}\right)$ complexity to obtain first-order $ε$-stationary points and in the convex case, it yields $\mathcal{O}\!\left(|\log(ε)|ε^{-1/p}\right)$ iterations to drive the optimality gap below $ε$, thus matching the complexity bounds of standard tensor methods under global Lipschitz smoothness yp to logarithmic terms. The proposed algorithm follows the line of standard tensor methods with an appropriately chosen regularization and suitable modifications. Initial numerical experiments and comparisons for some nonconvex regression problems are made with the standard adaptive cubic regularization where we showcase some potential of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的快速自适应正则化方法，在局部Lipschitz光滑p阶张量假设下，非凸问题达到最优O(|log(ε)|ε^{-(p+1)/p})复杂度，凸问题达到O(|log(ε)|ε^{-1/p})迭代次数，匹配全局光滑假设下的标准张量方法复杂度（仅差对数项）。数值实验展示了该方法在非凸回归问题上的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有标准张量方法通常假设全局Lipschitz光滑性，但这种假设在实际问题中可能过于严格。作者希望放松这一假设，在局部Lipschitz光滑性下设计仍能保持最优复杂度的自适应正则化方法。
AI.method: 基于标准张量方法框架，通过适当选择正则化项并进行针对性修改，提出一种新的自适应正则化算法。该方法在局部Lipschitz光滑p阶张量下进行分析和设计。
AI.result: 非凸问题：达到O(|log(ε)|ε^{-(p+1)/p})最优复杂度，获得一阶ε-稳定点；凸问题：达到O(|log(ε)|ε^{-1/p})迭代次数，使最优间隙低于ε。与标准自适应三次正则化方法在非凸回归问题上的数值对比展示了该方法的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应正则化方法在更弱的局部光滑假设下，达到了与全局光滑假设下标准张量方法相同的最优复杂度（仅多对数项），为实际中更广泛的优化问题提供了理论保证和实用算法。

title: Beyond the Mean: Three-Axis Fidelity for Aligning LLM-Based Survey Simulators from Small Pilot Data
comment: 11 pages, 8 tables, 3 figures; Pluralistic Alignment @ ICML 2026 Workshop
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to simulate social survey responses, yet their outputs exhibit systematic biases: marginal distributions are skewed, response variance is poorly calibrated, and predictor-outcome relationships are attenuated.
