AI.tldr: 本文揭示了联合嵌入预测（JEPA）目标的一个关键失败模式：它会丢弃外生的、但控制相关的特征，即使这些特征很容易编码。原因在于JEPA优化的是时间可预测性而非控制相关性。在2x2实验设计中，通过可预测性旋钮独立控制特征的可控性和相关性，发现所有无奖励的预测目标都将外生控制相关特征的准确率降至接近随机水平，而基于奖励的变体可以有选择地保留这些特征。仅需2%的奖励标记数据即可恢复特征，效果在两个环境和16-1024的潜在维度上均成立。
AI.motivation: 作者发现JEPA-style目标在学习表征时会丢弃外生的但控制相关的特征，即使这些特征很容易编码。这限制了表征在下游控制任务中的实用性。
AI.method: 采用2x2实验设计，独立操作特征的可控性和相关性，通过可预测性旋钮将特征的时间可预测性与其控制相关性解耦。比较了六种目标：重构、JEPA、动作条件JEPA、基于可控性的JEPA、随机策略下的逆动力学、以及基于奖励的JEPA。
AI.result: 所有无奖励的预测目标在外生控制相关特征上的准确率接近随机水平；基于奖励的JEPA可以有选择地保留这些特征；仅需2%的奖励标记数据即可恢复特征；效果在两个环境和16-1024的潜在维度上均成立；JEPA潜变量实现的类分离仅达到监督参考的一小部分。
AI.conclusion: 无奖励的预测目标（如JEPA）不适合学习控制相关的表征，因为它们优化的是时间可预测性而非控制相关性。引入奖励信号可以高效、稳健地解决这一问题。

title: Online Data Selection for Instruction Tuning via Gaussian Processes
summary: With Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training and fine-tuning shifting its focus from data volume to data quality, quality data selection has emerged as a critical research topic. Existing online data selection methods for LLM training are typically "batch-constrained", limiting optimization to local utility within random batches. To overcome this, we propose GAIA (Global Adaptive Instruction tuning via GAussian processes), a framework that formulates data valuation as a global estimation process. GAIA employs Gaussian Process regression to model continuous utility manifolds across the semantic space, utilizing an adaptive strategy fusion mechanism to dynamically prioritize high-utility samples. By casting the strategy-posterior update as an instance of the classical fixed-share Hedge framework for tracking the best expert, we inherit a dynamic-regret guarantee that characterizes GAIA's robustness under non-stationary quality scores during training. Empirical evaluations on three datasets demonstrate that GAIA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines like \greats, establishing our method as a scalable and robust solution for efficient instruction tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出GAIA框架，利用高斯过程回归对语义空间中的连续效用流形进行建模，并采用自适应策略融合机制动态优先选择高效用样本，以实现全局数据价值估计，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有在线数据选择方法受限于"批次约束"，只能在随机批次内进行局部优化，缺乏全局视角，难以在数据质量日益重要的背景下实现高效指令微调。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程回归在语义空间中建模连续效用流形；引入自适应策略融合机制动态优先选择高效用样本；将策略后验更新建模为固定共享Hedge框架的实例，保证动态遗憾界。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上，GAIA显著优于包括GREATS在内的最先进基线方法，展现出可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GAIA作为一种全局自适应的数据选择框架，有效克服了批次约束的局部性限制，为高效指令微调提供了可扩展且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Query-Aware Spreading Activation for Multi-Hop Retrieval over Knowledge Graphs
comment: Accepted for publication in Cybernetics and Systems Analysis (Springer). Not yet published
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation built on knowledge graphs (Graph RAG) outperforms flat passage retrieval on multi-hop question answering by leveraging graph structure. In most existing systems, however, the question only sets the seed nodes; the subsequent traversal becomes "query-blind", depending solely on the graph structure. The exception is QAFD-RAG, which implements query-aware traversal via a flow-diffusion solver with combined edge re-weighting. This architecture requires loading the full graph into Python memory and an iterative solver with a variable number of iterations complicating integration with the graph database. We propose a spreading-activation method that achieves the same query-aware traversal with a single per-step semantic gate: the step weight is the cosine similarity between the candidate entity's description and the question, and the number of iterations is fixed. The whole retrieval procedure - seed mapping, propagation, top-K selection and context assembly - is expressed as a single Cypher query executed in one round-trip to Neo4j; the graph never leaves the database. On MuSiQue our method matches QAFD-RAG by exact match (32.80 vs 33.50) and outperforms the strongest purely-structural baseline in our comparison, HippoRAG, by 5.3 EM and 3.4 F1; on 2WikiMultiHopQA HippoRAG and QAFD-RAG retain an advantage due to their phrase-node architectures. An ablation with the gate disabled confirms that the gate is the source of a simultaneous F1 gain of 3.6 to 7.4 points and a retrieval-latency reduction by a factor of 1.5 to 4.9.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于扩散激活的查询感知图遍历方法，通过单步语义门控（余弦相似度）实现查询引导，并将整个检索流程整合为单一Cypher查询在Neo4j中执行，无需将图加载到Python内存。在MuSiQue上匹配QAFD-RAG，优于HippoRAG；消融实验证实门控机制同时提升F1和降低延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有Graph RAG方法在设定种子节点后，后续遍历是"查询盲"的，仅依赖图结构。QAFD-RAG虽实现查询感知遍历，但需要将完整图加载到Python内存并使用迭代求解器，难以与图数据库集成。
AI.method: 提出扩散激活方法：单步语义门控，以候选实体描述与问题的余弦相似度作为步权重，固定迭代次数。整个检索流程（种子映射、传播、Top-K选择、上下文组装）封装为单一Cypher查询，在Neo4j中一次往返完成。
AI.result: MuSiQue上EM 32.80（QAFD-RAG为33.50），超越HippoRAG 5.3 EM和3.4 F1。2WikiMultiHopQA上HippoRAG和QAFD-RAG因短语节点架构仍有优势。消融：门控机制带来F1提升3.6-7.4点，检索延迟降低1.5-4.9倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单的余弦相似度门控即可实现有效的查询感知图遍历，且完全在图数据库内完成，无需加载图到外部内存，兼具性能与工程便利性。

title: Robust Strategic Classification under Decision-Dependent Cost Uncertainty
comment: 29 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication at ICML 2026
summary: Humans facing algorithmic decision systems have been found to ``game'' them by altering their input data (at a cost to them) in order to favorably change the algorithmic outcomes they receive (at a cost to the algorithm). The growing literature on strategic classification seeks to develop robust machine learning algorithms that account for, and reduce, unwanted strategic behavior. A limitation of these existing works is that they assume the cost of strategic behavior to be fixed and independent of the classifier's decision. In practice, however, manipulation costs evolve and depend on past algorithmic decisions: today's decisions influence tomorrow's costs. This paper proposes and analyzes a two-stage robust optimization framework with a decision-dependent uncertainty set to capture such dependencies. We highlight that awareness of policy-dependent costs not only reduces uncertainty, but also better curtails gaming of the algorithmic system over time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个决策依赖不确定性的两阶段鲁棒优化框架，用于处理战略分类中操纵成本随算法决策动态变化的问题，并证明考虑成本依赖性可减少不确定性并有效遏制算法博弈行为。
AI.motivation: 现有战略分类研究假设操纵成本固定且独立于分类器决策，但现实中操纵成本会因过去算法决策而动态变化。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段鲁棒优化框架，引入决策依赖的不确定性集合来建模操纵成本与算法决策之间的动态依赖关系。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，考虑政策依赖成本不仅能降低不确定性，还能更有效地遏制对算法系统的博弈行为。
AI.conclusion: 在战略分类中纳入决策依赖的成本动态有助于设计更鲁棒、更不易被利用的算法系统。

title: Federated Learning with Energy-Based Structured Probabilistic Inference
comment: Accepted to the Structured Probabilistic Inference Generative Modeling workshop at ICML 2026
summary: Federated learning typically aggregates client updates using fixed or heuristic weighting rules, which can be suboptimal when clients have heterogeneous data and varying contributions to the global model. We propose a framework that refines client aggregation weights using Conditional Random Fields (CRFs). Our method defines unary potentials for individual clients and pairwise potentials for all client pairs, allowing the server to model both client-specific reliability and interactions between clients. The resulting CRF inference produces aggregation weights that enable better convergence of the global training objective. Experiments show that, under non-IID heterogeneity, our approach consistently improves performance over well-established federated learning baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出使用条件随机场(CRF)优化联邦学习中客户端聚合权重的框架，通过建模客户端个体可靠性与客户端间交互关系，生成更优的聚合权重以提升非独立同分布异构场景下的全局模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习使用固定或启发式聚合权重规则，在客户端数据异构、贡献差异大的场景下表现次优，需要更精细的权重建模方法。
AI.method: 构建条件随机场(CRF)模型：定义单点势能刻画客户端个体可靠性，定义成对势能建模客户端间交互关系，通过CRF推理生成聚合权重。
AI.result: 在非独立同分布(Non-IID)异构数据场景下，该方法持续优于主流联邦学习基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CRF框架能有效提升联邦学习在异构数据环境下的聚合效果，为自适应权重分配提供了新思路。

title: Beyond Drug Discovery: The Nanotechnology Molecular Optimization (NMO) Benchmark
summary: Generative molecular design is shaped by simple proxy benchmarks for drug-like properties and models pretrained on large pharmaceutical datasets. This combination yields strong benchmark metrics but limits transferability to domains structurally distinct from drug discovery. To overcome this limitation and drive discovery toward real, scientifically grounded targets, we introduce the Nanotechnology Molecular Optimization (NMO) Benchmark, which bridges machine learning (ML) and quantum materials science. NMO acts simultaneously as a rigorous testbed for the ML community and a discovery engine for nanotechnology research. The suite replaces proxy oracles with quantum simulations and introduces strict protocols that prioritize scientific utility over leaderboard-oriented overfitting. The physics-based NMO tasks impose hard structural constraints and rugged fitness landscapes, posing fundamentally new requirements on generative models. Notably, advanced molecular optimization methods underperform much simpler approaches on the NMO tasks. We develop a new baseline method identifying the critical components to solve the NMO tasks, including a novel representation for modeling structural constraints and a domain-agnostic pretraining strategy to eliminate pharmaceutical dataset bias. Our results surpass state-of-the-art physical properties and reveal previously unknown structural motifs, offering new insights for the nanotechnology community and demonstrating that ML can drive genuine scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了纳米技术分子优化（NMO）基准，用量子模拟替代代理指标，推动机器学习从"刷榜"走向真正的科学发现。现有方法在该基准上表现不佳，作者提出的新基线方法超越了现有物理性质并发现了新的结构基序。
AI.motivation: 现有生成分子设计方法过度依赖制药领域的代理指标和预训练数据集，导致在结构迥异的领域（如纳米技术）迁移性差，无法驱动真实的科学发现。
AI.method: 构建NMO基准，用量子模拟替代代理oracle；提出新基线方法，包括用于建模结构约束的新型表示和消除药物数据集偏置的领域无关预训练策略。
AI.result: 高级分子优化方法在NMO任务上不如简单方法；新基线方法超越了现有物理性质，并发现了此前未知的结构基序。
AI.conclusion: ML可以驱动真正的科学发现，NMO为ML社区提供了严谨的测试平台，同时为纳米技术研究提供了发现引擎。

title: Characterizing Optimizer-Dependent Training Dynamics Through Hessian Eigenvector Displacement and Localization
comment: Accepted as a poster at High-dimensional Learning Dynamics (HiLD), ICML 2026. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=SabYcw5Nh6
summary: Hessian spectral properties are a standard tool in analysing neural-network training, with eigenvalues linked to sharpness, generalization, and optimization dynamics. Eigenvalues quantify curvature magnitude, while eigenvectors identify which parameters generate that curvature. In this work, we study how the leading Hessian eigenvectors evolve during training and how they affect the learning trajectories. We track the training dynamics of multilayer perceptrons on a classification problem and measure eigenvector dynamics through two complementary statistics: (i) displacement over time, inspired by analyses of glassy systems, and (ii) localization via the inverse participation ratio. The metrics are compared against a random null model of the Hessian induced by the architecture. Our results reveal clear optimizer-dependent behaviour. SGD leads to progressively more stable leading curvature directions, while Adam exhibits substantially stronger reorganization of eigenvectors throughout training. We also observe a localization phenomenon under Adam, where a small subset of parameters contributes disproportionately to the leading curvature directions. These results suggest that Hessian eigenvector dynamics capture key differences in optimizer behaviour and the resulting training trajectories.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Hessian矩阵特征向量的演化分析，发现SGD优化器使曲率方向趋于稳定，而Adam则导致特征向量持续重组并出现参数局部化现象。
AI.motivation: Hessian矩阵特征值已被广泛用于分析神经网络训练的锐度、泛化和优化动力学，但特征向量在训练过程中的演化及其对学习轨迹的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 在多分类问题上训练多层感知机，通过两种互补统计量追踪Hessian主特征向量动力学：(i) 位移量（借鉴玻璃系统分析）;(ii) 逆参与比测量局部化程度，并与架构诱导的随机零模型对比。
AI.result: SGD下主导曲率方向逐渐趋于稳定；Adam下特征向量在训练中持续显著重组，且少数参数对主导曲率方向贡献过大（局部化现象）。
AI.conclusion: Hessian特征向量动力学能够捕捉不同优化器的关键行为差异及其导致的训练轨迹差异。

title: B3O: Scalable Boltzmann Batch Bayesian Optimization
summary: Modern engineering workflows increasingly rely on massive parallel simulation, driving the need for scalable, large-batch Bayesian Optimization (BO). Existing batch BO methods, however, incur large computational cost or rely on approximations that erode batch diversity. We propose B3O (Boltzmann Batch Bayesian Optimization), a framework that reframes batch generation as a pure sampling problem: drawing samples directly from the Boltzmann distribution defined by the acquisition function avoids the bottlenecks of existing large-batch methods. Theoretically, we prove that queries sampled from this distribution incur only negligible additional regret. Empirically, B3O outperforms existing batch BO methods on standard synthetic benchmarks and adapts robustly across complex applied tasks, including multi-objective electrode design and mixed-variable race car configuration.

AI.tldr: B3O将批量贝叶斯优化重新定义为纯采样问题，直接从采集函数定义的玻尔兹曼分布中采样，避免了现有大批量方法的计算瓶颈，并在理论上证明了其仅产生可忽略的额外遗憾，实验上在多项任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模批量贝叶斯优化方法面临计算成本高或依赖近似导致批次多样性下降的问题，亟需一种可扩展的高效批量生成方法。
AI.method: 提出B3O框架，将批量生成重新定义为从采集函数定义的玻尔兹曼分布中直接采样的纯采样问题，避免了大批量方法的计算瓶颈。
AI.result: 理论证明采样查询仅产生可忽略的额外遗憾；实验上在标准合成基准和复杂应用任务（多目标电极设计、混合变量赛车配置）中均优于现有批量BO方法。
AI.conclusion: B3O为大规模批量贝叶斯优化提供了一种高效、可扩展且保持批次多样性的解决方案，具有良好的理论保证和实际适用性。

title: Curvature-Guided Sheaf Diffusion for Unsupervised Community Detection on Heterophilic Graphs
summary: Detecting communities in heterophilic graphs -- where connected nodes often belong to different classes -- is hard for unsupervised methods: classical modularity and spectral methods are feature agnostic, while deep graph-clustering methods rely on contrastive or generative machinery that is opaque. We propose Curvature-Guided Sheaf Diffusion (CGSD), a fully unsupervised community-detection algorithm that uses the discrete Forman--Ricci curvature of each edge as its single topological signal, propagated through every stage of an end-to-end pipeline. CGSD makes three concrete contributions: (i)~a curvature-gated sheaf-diffusion encoder that gates edge messages by $σ(κ_e)$ and is trained from three label-free structural losses (modularity, anti-collapse, curvature-weighted reconstruction); (ii)~a curvature-aware spectral clusterer (CSpec) that re-weights the $k$-NN affinity of the embedding by $σ(ακ_{e^*})$ before Ng--Jordan--Weiss; and (iii)~a unified label-free evaluation against nine truly-unsupervised baselines. On five heterophilic benchmarks (Cora, Cornell, Texas, Wisconsin, Chameleon), CGSD wins outright on Wisconsin and Chameleon and is competitive on the remaining three against nine unsupervised baselines. The gain over the strongest baseline is driven by the clusterer, not the encoder: on the same embedding, CSpec improves mean NMI from $0.091$ with $K$-Means to $0.107$ ($+15\%$, paired $t$-test $p=0.008$). The mechanism is interpretable: intra-community and inter-community curvature distributions are visibly separated. Code is open-sourced at https://github.com/woodywff/cgsd.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Curvature-Guided Sheath Diffusion (CGSD)，一种完全无监督的异质图社区检测算法。它利用边的离散 Forman-Ricci 曲率作为唯一拓扑信号，通过曲率门控的 sheaf 扩散编码器和曲率感知的谱聚类器，在五个异质图基准上取得有竞争力的结果，且机制可解释。
AI.motivation: 异质图（heterophilic graphs）中相连节点常属于不同类别，传统无监督方法（如模块度、谱方法）忽略节点特征，而深度图聚类方法依赖对比学习或生成模型，不透明且难以解释。因此需要一种既利用特征又保持可解释性的无监督社区检测方法。
AI.method: CGSD 包含三个核心贡献：(i) 曲率门控的 sheaf 扩散编码器，通过 σ(κ_e) 门控边消息传递，使用模块度、抗坍塌、曲率加权重建三个无标签损失训练；(ii) 曲率感知谱聚类器（CSpec），在 Ng-Jordan-Weiss 前用 σ(ακ_{e*}) 重加权 k-NN 相似度；(iii) 在五个异质图基准上与九个无监督基线进行统一评估。
AI.result: 在 Cora、Cornell、Texas、Wisconsin、Chameleon 五个基准上，CGSD 在 Wisconsin 和 Chameleon 上取得最优，在其他三个上具有竞争力。聚类器相比编码器贡献更大：相同嵌入上 CSpec 相比 K-Means 将平均 NMI 从 0.091 提升至 0.107（+15%，p=0.008）。社区内和社区间的曲率分布明显分离，具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: CGSD 验证了曲率这一简单拓扑信号在异质图无监督社区检测中的有效性，既提升了性能又保持了可解释性，开源代码便于复现和扩展。

title: KnowsTFM: Knowledge-Informed Fine-Tuning of Small Tabular Foundation Models
summary: Tabular foundation models have advanced deep learning for tabular data by delivering strong default performance across many small and medium tasks. Yet in niche domains, where data is scarce, high-dimensional, and shifted from the pretraining distribution, they may still fail to outperform carefully designed domain-specific methods. Many such domains also provide curated relational knowledge in the form of knowledge graphs and knowledge banks, but how to use this knowledge to improve and steer \textit{small} specialist tabular foundation models remains unclear. We address this problem through \textbf{Know}ledge-informed fine-tuning of \textbf{s}mall \textbf{T}abular \textbf{F}oundation \textbf{M}odels (\modelname). Specifically, we study nanoscale TabPFN- and TabICL-style variants, pretrained under controlled synthetic prior families and adapted using two complementary mechanisms: structural attention priors derived from knowledge graphs and parameter-efficient low-rank updates. We show that injecting domain-specific structural knowledge during fine-tuning yields meaningful gains over vanilla variants in specialist settings, whereas gains on general-domain tasks are marginal. We further observe that continual fine-tuning of frontier models can trigger collapse of pretrained knowledge and mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KnowTab方法，通过知识图谱的结构化注意力先验和参数高效的低秩更新，对小型表格基础模型（如TabPFN、TabICL）进行知识注入微调，在专业领域（如纳米科学）中相比普通变体取得显著提升，但在通用任务上增益有限；同时发现持续微调前沿模型可能导致预训练知识退化。
AI.motivation: 在数据稀缺、高维且分布偏移的专业领域（如纳米科学），通用表格基础模型表现不佳；而这些领域通常存在结构化的关系知识（知识图谱/知识库），但如何利用这些知识来引导和改善小型专业表格基础模型尚不明确。
AI.method: 对小型表格基础模型（TabPFN/TabICL风格变体）进行知识注入微调，采用两种互补机制：1）从知识图谱导出的结构注意力先验；2）参数高效的低秩更新（LoRA）。模型在受控的合成先验族上预训练，再针对专业领域进行适配。
AI.result: 在专业领域（纳米科学）设定下，注入领域结构化知识的微调相比普通变体带来显著性能提升；但在通用域任务上增益较小。此外，持续微调前沿模型可能导致预训练知识和机制崩塌。
AI.conclusion: 结构化知识注入在专业场景下有效，但通用场景收益有限；持续微调需谨慎以防止灾难性遗忘。

title: Towards Continual Motion-Language Agents: LoRA Variants for Incremental Motion Understanding and Generation
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure, Accepted at the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs) 2026
summary: Motion-language agents must possess the bidirectional capability to both understand human movement (motion-to-text, M2T) and generate it from natural language (text-to-motion, T2M). While foundational models have achieved strong performance in static settings, autonomous agents operating in dynamic environments must continuously incorporate new motion concepts -- such as novel athletic styles or specialized gestures -- without catastrophic forgetting of previously acquired skills. We investigate the stability-plasticity trade-off in bidirectional motion-language learning under sequential task exposure. Building on a frozen large language model backbone, we introduce low-rank adaptation (LoRA) variants designed to mitigate inter-task interference. We specifically propose mixture-of-experts architectures that utilize an autoencoder-based router to select task-specific experts at inference time, so that no task-label is needed. To evaluate these methods, we establish a reproducible five-task benchmark derived from HumanML3D through semantic clustering of motion descriptions. Our experimental results demonstrate near-zero forgetting across both M2T and T2M directions while maintaining high generation and captioning quality. Furthermore, we show that hard expert selection via routing significantly outperforms soft expert blending in quality metrics, indicating that preserving expert isolation is critical for maintaining performance in our continual learning setting. Finally, we observe that a divergence between token-level accuracy and downstream generation quality may occur, highlighting the need for more comprehensive evaluation protocols in future research on lifelong motion-language agents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了运动-语言智能体在连续学习场景下的稳定性-可塑性权衡，提出基于冻结大语言模型和混合专家架构的低秩适配方法，实现双向运动-语言任务的无遗忘学习。
AI.motivation: 现有运动-语言模型在静态环境下表现良好，但在动态环境中无法持续学习新运动概念（如新运动风格或手势），且容易灾难性遗忘先前技能。因此需要研究连续学习下的稳定性-可塑性权衡。
AI.method: 在大语言模型主干上引入低秩适配（LoRA）变体，提出混合专家（MoE）架构，利用基于自编码器的路由器在推理时选择任务特定专家，无需任务标签。同时构建了从HumanML3D衍生的五任务基准。
AI.result: 1) 在M2T和T2M两个方向上均实现近零遗忘；2) 硬专家选择（基于路由）在质量指标上显著优于软专家混合，说明专家隔离对性能至关重要；3) 发现token级准确率与下游生成质量可能存在不一致。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在连续学习下实现双向运动-语言任务的高质量保持，专家隔离是关键；同时指出需要更全面的评估协议来应对token准确率与生成质量的偏差问题。

title: DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview: A Low-Compute Real-Time Controllable World Model
summary: We present DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview, a preview foundational world model for real-time interactive world simulation. The system adapts the LongLive 1 autoregressive video stack, itself derived from Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B, with a residual action pathway inspired by the Matrix-Game family. DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview focuses on a complementary axis to frontier-scale world simulators: low-compute adaptation, consumer-GPU runtime, and broad interactive capability coverage. It supports live keyboard and mouse control, multimodal initialization, mid-stream reprompting, dual-view operation, and minute-scale interactive rollouts at native 480p resolution, reaching up to 14 to 15 FPS FPS on a single RTX 4090 with a low memory footprint. By leveraging open video backbones and applying targeted adaptation runs, we build the preview system with high cost-efficiency. DF-World 0.1 Preview is not yet a memory-complete or frontier-quality world simulator, but demonstrates a practical low-compute route toward real-time controllable world-model previews on consumer GPUs.

AI.tldr: DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview 是一个基于开源视频模型构建的轻量级实时交互世界模拟器，支持键盘鼠标控制、多模态初始化、中流重提示、双视角操作，在单张RTX 4090上以低内存占用达到14-15 FPS，展示了在消费级GPU上实现实时可控世界模型预览的低计算路线。
AI.motivation: 探索与前沿大规模世界模拟器互补的低计算路线，使实时交互世界模拟能够在消费级GPU上运行，降低计算门槛和成本。
AI.method: 基于Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B视频骨干网络，采用LongLive 1自回归视频堆栈，并引入受Matrix-Game系列启发的残差动作路径（residual action pathway），通过有针对性的适配训练构建系统。
AI.result: 支持键盘鼠标实时控制、多模态初始化、中流重提示、双视角操作，在480p分辨率下实现分钟级交互滚动，单张RTX 4090上达到14-15 FPS，内存占用低。
AI.conclusion: 该预览系统虽尚未达到记忆完备或前沿质量，但验证了利用开源视频骨干和针对性适配训练，在消费级GPU上实现实时可控世界模型预览的实用低计算路线。

title: Toward an Energy-Optimized Operation of Data Centers Located in Wind Farms Using Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper studies Reinforcement Learning as an online controller for curtailment-aware workload shifting in wind-turbine-integrated high-performance computing (HPC) data centers. We introduce a reproducible fixed-day simulation framework with synthetic wind and price signals and delayed completion feedback, designed to be extensible toward more complex scenarios. As a controlled benchmarking basis, we then focus on the minimal case with one wind turbine and one co-located data center. In this setting, pure Reinforcement Learning exhibits a pronounced credit-assignment problem and tends to underuse free wind energy early in the day. We therefore evaluate two complementary countermeasures: optimization-based Imitation Learning and potential-based Reward Shaping. Across multi-seed training and a 200-day test set, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) variant with an additional on-policy update routine achieve strong empirical performance among learned policies, and both Imitation Learning and Reward Shaping provide improvements in relevant configurations. A performance gap to the optimizer remains, which is expected: the optimizer plans offline with full-day foresight, whereas Reinforcement Learning must decide online from current observations without future realizations. The benchmark and ablation results provide a transparent basis for extending the approach toward richer multi-site and continuous-time scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文研究强化学习作为在线控制器，用于风能集成的高性能计算数据中心的负载调度。实验表明纯强化学习存在信用分配问题，而模仿学习和奖励塑形可提供改进，但与有全局视角的优化器仍有差距。
AI.motivation: 在风能集成的HPC数据中心中，如何在线实时调度计算负载以最大化利用风能、降低能耗成本，是一个关键问题。强化学习有潜力作为在线控制器，但其在具有延迟反馈的环境中的表现尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建了可复现的固定天仿真框架（含合成风速、电价信号和延迟完成反馈），聚焦单风机+单数据中心的基准场景。对比纯强化学习（PPO、SAC变体）与两种改进策略：基于优化的模仿学习和基于势能的奖励塑形。
AI.result: PPO和SAC变体在经验性能上表现优异；模仿学习和奖励塑形在特定配置下均能带来改进；但所有RL方法均与有全局视角的离线优化器存在性能差距。
AI.conclusion: RL作为在线控制器可行但有局限性，基准测试和消融实验为向多站点、连续时间等更复杂场景扩展提供了透明基础。

title: Hybrid Active-Online Learning Framework for Label-Efficient Concept Drift Adaptation in Optical Network Failure Detection
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at the European Conference on Optical Communication (ECOC 2026)
summary: We propose a hybrid active-online learning framework for label-efficient concept drift adaptation in optical network failure detection. Using margin-based selective labeling, our method achieves nearceiling accuracy and AUC scores while querying only 3.4% of streaming samples, with negligible latency overhead compared to static inference.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合主动-在线学习框架，用于光网络故障检测中的标签高效概念漂移适应，仅查询3.4%的流样本即可达到接近最优的准确率和AUC分数。
AI.motivation: 解决光网络故障检测中标签成本高且数据分布随时间变化（概念漂移）的问题，追求标签高效的自适应学习。
AI.method: 采用混合主动-在线学习框架，结合基于边际的选择性标注策略，在流样本中仅对不确定性高的样本请求标注。
AI.result: 在仅查询3.4%流样本的条件下，达到了接近上限的准确率和AUC分数，且延迟开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高检测性能的同时大幅降低了标注成本，适用于实际光网络中的实时故障检测场景。

title: FlexTab: A Flexible Encoder-Decoder Architecture for In-Context Learning Across Diverse Tabular Tasks
summary: We introduce FlexTab, a flexible encoder-decoder architecture for in-context learning on tabular data that pairs a single, task-agnostic encoder with a suite of task-specific decoders. Unlike existing tabular in-context learners, which entangle feature representations with a specific prediction target, our design produces \textit{target-agnostic} row embeddings that can be leveraged across a wide range of downstream tasks within a table-native in-context learning setup. We demonstrate this flexibility on six distinct problems: classification, regression, anomaly detection, clustering, entity matching, and entity classification in relational databases. Both the encoder and the task-specific decoders are trained on a large corpus of real-world, unlabeled tables. FlexTab achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification, regression, anomaly detection and entity matching, while remaining competitive with specialized models on entity classification in a relational setting. These results demonstrate that a single shared encoder, paired with task-specific decoders, can serve as an effective general-purpose backbone for diverse tabular prediction problems. The inference code and checkpoints will be made publicly available at https://github.com/SAP-samples/flextab.

AI.tldr: FlexTab是一种灵活的编码器-解码器架构，使用单个任务无关的编码器搭配多个任务特定的解码器，在表格数据上进行上下文学习。在分类、回归、异常检测、聚类、实体匹配和实体分类六个任务上取得优异性能，其中在分类、回归、异常检测和实体匹配上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据上下文学习方法将特征表示与特定预测目标纠缠在一起，缺乏灵活性。作者希望设计一种目标无关的行嵌入，能同时适用于多种下游任务。
AI.method: 提出FlexTab架构：一个任务无关的编码器生成目标无关的行嵌入，搭配多个任务特定的解码器。编码器和解码器均在大量真实无标签表格数据上联合训练。
AI.result: 在分类、回归、异常检测和实体匹配任务上达到SOTA；在关系数据库的实体分类上与专用模型表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 单个共享编码器搭配任务特定解码器可以作为表格预测问题的有效通用骨干网络。

title: DRIFT: Difficulty Routing Self-DIstillation with Rhythm-Gated Exploration and Success BuFfer Training
summary: Enabling large language models to achieve stable self-improvement without external expert supervision remains a central challenge in complex reasoning tasks. Existing self-distillation and reinforcement learning methods lack explicit mechanisms for tracking problem-level learning progress and adapting optimization strategies accordingly. Consequently, training may over-optimize easy problems, receive weak supervision from hard problems, and fail to sufficiently explore borderline cases. To resolve these issues, we propose DRIFT, an online self-evolution policy optimization framework for large language models. DRIFT regulates the model's self-improvement process through the joint use of Difficulty Routing and Rhythm Gating. The former identifies the model's learning state at the problem level and dynamically allocates self-distillation and reinforcement learning signals, while the latter refines policy updates at the token level, concentrating exploration on critical reasoning positions. By further incorporating a success buffer and a two-stage curriculum learning strategy, DRIFT preserves high-quality historical experience while progressively guiding the model from reliable behavior acquisition toward stable policy evolution. Evaluated across five benchmarks and three model scales, DRIFT surpasses the peak performance of both GRPO and SDPO across all evaluated metrics. On the average score over the five benchmarks, DRIFT achieves 79.5$\%$, outperforming GRPO by 9.5$\%$ and SDPO by 7.5$\%$, establishing a new state-of-the-art result. Notably, on ToolUse, DRIFT reaches an accuracy of 79.2$\%$, improving over GRPO by 13.5$\%$ and SDPO by 10.7$\%$, setting a new state-of-the-art and substantially outperforming all concurrent methods.

AI.tldr: DRIFT是一个面向大语言模型的在线自我进化策略优化框架，通过难度路由（Difficulty Routing）和节奏门控（Rhythm Gating）两个机制，动态调控模型在问题层面和词元层面的自蒸馏与强化学习信号分配，实现稳定的自提升。在五个基准和三种模型规模上，DRIFT超越了GRPO和SDPO，平均准确率达79.5%，同时在ToolUse任务上达到79.2%，均达到新最优水平。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型自蒸馏和强化学习方法缺乏显式跟踪问题级学习进度的机制，无法针对性地调整优化策略，导致对简单问题过度优化、对困难问题监督信号弱、对边界情况探索不足。因此，需要一种能够动态调控自我改进过程的框架。
AI.method: DRIFT框架包含两个核心机制：（1）难度路由（Difficulty Routing）——在问题层面识别模型的学习状态，动态分配自蒸馏和强化学习信号；（2）节奏门控（Rhythm Gating）——在词元层面细化策略更新，将探索集中于关键推理位置。同时引入成功缓冲区（success buffer）和两阶段课程学习策略，保留优质历史经验，逐步引导模型从可靠行为获取向稳定策略进化过渡。
AI.result: 在五个基准和三种模型规模上，DRIFT在所有评估指标上超越GRPO和SDPO的峰值性能。五个基准的平均准确率为79.5%，超过GRPO 9.5%、超过SDPO 7.5%，达到新最优水平。在ToolUse任务上准确率达79.2%，比GRPO提升13.5%、比SDPO提升10.7%，显著优于所有同期方法。
AI.conclusion: DRIFT通过引入显式的问题级学习进度跟踪和动态优化策略调整机制，有效解决了现有方法在自我改进中的过优化、弱监督和探索不足问题，在多个基准上取得了新的最优结果，为语言模型的稳定自我进化提供了有效方案。

title: On the Vulnerability of Parameter-Level Defenses to Model Merging
summary: The training-free integration of expert models via model merging has exposed significant security risks, enabling free-riders to combine specialized models without authorization. Recent works propose parameter-level defenses that employ linear parameter transformations to neutralize this threat. In this paper, we systematically analyze such defenses and reveal that their protected task vectors are inherently small in magnitude. Consequently, the protected weights remain overwhelmingly dominated by the pretrained model. Based on this observation, we designate the pretrained model as a static reference anchor and propose the Anchor-Guided Attack (AGA) to circumvent existing safeguards. Specifically, AGA aligns the protected model with this anchor to recover the transformation matrix analytically. Extensive evaluations validate that AGA consistently bypasses both individual and composite defenses under realistic defense-agnostic scenarios. Furthermore, we provide Anchor-Repulsive Fine-tuning (ARF), a defense method to mitigate the anchor dominance leveraged by AGA. Empirical results confirm that ARF effectively defeats the proposed attack. Our code is available at https://github.com/krumpguo/secure-merge-attack.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了基于参数变换的模型合并防御存在权重被预训练模型主导的漏洞，提出锚点引导攻击（AGA）通过对齐预训练模型恢复变换矩阵以绕过防御，并设计了锚点排斥微调（ARF）作为反制措施。
AI.motivation: 模型合并中免费搭车者未经授权组合专家模型带来安全风险，现有基于线性参数变换的防御方案存在被绕过的隐患。
AI.method: 1）系统性分析发现防御后的任务向量幅值很小，权重由预训练模型主导；2）将预训练模型作为静态锚点，提出AGA通过对齐保护模型与锚点来解析变换矩阵；3）提出ARF通过微调削弱锚点主导性以防御AGA。
AI.result: AGA在防御不可知场景下持续绕过单一和组合防御；ARF有效抵御AGA攻击。
AI.conclusion: 现有参数级防御存在可被利用的固有弱点，而ARF提供了一种可行的反制思路。

title: FlowAWR: Online Adaptive Flow Reinforcement via Advantage-Weighted Rectification
summary:
Aligning generative flow models on continuous spaces via online reinforcement learning is constrained by intractable trajectory likelihoods. Existing density-approximated policy gradient methods rely on stochastic SDE samplers to construct tractable transition kernels, which introduce training-inference inconsistencies and necessitates Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG).
  While implicit frameworks such as DiffusionNFT directly optimize forward-process velocity fields, its heuristic fixed-magnitude corrections prevent optimization strength from relative intra-group quality.
  We propose \textit{Flow Advantage-Weighted Rectification} (\textbf{FlowAWR}), a paradigm that recasts continuous generative policy optimization as supervised regression toward a theoretically optimal velocity field.
  Starting from the optimal policy of a KL-constrained reward maximization, FlowAWR derives the optimal velocity field that admits a magnitude-aware, advantage-weighted rectification form, yielding SDE-free optimization and CFG-free generation.
  In comparative evaluations on SD3.5-Medium, FlowAWR achieves improved alignment performance alongside a 2$\times$ to 5$\times$ convergence acceleration over DiffusionNFT (e.g., reaching a 24.12 PickScore in 1.2k steps, versus 23.82 in 2.0k steps for DiffusionNFT and 23.50 in $>$4k steps for FlowGRPO). Under multi-reward constraints, FlowAWR sustains generation quality, satisfying structural rules while maintaining stable out-of-domain performance.

AI.tldr: FlowAWR是一种将连续空间生成流模型策略优化转化为有监督回归的方法，通过推导优势加权速度场实现SDE-free优化和CFG-free生成，在SD3.5-Medium上取得2-5倍收敛加速。
AI.motivation: 现有连续空间生成流模型在线强化学习受限于难以计算的轨迹似然，而基于密度近似的策略梯度方法依赖随机SDE采样器导致训练-推理不一致，且需要CFG。隐式框架如DiffusionNFT的启发式固定幅度校正无法根据组内相对质量调整优化强度。
AI.method: 从KL约束奖励最大化的最优策略出发，推导出最优速度场，该速度场具有幅度感知的优势加权校正形式，从而实现无SDE优化和无CFG生成。
AI.result: 在SD3.5-Medium上，FlowAWR以1.2k步达到24.12 PickScore，而DiffusionNFT需2.0k步达23.82，FlowGRPO需超过4k步达23.50，实现2-5倍收敛加速。在多奖励约束下保持生成质量。
AI.conclusion: FlowAWR通过理论推导的最优速度场，有效解决了连续生成流模型策略优化中的关键问题，实现了更高效、更稳定的对齐性能。

title: Scalar Representations of Neural Network Training Dynamics
summary: Training in artificial neural networks can be viewed as a trajectory evolving through a high-dimensional loss landscape. However, the large number of trainable parameters makes the direct analysis of these dynamics challenging. In this work, we treat such training trajectories as temporal networks and apply recently proposed strategies for the scalar embedding of temporal networks. We investigate whether such a scalar embedding provides a meaningful low-dimensional representation of neural network training dynamics. Using a multilayer perceptron trained on the MNIST classification task, we show that the embedding preserves the main dynamical features observed in the original parameter space, including the emergence of sensitivity to initial conditions for specific learning rate regimes and an accurate reconstruction of the network's maximum Lyapunov exponent. We then use the embedded scalar trajectory to define a characteristic time, analogous to a Lyapunov time, after which the exponential separation between initially close embedded trajectories saturates. This characteristic time captures the typical decorrelation time between initially close network trajectories in the original high-dimensional system. Finally, we investigate the statistical organization of asymptotic training states through a spacing observable defined in the embedded space. We find that the distributions of rescaled asymptotic spacings collapse onto a common form across initial conditions and are compatible with a skew lognormal distribution. Altogether, our results suggest that scalar low-dimensional embeddings provide a useful framework for studying and visualizing the dynamical properties of neural network optimization trajectories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将神经网络训练轨迹视为时序网络，并应用标量嵌入方法将其降维到一维。实验表明该嵌入能保留原始高维空间的主要动力学特征，包括对初始条件的敏感性、最大李雅普诺夫指数的重构，以及定义特征时间尺度。此外，嵌入空间中渐近状态的间隔分布服从偏对数正态分布。
AI.motivation: 神经网络训练涉及大量可训练参数，直接分析高维损失景观中的动力学轨迹非常困难，因此需要一种有效的降维方法来研究训练动力学。
AI.method: 将训练轨迹视为时序网络，采用针对时序网络的标量嵌入策略，将高维参数轨迹映射到一维标量序列。在MNIST分类任务上训练多层感知机进行验证。
AI.result: 标量嵌入能够：(1) 保留原始参数空间的主要动力学特征；(2) 重构网络的最大李雅普诺夫指数；(3) 定义类似李雅普诺夫时间的特征时间尺度；(4) 嵌入空间中渐近间隔分布与偏对数正态分布一致，且在不同初始条件下具有普适性。
AI.conclusion: 标量低维嵌入为研究和可视化神经网络优化轨迹的动力学特性提供了一个有用的框架。

title: Predict, Reuse, and Repair: Accelerating Dynamic Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Decoding
comment: 9 pages body plus 3 pages appendix, 13 pages total
summary: Dynamic sparse attention (DSA) accelerates long-context LLM decoding by attending to only the top-K KV blocks relevant to each query, but it introduces a serialized selection-to-attention dependency that emerges as a new latency bottleneck. We present PRR, a speculate-reuse-repair runtime that exploits temporal locality in DSA selections to predict likely blocks, speculate the attention over them while selection is in flight, and incrementally repair missed blocks once the true selected set is known. PRR uses a lightweight EMA-based predictor, a profiling-guided speculation budget that keeps speculative work off the critical path, and a FlashAttention-based repair kernel that folds missed blocks into the partial attention state using online-softmax statistics. Across long-context benchmarks and representative DSA methods, PRR reduces per-token decoding latency by up to 40% while preserving downstream task accuracy. Github: https://github.com/Tianyu9748/Incremental_FlashAttention

AI.tldr: PRR是一个推测-复用-修复运行时，通过利用动态稀疏注意力中的时间局部性预测可能被选中的KV块，在选择的同时推测性地进行注意力计算，并增量式修复遗漏块，从而减少长上下文LLM解码中的序列化选择-注意力依赖延迟，最高可降低40%的解码延迟。
AI.motivation: 动态稀疏注意力（DSA）虽然通过仅关注top-K KV块来加速长上下文LLM解码，但其引入的序列化选择-注意力依赖成为新的延迟瓶颈，需要打破这一依赖以进一步加速。
AI.method: 提出PRR运行时，包含三个关键组件：1) 轻量级EMA预测器利用时间局部性预测可能被选中的块；2) 分析引导的推测预算确保推测工作不在关键路径上；3) 基于FlashAttention的修复核，利用在线softmax统计将遗漏块融入部分注意力状态。
AI.result: 在长上下文基准测试和代表性DSA方法上，PRR将每token解码延迟降低高达40%，同时保持下游任务准确性。
AI.conclusion: PRR通过推测-复用-修复策略有效缓解了DSA的序列化延迟瓶颈，实现了显著的加速效果且不影响任务精度。

title: Beyond IID: How General Are Tabular Foundation Models, Really?
summary: Foundation models for predictive machine learning on tabular data have recently gained significant traction in academia and industry. Research communities across disciplines are increasingly evaluating tabular foundation models on diverse datasets and tasks. However, these task- and discipline-specific evaluations remain largely inaccessible to model researchers because benchmark software and evaluation protocols are fragmented. As a result, model researchers rely on standard benchmarks, which are mostly defined for tasks where tabular foundation models already excel. The most challenging scenarios are excluded, limiting meaningful progress in the field by focusing on marginal improvements on IID data rather than on broader, more demanding challenges. To overcome this, we introduce BeyondArena, the first unified holistic benchmark for tabular data that supports diverse task types (IID, temporal, grouped), across sample size and feature dimensionality scales, with diverse feature types (with text, with high cardinality) from a broad range of disciplines. To enable unified benchmarking beyond standard benchmarks, we introduce Data Foundry, a Python framework and metadata schema for curating tabular datasets for predictive machine learning. Our results across 11 models and 142 curated datasets show that existing tabular foundation models excel on tiny- to medium-sized IID data, while traditional tree-based and deep learning models still dominate on non-IID, large, and high-dimensional datasets. BeyondArena guides model research for the most demanding challenges in tabular data, enabling progress towards truly foundational tabular models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 BeyondArena，首个统一且全面的表格数据基准测试平台，支持多种任务类型（IID、时序、分组）、样本量、特征维度及特征类型（含文本、高基数），并引入 Data Foundry 框架用于数据集管理。在 11 个模型和 142 个数据集上的实验表明，现有表格基础模型在小型到中型 IID 数据上表现优异，而传统树模型和深度学习模型在非 IID、大规模和高维数据上仍占优势。
AI.motivation: 现有表格基础模型评估分散且碎片化，研究者依赖的标准基准排除了最具挑战性的场景，导致研究局限于 IID 数据上的边际改进，难以推动表格基础模型在更广泛和困难任务上的实质性进展。
AI.method: 提出 BeyondArena 基准平台和 Data Foundry（Python 框架+元数据模式），统一管理来自多学科的多样化表格数据集，支持 IID、时序、分组等任务类型及多种规模与特征类型，并在 11 个模型上进行了系统性对比评估。
AI.result: 在 142 个数据集上的实验显示：现有表格基础模型在小型到中型 IID 数据上表现优异；但在非 IID、大规模和高维数据上，传统树模型（如 XGBoost）和深度学习模型仍然占主导地位。
AI.conclusion: BeyondArena 能够指导表格模型研究聚焦于最具挑战性的问题，推动真正具有通用能力的表格基础模型的进步。

title: Diffusion Fine-tuning with Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation
summary: Distillation and Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning are the primary pillars of diffusion post-training. While traditionally studied in isolation, the interaction between these phases remains poorly understood, and in particular how fine-tuning impacts the generative quality of distilled models. We introduce Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation (RMMD), a novel framework that simultaneously distills diffusion models and maximizes a reward function. RMMD preserves the high-fidelity ``naturalness'' characteristic of advanced distillation (such as 8-step Moment Matching) by adapting the sampling loop for on-policy training and repurposing the distillation loss as a proxy for integral KL regularization. By evaluating the FID-Reward Pareto fronts on ImageNet, we demonstrate that RMMD achieves superior trade-offs compared to single-step baselines (DI++) and multi-step competitors (DRaFT, HyperNoise). Finally, we apply RMMD to GenCast, a state-of-the-art weather forecasting model, to distill it while optimizing the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) metric. The resulting distilled model achieves a 7.5x speedup while outperforming the teacher model on 93% of target weather variables, and being better calibrated. This proves that RMMD scales to complex, high-dimensional scientific domains.

AI.tldr: 提出RMMD框架，同时进行扩散模型蒸馏和奖励函数优化，在ImageNet上取得更优的FID-Reward帕累托前沿，并在气象预报模型GenCast上实现7.5倍加速且超越教师模型。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型的蒸馏与RL微调通常被分开研究，二者之间的相互作用尚不明确，尤其是微调如何影响蒸馏模型的生成质量。
AI.method: 提出Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation (RMMD)，通过调整采样循环实现在线策略训练，并将蒸馏损失重新用作积分KL正则化的代理，从而同时完成蒸馏和奖励最大化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上，RMMD在FID-Reward帕累托前沿上优于单步基线(DI++)和多步竞争者(DRaFT, HyperNoise)；在GenCast上，实现7.5倍加速，在93%的目标天气变量上超越教师模型且校准性更好。
AI.conclusion: RMMD能够高效地同时进行蒸馏和奖励优化，并成功扩展到复杂的高维科学领域，证明了该框架的实用性和可扩展性。

title: Experience Augmented Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is a powerful paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, existing RLVR methods typically rely on on-policy optimization from scratch, resulting in high sampling costs and inefficient utilization of accumulated experience. As model capabilities and policy behaviors evolve during training, recent attempts to reuse experience via fixed reasoning trajectories further suffer from policy mismatch. Motivated by these limitations, we argue that experience in RLVR should not be reused as fixed reasoning trajectories, but instead expressed in a policy-adaptive manner. In this work, we propose Experience-Augmented Policy Optimization (EAPO), which leverages a prior RL-optimized policy as an action-level experience prior and selectively injects experience at critical decision points during rollout. To ensure stable and unbiased learning from experience-augmented rollouts, EAPO further incorporates an adapted importance sampling scheme. Experiments on using Qwen-2.5-math 7b and Qwen-3-8B on five different benchmarks demonstrate that EAPO consistently improves reasoning performance over state-of-the-art RLVR methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EAPO方法，通过将先前RL优化策略作为动作级经验先验，在关键决策点选择性注入经验，并采用自适应重要性采样，解决了RLVR中经验复用效率低和策略不匹配的问题，在多个基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法依赖从头开始的同策略优化，采样成本高且经验利用效率低；复用固定推理轨迹又会因策略演化导致策略不匹配问题。
AI.method: 提出Experience-Augmented Policy Optimization (EAPO)，包含三个关键组件：(1) 利用先前RL优化策略作为动作级经验先验；(2) 在rollout的关键决策点选择性注入经验；(3) 采用自适应重要性采样方案确保稳定无偏学习。
AI.result: 在Qwen-2.5-math 7b和Qwen-3-8B上，在五个不同基准测试中，EAPO一致优于现有最先进的RLVR方法。
AI.conclusion: 经验在RLVR中不应作为固定推理轨迹复用，而应以策略自适应的方式表达，EAPO通过动作级经验先验和选择性注入有效解决了这一问题。

title: Proofs of Ownership for Machine Learning Models
summary:
With the increasing adoption of Machine Learning, protecting model ownership has become an essential challenge. We initiate a formal study of Proof of Ownership for machine learning models: under what conditions can one prove that a stolen model originated from a particular creator? We model proofs of ownership as a game among three parties: a model owner, a thief, and a judge. The owner transforms the original model into a slightly perturbed model together with a proof of ownership. The thief then obtains the transformed model and attempts to minimally modify it so that it remains useful but escapes detection as owned by the model owner. Finally, the judge receives a model and a proof of ownership, and must decide whether the given model is a modified version of some model created by the model owner, or else the given model was developed independently.
  Our main result is a dichotomy for classifiers in the black-box setting: Under standard cryptographic assumptions, ownership of models for some concept class can be proven in the above sense {\em if and only if} the concept class is not self-correctable, in a sense close to that of Blum, Luby and Rubinfeld, STOC'90. The result is constructive and extends, with some variations, to a number of related settings.

AI.tldr: 本文针对机器学习模型的所有权证明问题进行了形式化研究，提出了一个三方博弈框架（模型所有者、窃取者、法官），并证明了在标准密码学假设下，分类器的黑盒所有权证明可行的充要条件是概念类不可自纠错。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习模型的广泛应用，保护模型所有权变得至关重要。现有工作缺乏对模型所有权证明的形式化定义和理论保证，作者希望建立严格的数学框架来回答：在什么条件下可以证明被盗模型源自某个特定创建者。
AI.method: 作者将所有权证明建模为模型所有者、窃取者和法官三方参与的博弈。所有者对原始模型进行轻微扰动并生成所有权证明；窃取者试图最小化修改模型以逃避检测；法官需判断提交的模型是否源自所有者。核心结果是分类器在黑盒设置下的二分性定理。
AI.result: 在标准密码学假设下，对于某些概念类，模型所有权可以被证明当且仅当该概念类不可自纠正（接近Blum, Luby和Rubinfeld在STOC'90中定义的自纠正概念）。该结果具有构造性，并可推广到多个相关设置。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为机器学习模型所有权保护提供了严格的理论基础，建立了所有权证明可行性的充要条件，为实际系统设计提供了理论指导。

title: Arko-T: A Foundation Model for Text-to-Structured 3D Generation
summary: Text-to-3D systems can now synthesize a mechanical part from a single sentence, yet the result is a shape to render, not a design to edit. We present Arko-T, a 4B-parameter text-to-design model that maps natural-language intent directly into executable, parametric CAD programs. Rather than optimizing for code executability alone, Arko-T aligns every stage of the pipeline to a formal notion of design state, so that data curation, code normalization, and execution-grounded supervision all work to preserve the features, parameters, and construction logic that make a CAD artifact editable. Benchmarked against seven frontier LLMs across 12 metrics, Arko-T attains the best score on 8 and the second-best on 3 more, at roughly one-tenth the per-benchmark cost. The results suggest that targeted design-level training at moderate scale can match frontier general-purpose models on structured CAD generation.

AI.tldr: Arko-T是一个40亿参数的文本到设计模型，能够将自然语言直接转化为可执行、可编辑的参数化CAD程序。通过围绕"设计状态"对齐训练流程，在12项指标中8项最优、3项次优，且成本仅为现有模型的十分之一。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-3D系统生成的机械零件只是用于渲染的形状，而非可编辑的设计。作者希望弥合"生成形状"与"可编辑设计"之间的鸿沟，让自然语言直接输出可执行、可修改的参数化CAD程序。
AI.method: 提出Arko-T模型（4B参数），核心创新在于将数据整理、代码归一化和执行监督等各阶段都与"设计状态"这一形式化概念对齐，确保保留CAD工件的特征、参数和构造逻辑，而非仅优化代码可执行性。
AI.result: 在7个前沿大语言模型和12项指标的基准测试中，Arko-T在8项指标上取得最佳成绩，在另外3项上获得第二，且每个基准测试的成本仅为对比模型的十分之一。
AI.conclusion: 适度规模但有针对性的设计级训练，能够在结构化CAD生成任务上媲美甚至超越通用前沿模型，证明了设计领域专业化训练的有效性。

title: Transformer Architectures as Complete Bayes Processes: A Formal Proof in the Measure-Theoretic Kernel Framework
summary: We present a complete formal proof that transformer architectures, when their internal update mechanisms satisfy a Bayes joint-distribution condition, implement exact Bayesian posterior inference. Working within the measure-theoretic kernel framework, we define a hierarchy of abstractions -- from the core Bayesian transformer, through semantic transformers with explicit update kernels, to full transformer blocks with QKV/attention/residual/MLP pipelines, and finally multilayer stacks -- and prove at each level that the Bayes joint semantics implies the update kernel equals the posterior almost everywhere. For the block-level architecture, we derive the explicit Bayes formula through Radon-Nikodym differentiation and prove its normalization. We additionally prove that the softmax attention mechanism induces a valid probability distribution over keys, establishing the bridge between the abstract kernel framework and concrete attention implementations. The framework makes no architectural assumptions beyond the Markov kernel structure and exposes explicit conditions under which a transformer block is provably Bayesian. In essence, when this joint distribution condition is satisfied, the forward computation of a Transformer is formally equivalent to a rigorous Bayesian posterior update.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Transformer架构在满足贝叶斯联合分布条件时，其前向计算等价于精确贝叶斯后验推断的完整形式化证明。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在诸多领域取得巨大成功，但其内部工作机制缺乏严格的概率解释。作者希望从贝叶斯推断的角度，为Transformer的更新过程提供形式化的数学基础。
AI.method: 在测度论核框架下，构建从核心贝叶斯Transformer→语义Transformer→完整Transformer块→多层堆叠的抽象层次体系。通过Radon-Nikodym导数推导出块级贝叶斯公式，并证明softmax注意力机制诱导出有效的概率分布。
AI.result: 证明了在各抽象层级上，贝叶斯联合语义蕴含更新核几乎处处等于后验概率；推导了块级架构的显式贝叶斯公式及其归一化；建立了softmax注意力与抽象核框架之间的桥梁。
AI.conclusion: 当联合分布条件满足时，Transformer的前向计算在形式化意义上等价于严格的贝叶斯后验更新，为理解Transformer的归纳偏置提供了概率视角。

title: When Does Online Imitation Learning Help in LLM Post-Training? The Role of (Non-)Realizability Beyond Horizon
summary: Online imitation learning (IL), particularly on-policy distillation, has emerged as a strong LLM post-training approach, often outperforming offline supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Yet a principled understanding of when and why online interaction helps remains unclear. In this work, we challenge the view that error accumulation is the main source of online IL's advantage, and instead show that the benefits of online interaction depend critically on whether the setting is realizable, i.e., whether the student policy class can represent the expert policy. Under realizability, we empirically find that offline IL already matches expert performance. In contrast, in non-realizable (misspecified) settings, we prove that offline IL encounters an information-theoretic bottleneck even when horizon $H=1$, and propose a structural characterization of misspecification relative to the reward, under which online IL provably achieves high performance despite a large distributional mismatch between the expert and student policies.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了在线模仿学习优势源于误差累积的传统观点，证明其优势实际上取决于设定是否可实现（学生策略类能否表示专家策略）。在可实现设定下，离线IL已能匹配专家表现；在非可实现（错误设定）设定下，离线IL存在信息论瓶颈，而在线IL即使在分布严重不匹配时也能实现高绩效。
AI.motivation: 理解在线模仿学习（特别是on-policy distillation）相较离线监督微调（SFT）的优势究竟何时、为何成立，挑战"误差累积是主要来源"的主流观点。
AI.method: 通过理论证明与实证分析相结合，引入"可实现性"（realizability）概念，对设定进行分类讨论，并给出错误设定下的结构特征刻画。
AI.result: 离线IL在可实现设定下已可匹配专家；在非可实现设定下，离线IL存在信息论瓶颈（即使H=1），而在线IL可在一定结构条件下克服此瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 在线IL的优势主要来源于处理非可实现（错误设定）场景的能力，而非传统认为的误差积累缓解。这为LLM后训练中选择离线SFT还是在在线IL提供了理论指导。

title: Internal-State Probes Read the Situation, Not the Action: Three Negative Results for Pre-Action Misalignment Monitoring
comment: Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026. 17 pages (including appendices), 5 figures, 8 tables
summary: Probes on model internals could help monitor agentic systems if they identify harmful text or tool actions before those actions are generated. We ask when an internal readout supports this stronger pre-action claim, rather than merely describing the prompt, construction contrast, or current trajectory. We test three methods across three model families: a Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct fine-tune/base direction, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct probes at the last token of unsafe prefills, and Gemma-3-27B-IT emotion-concept vectors used for projection and steering in a blackmail tool-action scenario. Across these cases, construction validity, semantic legibility, and steering effects do not become robust pre-action monitors: each is undercut by a generalization or specificity check. The Qwen direction separates fine-tune from base at AUC 1.000, yet crosses its threshold on 0/143 audited pre-assistant turn contexts and on 0/342 Qwen prefill rows where the model continues the unsafe trajectory. The Llama features decode prompt domain almost perfectly (AUC 0.999), while the best future-behavior probe reaches AUC 0.801 and only +5.1 pp accuracy lift over majority; single-source cross-domain transfer is non-positive on five of six ordered pairs. Gemma emotion projections are semantically meaningful, but a shared-prefix minimal pair has indistinguishable states before the first differing input, and steering specificity weakens against unrelated learned directions such as cats}, weather, sports, and geography. We contribute a methodology for converting internal-readout claims into pre-action tests, and report scoped negative results: monitor claims must survive both scenario/action generalization and concept-specificity controls. Code is released at https://github.com/maxf-zn/misalignment_monitoring

AI.tldr: 本文研究了内部探针能否在有害行为生成之前对其进行识别（即“行动前监控”）。实验表明，即使探针在构造验证、语义可读性和操控效应上表现良好，也无法通过泛化性和特异性检验，无法成为稳健的行动前监控器。
AI.motivation: 希望利用模型内部表征的探针来监控AI代理系统，在有害文本或工具行为生成之前进行识别，从而提供更强的安全保证。
AI.method: 在三个模型族（Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct、Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct、Gemma-3-27B-IT）上测试三种探针方法，并将其转化为“行动前测试”框架，通过泛化性和特异性检验来评估其监控能力。
AI.result: Qwen探针虽能完美区分微调与基座模型，但无法在实际上下文中触发；Llama探针的解码能力很强，但未来行为预测性能有限且跨域迁移为负；Gemma情感投影有意义，但在最小对中状态不可区分，且操控特异性差。
AI.conclusion: 内部探针的监控声明必须同时通过场景/动作泛化检验和概念特异性控制，否则无法成为可靠的行动前监控器。这是一个有范围限制的负面结果。

title: Exploring Differences Between Tabular Enterprise Data and Public Benchmarks
summary: Tabular data dominate the landscape of data science, increasingly attracting innovative machine learning models and tailored benchmarks. Yet, little is known for enterprise data, where tables constitute the backbone of business operations. To broaden the benchmarking landscape for business applications, this work aims to actualize the characteristics of enterprise data by providing an analysis of data statistics and performance measurements of tabular models such as TabPFN, TabICL and ConTextTab. Through our analysis, we find enterprise data markedly differ from tabular benchmarks and we demonstrate that a tabular model that performs well on typical tabular benchmarks may perform poorly on real world enterprise data -- and vice versa. This lack of generalization underlines the need for additional benchmarks with enterprise-grade characteristics.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了企业表格数据与公开基准数据集的显著差异，发现如TabPFN、TabICL等表格模型在典型基准上表现良好，但在真实企业数据上表现不佳，反之亦然，凸显了建立企业级基准测试的必要性。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据研究多聚焦公开基准，但对企业表格数据的特性知之甚少。为填补这一空白，作者旨在分析企业数据特征，并评估现有表格模型在企业场景下的表现。
AI.method: 通过对企业数据进行统计分析，并测量TabPFN、TabICL、ConTextTab等表格模型在企业数据上的性能表现，比较其与传统表格基准测试的差异。
AI.result: 企业数据与典型表格基准存在显著差异；在基准上表现好的模型，在企业数据上可能表现差，反之亦然，模型泛化能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 现有表格模型缺乏对企业数据的泛化能力，亟需构建具有企业级特征的额外基准测试，以促进面向实际业务应用的表格模型研究。

title: HSAP: A Hierachical Sequence-aware Parallelism for Hybrid-Context Generative Models
summary: In this paper, we aim to combine the advantages of existing sequence parallelism paradigms and overcomes their drawbacks, the most serious of which is the incapability to correctly compute causal attention on the hybrid-context packed sequences, in a stronger sequence parallelism framework. The practical technique of packing sequences for efficiently pretraining and fine-tuning large language models causes cross-contamination problem in attention computation, which can be effectively solved when no parallelism in the sequence length dimension is taken. However, in sequence parallelism, existing approaches either ignore the scenario of hybrid-context sequences or conversely sacrifice and limit parallelism degree for supporting the scenario. To this end, we innovatively propose an efficient Sequence-Aware Parallelism algorithm to conquer the obstacles of intensive tensor transmission and partial attention computation across multiple device groups. Our algorithm utilizes JIT (Just-In-Time) compilation to optimize the communication strategy of all device groups in NCCL level. Further, we integrate existing sequence parallelism paradigms into a Hierachical Sequence-Aware Parallelism framework which benefits from our sequence-aware algorithm. We additionally elaborate on the memory and communication overhead management of the hierachical framework to optimize its performance. Through multiple experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed approach outperform other state-of-the-arts sequence parallelism approches in multiple metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 Sequence-Aware Parallelism 的算法，结合现有序列并行范式的优点并克服其缺陷，特别是解决混合上下文打包序列中因果注意力计算错误的问题。该算法利用 JIT 编译优化通信策略，并集成到分层框架中，在多项指标上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有序列并行方法存在缺陷：当序列打包（packing）用于大模型预训练和微调时，混合上下文的序列会导致注意力计算中的交叉污染问题；现有方法要么忽略混合上下文场景，要么为支持该场景而牺牲并行度。
AI.method: 提出 Sequence-Aware Parallelism 算法：1) 解决多设备组间的密集张量传输和部分注意力计算障碍；2) 利用 JIT 编译在 NCCL 层优化所有设备组的通信策略；3) 将现有序列并行范式集成到分层的 Hierachical Sequence-Aware Parallelism 框架中；4) 详细阐述分层框架的内存和通信开销管理。
AI.result: 通过多项实验证明，所提出的方法在多个指标上优于当前最先进的序列并行方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功解决了混合上下文序列并行中的注意力交叉污染问题，同时不牺牲并行度，并通过分层框架和 JIT 编译优化实现了性能提升。

title: MuonSSM: Orthogonalizing State Space Models for Sequence Modeling
summary: State space models (SSMs) have emerged as efficient linear-time alternatives to attention for long-sequence modeling. However, existing SSMs often suffer from instability and memory degradation over extended horizons due to poorly conditioned first-order updates and unbalanced update geometry. We introduce MuonSSM, a general framework that stabilizes SSM training by explicitly conditioning the geometry of memory updates rather than the recurrent transition matrix. MuonSSM augments SSMs with a momentum-based pathway and a lightweight Newton Schulz transformation on low-rank input injections, yielding bounded and spectrally conditioned updates while preserving parallel scan complexity. Theory shows that MuonSSM improves gradient propagation, mitigates spectral amplification, and enriches memory representations over long horizons. Extensive experiments across language, vision, and time-series benchmarks show consistent gains in accuracy, robustness, and long-context performance when integrated into diverse SSM backbones. These results establish geometric conditioning of updates as a principled pathway to stable, scalable sequence modeling.

AI.tldr: MuonSSM是一个通用框架，通过动量路径和轻量级Newton-Schulz变换对低秩输入注入进行几何条件化，稳定SSM训练，提升长序列建模的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有SSM由于一阶更新的病态条件和更新几何不平衡，在长程序列中面临不稳定性和记忆退化问题。
AI.method: 在SSM中引入动量路径，并对低秩输入注入施加轻量级Newton-Schulz变换，确保更新有界且谱条件良好，同时保持并行扫描复杂度。
AI.result: 在语言、视觉和时间序列基准上，集成到多种SSM骨干中均取得了准确性、鲁棒性和长上下文性能的一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 更新几何的条件化是实现稳定、可扩展序列建模的原则性途径。

title: Discovering Collaboration from Novelty: Random Network Distillation for Clustered Federated Learning
summary: Federated Learning often suffers under non-independently and identically distributed data, where a single global model may fail to represent the diversity of client distributions. Clustered Federated Learning mitigates this issue by training specialized models for groups of similar clients, but existing approaches often couple cluster assignment with the main training loop, increasing computational and communication costs. We propose a lightweight clustering approach based on Random Network Distillation. Each client trains a compact Random Network Distillation predictor on its local data and uses its prediction error as a novelty signal to estimate similarity with other clients. This enables the discovery of meaningful client groups before federated training, without sharing raw data or repeatedly evaluating the main model. Crucially, the resulting federations emerge from local novelty estimates at runtime, making the method suitable for autonomous large-scale distributed systems where neither the number of clusters nor the collaboration structure can be specified a priori. Overall, by decoupling clustering from learning, the method provides a task-agnostic and efficient mechanism for autonomous collaboration under non-independently and identically distributed data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于随机网络蒸馏的轻量级聚类方法，在联邦训练前通过局部新异性估计发现客户端分组，解耦聚类与学习过程，适用于非独立同分布数据下的自主大规模分布式系统。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在非独立同分布数据下，单一全局模型难以代表客户端分布的多样性；现有聚类联邦学习方法将聚类与主训练耦合，增加了计算和通信开销。
AI.method: 每个客户端在本地数据上训练一个紧凑的随机网络蒸馏预测器，利用预测误差作为新异性信号来估计与其他客户端的相似性，在联邦训练前发现有意义的客户端分组，无需共享原始数据或重复评估主模型。
AI.result: 能够在不预先指定聚类数量或协作结构的情况下，从局部新异性估计中自主涌现出联邦分组，实现任务无关且高效的聚类。
AI.conclusion: 通过将聚类与学习过程解耦，该方法为非独立同分布数据下的自主协作提供了一种任务无关且高效的机制。

title: Muon learns balanced solutions in matrix factorization without slow saddle-to-saddle dynamics
summary: Matrix factorization (i.e., problems of the form $\min_{\mathbf{P},\mathbf{Q}} \|\mathbf{M}^\star - \mathbf{P}^\top\mathbf{Q}\|_\mathrm{F}^2$) is a minimal learning problem that exhibits both nonlinear parameter dynamics and representation learning. In this setting, we study how parameter trajectories under the Muon optimizer differ from those of gradient descent. We identify three main dynamical differences: 1) Muon avoids the slow saddle-to-saddle dynamics from small initialization. Muon instead learns all the top modes of $\mathbf{M}^\star$ at the same rate, with the smaller modes converging first. 2) Muon remains stable even when the learning rate exceeds the critical threshold set by the local loss sharpness. This frees the learning rate from the condition number of the problem, enabling rapid convergence via exponential learning rate annealing. 3) Once the weights are aligned with each other and the target, Muon flow conserves the matrix quantity $\sqrt{\mathbf{P}^\top \mathbf{P}}-\sqrt{\mathbf{Q}^\top \mathbf{Q}}$, while gradient flow is known to conserve the matrix $\mathbf{P}^\top\mathbf{P} - \mathbf{Q}^\top\mathbf{Q}$. Despite having distinct conserved quantities, both optimizers find the so-called \textit{balanced} solution from vanishing initialization. When training from small random initialization, the weights spontaneously align early in training. We derive the alignment rates in simple settings and show that they predict the empirical alignment rates in general. Finally, we exploit structural properties of Muon to construct a learning rate schedule that achieves near-perfect alignment in only two optimization steps.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Muon优化器在矩阵分解问题中的动力学特性，发现其与梯度下降有三个关键差异：避免慢鞍点动力学、超越临界学习率稳定性、以及不同的守恒量。Muon能够更快收敛并实现更好的对齐。
AI.motivation: 理解Muon优化器在非线性参数动力学和表示学习中的行为机理，特别是与标准梯度下降的差异，以解释其在实际任务中的优越性能。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和简单场景推导，研究Muon在矩阵分解问题中的参数轨迹动力学，包括鞍点规避、学习率稳定性、守恒量分析以及对齐速率。
AI.result: 1) Muon避免了小初始化下的慢鞍点-鞍点动力学，以相同速率学习所有顶部模式；2) Muon在学习率超过局部损失锐度临界阈值时仍保持稳定；3) Muon流守恒√(P^T P)-√(Q^T Q)，而非梯度流的P^T P - Q^T Q；4) 推导了对齐速率并验证了其普适性；5) 利用Muon结构性质设计了仅需两步即可达到近完美对齐的学习率调度。
AI.conclusion: Muon优化器在矩阵分解中具有独特的动力学优势，包括更快的收敛和对齐能力，其结构特性可用于设计高效学习率调度策略。

title: Informational Frustration in Neural Manifolds: Shannon Bottlenecks and the Limits of Learnability
summary: Why overparameterised deep networks generalise so remarkably well remains one of the most stubborn open questions in machine learning theory. Classical frameworks like VC dimension and Rademacher complexity predict catastrophic overfitting in modern models, leaving a massive theoretical gap between theory and reality. In this paper, we bridge this divide by introducing a unified framework that links information theory, topology, and statistical mechanics to map the hard limits of deep learning. Central to our approach is the Entropic Learnability Horizon (ELH): a fundamental law stating that a network can only truly learn a target function if the Shannon entropy of the data manifold outpaces the topological entropy of the function's decision boundary, balanced by the von Neumann entropy of the network's weight space. We establish the Shannon-Topological Bottleneck Theorem, proving that when a target boundary's geometric complexity exceeds this informational horizon, the system undergoes a sudden entropic phase transition. It falls into a state of Informational Frustration - a glassy, rigid memorization phase where generalization becomes thermodynamically impossible. Using this lens, we show that the enigmatic phenomenon of "grokking" is actually an Entropic Release, where weights abruptly reorganise to unlock the bottleneck. Finally, we translate this theory into practice with Entropic Gradient Descent (EGD), an optimization algorithm that dynamically manages weight entropy to keep learning on track. Ultimately, this work repositions entropy not just as a tool for tracking uncertainty but as the fundamental physical currency that dictates whether a machine can learn.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一信息论、拓扑学和统计力学的理论框架，解释深度网络为何能泛化。核心概念为"熵可学习性界限"(ELH)，证明当决策边界的拓扑熵超过数据流形的香农熵时，系统会经历熵相变进入"信息受挫"的玻璃态记忆阶段，导致泛化不可能。同时解释了"grokking"现象并提出了熵梯度下降算法。
AI.motivation: 经典学习理论（如VC维、Rademacher复杂度）无法解释现代过参数化深度网络的惊人泛化能力，存在理论与现实之间的巨大鸿沟。作者试图弥合这一缺口。
AI.method: 提出统一信息论、拓扑学和统计力学的理论框架，核心概念为熵可学习性界限(ELH)：网络能学到目标函数的条件是数据流形的香农熵 > 目标函数决策边界的拓扑熵，并由权重空间的冯·诺依曼熵平衡。建立香农-拓扑瓶颈定理，推导出熵相变和信息受挫状态。
AI.result: 证明了当目标边界的几何复杂度超过信息视界时，系统经历熵相变，进入"信息受挫"的玻璃态记忆阶段，泛化变得热力学上不可能。解释了"grokking"作为"熵释放"现象。提出了熵梯度下降(EGD)算法来动态管理权重熵。
AI.conclusion: 重新将熵定位为决定机器能否学习的根本物理量，而不仅仅是追踪不确定性的工具。

title: TraceLab: Characterizing Coding Agent Workloads for LLM Serving
summary: Coding agents are rapidly becoming a major application of agentic LLMs, but serving them efficiently remains challenging. Progress on this challenge requires understanding real workload patterns, yet the data needed for such analysis is largely absent. Existing public traces and benchmarks do not capture real, day-to-day coding-agent usage across multiple agents and model families for serving-system analysis. To help fill this gap, we collect and release a trace of roughly 4,300 coding-agent sessions, containing about 350,000 LLM steps and 430,000 tool calls from our own day-to-day use of Claude Code and Codex. Our analysis shows that coding-agent workloads feature long autonomous loops, long contexts with short outputs, diverse and heavily-tailed tool calls, and high but imperfect prefix cache hit rates. These findings point to concrete opportunities for optimizing serving, including lower-overhead tool calling, append-length-aware prefill, semantic-aware tool-latency prediction, and improved KV-cache management around human-paced gaps. We release the dataset, trace collection pipeline, and analysis code at https://github.com/uw-syfi/TraceLab.git; the project website is https://tracelab.cs.washington.edu.

AI.tldr: 本文收集并发布了约4,300个真实编码助手会话轨迹（包含35万LLM步骤、43万工具调用），分析了编码助手工作负载特性，并提出了针对性的服务优化方向。
AI.motivation: 编码助手（coding agents）正成为LLM的重要应用，但高效服务仍具挑战。现有公开轨迹和基准无法反映真实的多代理、多模型族的日常使用模式，缺乏用于服务系统分析的真实负载数据。
AI.method: 从作者团队日常使用Claude Code和Codex的过程中，收集了约4,300个编码助手会话轨迹（含约35万LLM步骤和43万工具调用），并公开发布数据集、采集管道和分析代码。
AI.result: 编码助手工作负载呈现四大特征：1) 长自主循环；2) 长上下文但短输出；3) 多样且重尾分布的工具调用；4) 高但不完美的前缀缓存命中率。
AI.conclusion: 基于分析结果，提出了优化方向：降低工具调用开销、感知追加长度(prefill)、语义感知的工具延迟预测、以及围绕人为操作间隙改进KV缓存管理。

title: SWE-INTERACT: Reimagining SWE Benchmarks as User-Driven Long-Horizon Coding Sessions
summary: We introduce SWE-Interact, a new testbed for evaluating coding agents on multi-turn, interactive, user-driven software engineering tasks. Existing frontier SWE benchmarks typically provide complete requirements upfront and evaluate agents on autonomous implementation. In contrast, SWE-Interact places agents in a realistic developer workflow: a carefully designed user simulator starts with vague or incomplete instructions, progressively reveals requirements, inspects the agent's workspace, and provides targeted feedback, revisions, and new constraints until the full task goal has been handed off. Grounded in large-scale studies of real coding-agent interactions, this setup tests whether agents can discover user intent, adapt to evolving requirements, and build on their own prior work. Across a suite of frontier and open-weight models, we find that strong performance on single-turn SWE tasks does not reliably transfer to multi-turn, user-driven workflows: the best-performing models solve roughly 50% of single-turn baseline tasks but only 25% of the corresponding SWE-Interact tasks. The strongest models in our evaluation, including Opus 4.8 and GPT 5.5, start strong even in the face of vague initial instructions, persevere until all the requirements are surfaced by the user, integrate them better and write clean code. However, they still suffer from over-agentic coding, forgetting requirements and technical mistakes. Weaker models start poorly under ambiguity, give up early, forget or ignore instructions and rework their code more. Overall, SWE-Interact measures an orthogonal, real-world capability axis for frontier model development: interactive goal discovery and iterative refinement with a user in the loop.

AI.tldr: SWE-Interact是一个用于评估编码代理在多轮交互式用户驱动软件开发任务中的测试平台。研究发现，在单轮SWE任务上表现优异的模型，其能力并不能可靠迁移到多轮用户驱动场景中：最强模型在单轮任务中解决约50%的问题，但在SWE-Interact任务中仅解决约25%。该测试衡量了模型的交互式目标发现和迭代优化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有SWE基准测试通常提供完整需求并评估代理的自主实现能力，但现实开发工作流中，需求往往是模糊、不完整且逐步明确的。因此，需要一个新的测试平台来评估编码代理在多轮交互、用户驱动的软件开发任务中的表现，考察其发现用户意图、适应需求变化的能力。
AI.method: 设计了一个用户模拟器，从模糊或不完整的指令开始，逐步揭示需求，检查代理的工作空间，提供针对性反馈、修订和新约束，直到任务目标完全传达。该方法基于大规模真实编码代理交互研究构建。
AI.result: 强模型在单轮SWE任务中解决约50%的问题，但在对应的SWE-Interact任务中仅解决约25%。最强模型（Opus 4.8和GPT 5.5）在模糊初始指令下表现良好，能坚持到所有需求被揭示，但仍有过度代理、遗忘需求和技术错误等问题。较弱模型在模糊性下表现差，容易过早放弃或忽略指令。
AI.conclusion: SWE-Interact衡量了一个正交的、面向真实世界的能力维度：交互式目标发现和与用户共同进行的迭代优化。单轮任务表现不能可靠预测多轮交互能力，需要将用户参与的交互能力纳入前沿模型开发评估。

title: C$^{2}$R: Cross-sample Consistency Regularization Mitigates Feature Splitting and Absorption in Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used to interpret large language models by decomposing activations into sparse, human-understandable features, but scaling to large dictionaries exposes fundamental challenges. Systematic studies reveal pervasive feature splitting that fragments coherent concepts into non-atomic latents and widespread feature absorption that creates arbitrary exceptions in general features, severely compromising latent reliability. These issues stem from inconsistent latent assignment across samples: without cross-sample constraints, per-sample optimization often allows a single underlying concept to be inconsistently distributed across multiple redundant or interfering latents. To address this, we introduce C$^2$R (\underline{\textbf{C}}ross-sample \underline{\textbf{C}}onsistency \underline{\textbf{R}}egularization). C$^2$R explicitly encourages that each semantic feature is consistently represented by a unified latent across the batch by penalizing the co-activation of directionally similar latents. Comprehensive evaluation demonstrates that C$^2$R effectively mitigates both splitting and absorption while, crucially, preserving reconstruction fidelity, providing a principled solution that enhances latent interpretability without degrading model performance. Source code is available at https://github.com/hr-jin/Cross-sample-Consistency-Regularization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出C²R（跨样本一致性正则化）方法，通过惩罚方向相似潜变量的共激活，解决稀疏自编码器（SAE）在解释大语言模型时出现的特征分裂和特征吸收问题，提升潜变量可靠性而不牺牲重建保真度。
AI.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）在解释大语言模型时，随着字典规模扩大，出现严重的特征分裂（fragments coherent concepts into non-atomic latents）和特征吸收（creates arbitrary exceptions in general features）问题，破坏了潜变量的可靠性。这些问题的根源在于缺乏跨样本约束，导致同一概念在不同样本中被不一致地分配到多个冗余或干扰的潜变量上。
AI.method: 提出C²R（Cross-sample Consistency Regularization）方法，通过惩罚批处理中方向相似潜变量的共激活，显式鼓励每个语义特征由统一的潜变量一致地表示，引入跨样本一致性约束来替代原有的独立逐样本优化。
AI.result: 综合评估表明，C²R有效缓解了特征分裂和特征吸收问题，同时关键地保持了重建保真度，在不降低模型性能的前提下提升了潜变量的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: C²R提供了一种原则性的解决方案，通过跨样本一致性正则化增强了潜变量的可解释性，且不牺牲模型性能，为大规模SAE的可靠特征分解提供了新方向。

title: One-Step Gradient Delay is Not a Barrier for Large-Scale Asynchronous Pipeline Parallel LLM Pretraining
summary: Modern large-scale LLM pretraining benefits from utilizing Pipeline Parallelism; however, synchronous implementations leave GPUs idle during pipeline bubbles, wasting computational resources. Asynchronous Pipeline Parallelism eliminates these bubbles, maximizing throughput at the cost of gradient staleness. Among asynchronous schedules, PipeDream-2BW is particularly appealing: unlike the original PipeDream schedule, it ensures a constant one-step gradient delay regardless of pipeline depth. However, its adoption remains limited due to the common belief that optimizing under staleness is fundamentally unstable. In this work, we challenge this assumption, demonstrating that degradation under one-step delay depends strongly on optimizer choice rather than being an intrinsic limitation. We provide the first comprehensive empirical analysis showing that while AdamW, the predominant optimizer at the time when PipeDream-2BW was introduced, indeed suffers from severe degradation, recent methods like Muon exhibit strong robustness under a one-step delay. We introduce an optimizer-agnostic Error Feedback-inspired correction to further mitigate delay effects. We provide supporting theoretical analysis demonstrating convergence for Muon with and without this correction. Extensive evaluation on models up to 10B parameters confirms that our strategies bridge the performance gap with synchronous training, highlighting the practical potential of asynchronous pipeline parallelism at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了异步流水线并行（PipeDream-2BW）中梯度陈旧性导致训练不稳定的普遍观点，发现性能下降主要源于优化器选择（AdamW受严重影响，而Muon具有鲁棒性），并提出了基于误差反馈的优化器无关修正方法，在10B参数规模上实现了与同步训练相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 异步流水线并行（如PipeDream-2BW）能消除同步流水线中的气泡，提高吞吐量，但其采用受限，因为普遍认为梯度陈旧性会导致训练不稳定。作者质疑这一假设，试图探究性能下降的根本原因。
AI.method: 1) 系统性实证分析不同优化器（AdamW vs Muon）在一步延迟下的表现差异；2) 提出一种优化器无关的误差反馈（Error Feedback）修正方法，减轻延迟影响；3) 提供Muon在有无修正下的收敛性理论分析。
AI.result: AdamW在一步延迟下性能严重退化，而Muon表现出强鲁棒性；所提误差反馈修正能进一步缓解延迟影响；在10B参数规模上，结合Muon和修正策略可与同步训练性能持平。
AI.conclusion: 异步流水线并行的性能退化并非固有缺陷，而是与优化器选择高度相关；Muon等优化器结合误差反馈修正，可使异步流水线并行成为大规模训练中实用且高效的方案。

title: ReFreeKV: Towards Threshold-Free KV Cache Compression
summary: To reduce memory consumption during LLM inference, a handful of methods have been proposed for KV cache pruning. While these techniques can accomplish lossless memory reduction on many datasets, they often hinge on an under-emphasized condition: an input/domain-specific threshold for KV cache budget needs to be pre-determined to achieve the optimal performance. However, such input-sensitive design may be considerably limited in real-world scenarios, as open-domain inputs span diverse domains, lengths and difficulty levels, without clear boundaries for threshold selection. As a result, the dependence of such input-sensitive threshold can be a fundamental limitation that causes large degradation on arbitrary inputs. In this work, we propose a new objective that lifts the threshold constraints for robust KV compression, advocating for "threshold-free" methods that adaptively adjust budget allocation while preserving full-cache performance. We then propose a novel method, ReFreeKV, serving as the first instantiation of this objective. Extensive experiments across 13 datasets with diverse context lengths, task types, and model sizes demonstrate its efficacy and efficiency. Our code is publicly released at https://github.com/Patrick-Ni/ReFreeKV.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有KV缓存剪枝方法依赖输入特定的阈值，在实际开放域场景中难以应用。为此提出"无阈值"目标，并首次实现为ReFreeKV方法，自适应分配缓存预算，在13个数据集上验证了效果。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法依赖预定义的输入/领域特定阈值来分配缓存预算，但在开放域场景中，输入涉及不同领域、长度和难度，难以确定统一阈值，导致性能大幅下降。
AI.method: 提出"无阈值"（threshold-free）优化目标，打破对预定义阈值的依赖，实现自适应预算分配；并首次实例化为ReFreeKV方法。
AI.result: 在13个涵盖不同上下文长度、任务类型和模型规模的数据集上进行了广泛实验，证明了ReFreeKV的有效性和高效性。
AI.conclusion: 无阈值方法ReFreeKV能够在保持完整缓存性能的同时自适应分配预算，解决了现有方法对输入特定阈值依赖的根本性局限，更适用于真实开放域场景。
